Akhriso Qoraalkan uu soo saaray Gudoomiyaha Xisbiga Kaah oo ku saabsan warar khaldan oo laga baahiyay dib u aqoonsiga Somaliland ee Isreal .

Warsaxafadeedka oo luuqada Ingiriisida ku qornaa ayuu ku yidhi;

“Ujeedo : Caddeyn ku Saabsan Wararka Khaldan ee laga Faafinayo Dib-u-Aqoonsiga Israa’iil ee Somaliland Marka loo Eego Sharciga Caalamiga ah
--

Anigoo ku hadlaya magaca Xisbiga Mucaaradka KAAH ee Jamhuuriyadda Somaliland, waxaan si diirran oo kal iyo laab ah mar kale ugu mahadcelineynaa Dowladda Israa’iil go’aankeeda rasmiga ah ee ay ku aqoonsatay madaxbannaanida Jamhuuriyadda Somaliland. Go’aankan taariikhiga ahi waa markii labaad ee Israa’iil si rasmi ah u aqoonsato Somaliland, tan iyo aqoonsigii hore ee dhacay 26-kii Juun 1960.

Si ka duwan hadallada marin-habaabinta ah ee ay faafinayaan Midowga Afrika, IGAD iyo Jaamacadda Carabta, madaxbannaanida Somaliland waxay si adag ugu taagan tahay xaqiiqo taariikheed iyo sharci caalami ah. Doodaha ku saleysan waxa loogu yeedho “midnimada dhuleed ee Soomaaliya” waa kuwo aan xaqiiqo iyo sharci midna ku fadhiyin.

Jamhuuriyadda Somaliland waxay xornimadeeda ka qaadatay Boqortooyada Ingiriiska 26-kii Juun 1960, iyadoo markaas ahayd dawlad madax-bannaan oo buuxda, isla markaana ay aqoonsadeen 35 dal, oo ay ku jiraan xubno joogto ah oo ka tirsan Golaha Ammaanka ee Qaramada Midoobay. Xuduudaheedu waa kuwo si cad loo qeexay, caalami ahaan loo aqoonsan yahay, isla markaana waafaqsan xuduudihii gumaysiga.

Wax yar uun kadib xornimadii, Somaliland waxay lumisay inay xaqiiqo ahaan u sii jirto (de facto) kaddib midow ikhtiyaari ah oo degdeg ku yimid, taasi oo ay la gashay dhulkii Talyaanigu maamulayay ( Soomaaliya) 1-dii July 1960. Midowgaasi sharci ma ahayn, maadaama uusan jirin heshiis midnimo (Act of Union) oo sharci ahaan sax ah. Maqnaanshaha heshiiskaas waa mid ka dhigaya sheegashada Soomaaliya ee Somaliland mid sharci ahaan buraysa. Marka loo eego sharciga caalamiga ah, sheegashada midnimo dhuleed waxay u baahan tahay jiritaanka dawladnimo buuxda oo waaqic ahaan iyo sharci ahaanba is-waafaqsan, taas oo aan Soomaaliya waligeed uga hirgelin Somaliland.

Kaddib soddon sano oo cabudhin ah, soddon sano oo kale oo dadkayagu ku jireen halgan dib-ula soo noqoshada dawladnimadoodii ah, iyo burburkii taliskii milateri ee fadhigiisu ahaa Muqdisho kaas oo ku kacay xasuuq ba’an oo ka dhan ah shacabkeenna, Jamhuuriyadda Somaliland waxay si sharci ah dib ugu soo ceshatay inay mar kale xaqiiqo ahaan u jirto. La soo noqoshada dawladnimadan, marka lala eego mabda’a sii-jiritaanka sharciyadda (state continuity) ee waafaqsan sharcidarradii midowgii 1960-kii, waxay si buuxda ugu waafaqsan tahay sharciga caalamiga ah. 

Somaliland waxay buuxisay dhammaan shuruudaha dawladnimo ee ku xusan Heshiiska Montevideo ee 1933, waxayna xaqiijinaysaa xuquuqda aayo-ka-tashiga ummadaha ee ku cad Qodobka 1(2) ee Axdiga Qaramada Midoobay.

Sidaas darteed, dib-u-aqoonsiga Israa’iil ma ahan mid “abuuraya” dawlad cusub oo la yidhaahdo Somaliland, balse waa mid xaqiijinaya jiritaanka sharciyeed ee dawlad 65 sano jirtay, isla markaana ka tarjumaya xaqiiqo siyaasadeed iyo waaqac taaggan 34 sano inkastoo ay la kulantay iska indho-tir caalami ah. 

Marka loo eego aragtida ku dhawaaqista (declaratory theory) ee sharciga caalamiga ah, jiritaanka dawladdu kama xidhna shardiga aqoonsiga dalal kale oo keliya. Sidaas darteed, hay’adaha dawladaha ka dhexeeya ma laha awood sharci ah oo ay ku hor istaagaan go’aamada madaxbannaan ee dalalka madaxabannaan.

Farriinteennu waa mid cad: siyaasaddii hal-dhinac u janjeedhay ee lagu duudsiyay xuquuqda iyo xorriyadda shacabkeenna, iyadoo weliba la taageerayay maamul fashilantay oo ah Soomaaliya — oo aan wax maamul, xukun iyo awood dawladnimo ah ku yeelan Somaliland in ka badan 33 sano — waa mid gebi ahaanba soo dhammaatay.

Waxaan ugu baaqeynaa beesha caalamka, oo ay ku jiraan xubnaha Midowga Afrika, xubnaha Midowga Yurub, Maraykanka iyo dhammaan dalalka kale ee caalamka, in ay ka tanaasulaan aragtiyaha beenta ku dhisan ee ay faafinayso dawlad fashilantay, islamarkaana aqoonsadaan xaqiiqda aan la dafiri karin: Jamhuuriyadda Somaliland waa dal madax-bannaan oo leh qarannimo buuxda, marka loo eego dhammaan qeexitaannada sharciga caalamiga ah.”

#NEWS: Flag-Burning in Mogadishu as Israel Backs Somaliland Independence

People in Mogadishu held a protest today after Israel officially recognized the Republic of Somaliland as an independent country. During the demonstration, some protesters burned an Israeli flag to show their anger.

Many Somalis in Mogadishu said they felt that Israel’s decision was disrespectful to Somalia’s unity. They also argued that foreign countries should not get involved in Somalia’s internal issues.

Somaliland declared its independence in 1991 and has been running its own government for 34 years. But until now, no UN-member country had formally recognized it. Israel is the first country to take this step, and the move has created new political tension in the region.

Observers say the decision could change the political atmosphere in the Horn of Africa and may increase the already sensitive relationship between Somalia and Somaliland.

More reactions are expected in the coming days.

Sababta ugu badan ee gobollada ama bulshooyinka qaarkood ku kallifta inay ka goostaan dalalka ay ku hoosjiraan, waa in ay noqdeen laangaab siyaasadeed oo ku hoosdulman dalka ay ka tirsan yihiin. Arrintan ayuu si qotodheer u falanqeeyay qoraaga ree Brazil, Guilherme Canever, buuggiisa “Qaramada aan la Aqoonsan: Socdaal Lagu Maray Dalalka aan Jirin” (Unrecognized Nations: Travels to Countries That Don’t Exist). 

Canever, oo intuu daraasaddan waday booqasho ku tagay ku dhawaad labaatan dal ama goobood oo iskood madaxbannaani ugu dhawaaqay, wuxuu tilmaamay in inta badan goosatadu ay ka soo unkanto dareen la xidhiidha in la dayacay, laga tiro batay, ama laga fogeeyay awoodda siyaasadeed. Bulshooyinkaasi marka ay billaabaan dhaqdhaqaaqa gooni isu taagga, waxay isku qanciyaan in xaaladdoodu si toos ah u hagaagi doonto marka ay ka go’aan dowladda ay ku hoosjiraan. 

Si kastaba ha noqotee, Canever, wuxuu si cad qalinka ugu adkeeyay, in rajadaasi inta badan ay noqoto mid aan rumoobin, gaar ahaan bulshooyinka qabiilka ku dhisan. Goosashadu uma noqon karto bulshooyinkaas xal kamadanbays ah oo lagu nasto. Maxaayeelay; maamulka cusub ee goonigoosadka waxaa ka soo dhex baxa kooxo kale oo iyaguna ku andacooda in la dulmiyay, la takooray, laga tiro badan yahay, lagana dheereeyay awooddii siyaasadeed ee ay mudnaayeen, halkaas waxaa ka ibafurma silsilad cusub oo goosasho ah. 

Marka aragtidan lala akhriyo xaaladda siyaasadeed ee Somaliland – oo ka mid ahayd goobihii uu Canever booqday – waxaa soo muuqanaya in ay tusaale fiican u tahay aragtidiisa. Siyaasiyiinta Somaliland waxay muddo dheer ku doodayeen in midawgii 1960-kii kaddib ay ku dhex milmeen bulsho ka tiro badan kana dhul ballaadhan, taas oo keentay in ay noqdaan laangaab siyaasadeed. Dareenkaasi wuxuu ahaa mid ka mid ah tiirarkii ay ku dhisantay aragtida goonigoosashadu. 

Haseyeeshee, xiisaddu halkaas ku ma istaagin. Isla doodda laangaabinimada siyaasadeed ayaa mar kale ka soo dhex baxday gudaha Somaliland lafteeda. Reer Waqooyi Bari, kadib muddo dheer oo ay ku hoos jireen maamulka Somaliland, ugu danbayn waxay goosteen iyaga oo ka cabanaya in la dulmiyay, la xasuuqay, kaalintii ay mudnaayeenna la duudsiyay. Saansaanta Awdal ka muuqatana ka ma foga middii Waqooyi Bari. Tani waxay si toos ah u xaqiijinaysaa in goosashadu ay u tahay bulshooyinka qabaliga dhibaato aan dhammaad lahayn, halkii ay u noqon lahayd xal waara oo kamadanbays ah.

Soomaaliya & Sacuudi-Carabiya: Hal Qadiyad, Hal Mowqif — Diidmada Aqoonsiga Israa’iil ee Maamulka Waqooyi-Galbeed (Somaliland ku magac-dheer)

Maalmihii u dambeeyay, dunidu waxay si weyn uga hadlaysay tallaabada ay Israa’iil ku shaacisay inay aqoonsatay waxa loogu yeero Maamulka Waqooyi-Galbeed (Somaliland). Go’aankan ayaa abuuray caro iyo walaac ballaaran oo ka dhex dilaacay gobolka, gaar ahaan Soomaaliya iyo Sacuudi-Carabiya, kuwaas oo arrintan u arka xadgudub cad oo ka dhan ah madaxbannaanida, midnimada dhuleed iyo sharciga caalamiga ah.

Jamhuuriyadda Federaalka Soomaaliya waxay si degdeg ah u muujisay in aqoonsi kasta oo la siiyo maamul ka goosasho ah uu yahay faragelin toos ah oo lagu hayo arrimaha gudaha dalka, isla markaana khatar ku ah xasilloonida Geeska Afrika iyo marin-biyoodka Badda Cas. Soomaaliya waxay ku adkaysatay in midnimada dhulkeedu aysan ahayn arrin gorgortan geli karta.

Dhanka kale, Sacuudi-Carabiya, oo ah dal leh culays diimeed, siyaasi iyo amni oo weyn, ayaa si cad u diiday tallaabo kasta oo horseedi karta kala-qaybsanaan dal Carbeed ama Muslim ah. Riyadh waxay aaminsan tahay in aqoonsiga Israa’iil ee maamul gooni-goosad ah uu yahay precedent khatar ah oo lagu burburinayo dalal, lana adeegsanayo siyaasadda “qaybi oo xukun”.

Arrintan ma aha mid ku kooban Soomaaliya oo keliya. Sacuudi-Carabiya waxay si qoto dheer uga digtay qorshayaal la mid ah kuwaas oo:
•lagu kala jarayo Yemen,
•lagu siyaasadeeyo Badda Cas,
•laguna wiiqayo amniga guud ee Carabta iyo Muslimiinta.

Sidaas darteed, Soomaaliya iyo Sacuudi-Carabiya maanta waxay wadaagaan hal qadiyad iyo hal aragti:
👉 In la diido aqoonsi sharci-darro ah
👉 In la ilaaliyo midnimada dalalka
👉 In laga hortago faragelin shisheeye oo lagu qarinayo dano amni iyo istaraatiiji ah

Aqoonsiga Israa’iil ee Maamulka Waqooyi-Galbeed (Somaliland ku magac-dheer) waxaa loo arkaa isku day lagu abuurayo xasarad cusub, laguna kala fogeynayo dalalka gobolka, xilli dunidu u baahan tahay xasillooni, wada-hadal iyo ixtiraam qaranimo.

Soomaaliya ma aha dal keligiis taagan. Waxay leedahay saaxiibo, taageero iyo qadiyad la wadaago. Qof kasta oo isku daya in uu kala jabiyo dalalka ama ku ciyaaro khariidadda gobolka, wuxuu wajahayaa diidmo siyaasadeed, mid sharci iyo mid taariikhi ah.

Qodobadan waxa laga soo qaatay waayo-aragnimada dalal kale oo ka soo kabanaya colaado, waxaana loo waafajiyay duruufaha Soomaaliya.

⸻

1. Aqoonsiga dhammaan dhibbanayaasha, ma aha hal qiso oo keliya
 • Aqoonsiga rasmiga ah waa inuu xusaa tacaddiyadii loo geystay dhammaan beelaha iyo rayidka (Isaaq, Daarood, Hawiye, Digil-Mirifle, laga tirada badan yahay, haween, iyo kuwo kale).
 • Ka fogaanshaha fikirka “annaga oo keliya ayaa dhib soo gaaray” (tartan dhibbane).
 • Hadallada rasmiga ah waa inay yiraahdaan:
“Kooxo kala duwan ayaa siyaabo kala duwan u dhibtooday, dhammaantoodna waa in la aqoonsadaa.”

Sababta ay tani muhiim u tahay: Diidmo iyo dafiraad waxay dhalisaa naceyb; aqoonsigu wuxuu dhisaa kalsooni.

⸻

2. Dhisidda Gudi Madaxbannaan oo Runta iyo Diiwaangelinta ah
 • Guddi ay hoggaaminayaan Soomaali balse madax-bannaan, kana shaqeeya:
 • Ururinta markhaatifurrada badbaadayaasha dhammaan gobollada iyo beelaha
 • Diiwaangelinta dambiyada ay geysteen dowlad, maleeshiyaad, iyo quwadaha shisheeye
 • Diiradda saaridda run-sheegid, ee aan aargoosi ahayn

Xeer muhiim ah: Dhibku darajo ma laha — xasuuq (genocide), dambiyada ka dhanka ah aadanaha, iyo dambiyada dagaalka dhammaantood waa in si daacad ah loo diiwaangeliyo.

⸻

3. Adeegsiga erayo sax ah, ee aan ahayn magacyo siyaasadeed
 • Dhacdooyinka loogu yeero waxa ay caddayntu taageerto:
 • Xasuuq (genocide) marka shuruudaha buuxsamaan
 • Dambiyo ka dhan ah aadanaha ama dambiyo dagaal marka aysan buuxin
 • Ka fogaanshaha isticmaalka erayga genocide si siyaasadeed ama in la dafiro marka caddayn jirto.

Saxnaantu ≠ dafiraad. Waxay kordhisaa kalsoonida iyo runnimada.

⸻

4. Xus iyo xasuus wada-jir ah oo qof walba ku jira
 • Maalmo qaran oo lagu xuso dhammaan rayidka dhibbanayaasha ah.
 • Xusuus-taallooyin maxalli ah oo laga dhiso:
 • Hargeysa
 • Muqdisho
 • Baydhabo
 • Kismaayo
 • Xusuus-taallooyinku waa inay wax baraan jiilasha, ee aanay eedayn.

⸻

5. Magdhaw iyo caddaalad astaan ah
 • Magdhawgu khasab ma aha inuu noqdo lacag:
 • Dib-u-dhiska xaafado la burburiyey
 • Soo celinta xuquuqda dhulka
 • Deeqo waxbarasho oo la siiyo carruurta dhibbanayaasha
 • Raalli-gelinno rasmi ah oo ay bixiyaan hay’adaha (meesha ay suurtagal tahay)

Xitaa tallaabooyin astaan ah way qiimo leeyihiin marka magdhaw maaddi ah adkaado.

⸻

6. Kala saaridda eedda guud iyo mas’uuliyadda shakhsiga
 • Ka fogaanshaha ku tilmaamidda dambiyada sida “Beel X vs Beel Y”.
 • In la muujiyo mas’uuliyadda:
 • Hoggaamiyeyaasha
 • Maleeshiyaadka
 • Hay’adaha
 • Tani waxay ka hortagtaa eed la iska dhaxlo iyo rabshado mustaqbalka ah.

⸻

7. Dib-u-habayn waxbarasho
 • Taariikhda Soomaaliya in lagu dhigo dugsiyada iyadoo:
 • Aragtiyo kala duwan la muujinayo
 • Xaqiiqooyin la hubiyay la adeegsanayo
 • Codadka dhibbanayaasha la maqashiinayo
 • Dhallinyarada waa inay bartaan:
“Aqoonsiga xanuunka dadka kale ma tirayo kan annaga na soo gaaray.”

⸻

8. Dhiirrigelinta wadahadal, ee aan ahayn dib-u-heshiisiin khasab ah
 • Dib-u-heshiisiintu lama dedejin karo, mana aha mid lagu qasbo.
 • Taageer:
 • Wadahadallo bulsho
 • Doodo ay hoggaaminayaan dhibbanayaashu
 • Dhexdhexaadin diimeed iyo dhaqan
 • Bogsiintu waxay u baahan tahay waqti, ee ma aha hal-ku-dhagyo.

⸻

9. Caddaalad marka ay suurtagal tahay, cafis marka ay khasab noqoto
 • Dambiyada culus looma tirtiri karo cafis guud.
 • Meelaha aan maxkamadayn suurtagal ahayn:
 • Run-sheegid
 • Aqoonsi dadweyne
 • Ka mamnuucid xilalka dadkii tacaddiyada geystay (lustration)

⸻

Gunaanad

Soomaaliya waxay wax ka qaban kartaa caddaalad-darrooyinkii taariikhiga ahaa iyadoo:

Aqoonsanaysa dhammaan dhibaatada, si taxaddar leh u sheegaysa runta, mas’uuliyadda u saaraysa cidda ku habboon iyada oo aan eed guud la saarin, isla markaana dhisaysa xasuus wadareed aan cidna tirtirin.

Habkan:
 • Wuxuu sharaf u yeelayaa dhibbanayaasha
 • Wuxuu yareynayaa dafiraadda
 • Wuxuuna hoos u dhigaa halista in taariikhdu mar kale soo noqoto.

Gudiddii Xaqiiqo-Raadinta ee Midowga Afrika (AU) ee Somaliland maxay ku daraaseeyeen, maxayse soo jeediyeen?

Gudiddan oo Midowga Afrika u diray Somaliland 2005, ujeeddadoodu waxay ahayd inay xaqiiqda dhabta ah ka soo ogaadaan xaaladda Somaliland: taariikh, sharciyad, amni, iyo rabitaanka shacabka.

Waxyaabihii ay daraaseeyeen

Gudiddu waxay si qoto dheer u eegteen:
 1. Taariikhda Somaliland
 • Inay ahayd dal madax-bannaan 1960 (British Somaliland).
 • In midowgii ay la gashay Soomaaliya uu ahaa mid ikhtiyaari ah, balse fashilmay.
 2. Sharcinimada gooni-isu-taagga
 • In Somaliland dib ula soo noqotay xornimadeedii hore, halkii ay ka ahaan lahayd “goosasho cusub”.
 • In kiiska Somaliland uusan la mid ahayn goosashooyinka kale ee Afrika.
 3. Rabitaanka shacabka
 • In shacabka Somaliland si cad u taageersan yihiin madax-bannaanida.
 • Tixraac ayay u qaateen aftidii Dastuurka 2001.
 4. Nabadda & Amniga
 • In Somaliland ka jirto xasillooni, amni iyo maamul shaqaynaya.
 • Marka loo eego koonfurta Soomaaliya, Somaliland ay ka duwan tahay.
 5. Dowladnimo & Dimuqraadiyad
 • Doorashooyin, xisbiyo, goleyaal sharci-dejineed.
 • Hay’ado dowladeed oo shaqaynaya.

Gunaanadkii & Talooyinkii Gudidda

Gudiddii AU waxay si cad u sheegeen:
 • 👉 Kiiska Somaliland waa mid gaar ah (unique case).
 • 👉 Looma baahna in lagu dabaqo mabda’a guud ee “xuduudaha Afrika lama beddeli karo”.
 • 👉 Midowga Afrika waa inuu arrinta Somaliland si gaar ah u qaadaa, kana baaraan-degaa aqoonsigeeda.
 • 👉 In la sameeyo hannaan gaar ah oo AU u gaar ah si loo wajaho arrinta Somaliland.

Laakiin maxaa dhacay?

Inkasta oo warbixintaasi ahayd mid aad u taageersan Somaliland, haddana:
 • Midowga Afrika si siyaasadeed uma qaadin tallaabo rasmi ah.
 • Arrintu waxay ku xayirmatay cadaadis siyaasadeed, danaha dalalka xubnaha ah, iyo mabda’a midnimada Afrika.

Iictiraafkii waxaa uu dhaqso bilaabey in gabdhihii niqaabka qabay uu Yahuudiga ka furo si uu utuso l wajigeed caalamk Gaalda waxaan uu Huwiye Calanki Yahuudo sida lagu yaqaan yahuud fasahad iyo islaam naceyb

Xildhibaan hore Mudane Dr. Cabdifataax Ismaaciil Daahir, ayaa Madasha Aragti Wadaaga ee Heritage ka jeediyay hadal jeedin ku saabsan; Maareynta marxladda adag ee uu dalku marayo.

It has also been reported that a Maryland-based attorney, Jeremy Wyeth Schulman, was indicted in 2020 in connection with an alleged scheme involving the embezzlement of millions of dollars in frozen Somali government assets. The law firm in which he was a shareholder—Shulman Rogers (later Schulman Bhattacharya)—was reportedly linked to the case.

A 2014 United Nations Monitoring Group report further alleged the existence of a scheme involving the firm and the office of then-President Hassan Sheikh Mohamud to misappropriate recovered Somali state assets. The report claimed that up to 80 percent of withdrawals from the Central Bank during that period were diverted for private use. President Mohamud has consistently denied these allegations.

More recent reports have alleged that over $260 million in international aid was diverted into offshore Swiss accounts purportedly linked to the president, with claims that some of these funds were later frozen by U.S. and European anti–money laundering authorities. These allegations, however, have not been independently verified and remain contested.

The administration has also faced accusations of unlawfully selling public land and state-owned properties to political allies and private investors, allegedly bypassing legal and regulatory procedures. Critics contend that revenues from these transactions were not deposited into the federal treasury.

Former officials and civil society organizations have pointed to weakened oversight institutions, limited transparency, and ineffective accountability mechanisms as major obstacles to conducting thorough and credible investigations into corruption allegations.

Tixgelinta Beesha Caalamka ee xubinnimada Somaliland ee Qaramada Midoobay waxay leedahay dhinac kale oo ay tahay in laga fiiriyo, taas oo dood toosineysa, hawshana fududeyneysa: waxa Somaliland raadinayso ma aha kaliya "aqoonsi" maadaama oo aanay JSL ahayn dal cusub oo dal ka go’aya, xuduud cusub oo aan jirin welina hore loo maqalna samayna, balse waa dib-u-qoonsi iyo dib-u-la-noqosho madax-bannaanideedii hore u jirtay. 

Aragtidaan waxay waafaqsan tahay mabaadi'da aasaasiga ah ee Midowga Afrika oo ku qeexan Qaraarkii 1964 ee OAU ee Qaahira iyo Qodobka 4(b) ee Dastuurka Midowga Afrika—kaas oo ilaalinaya lama-taabtaanka xuduudaha la dhaxlay xilligii xornimada, iyada oo lagu salaynayo xuduudihii gumeysiga. (Xuduudda Somaliland waa la dhaxlay)

Somaliland, oo ah dhulkii hore ee Boqortooyada Ingiriiska ee Somaliland Protectorate, waxay xornimo qaadatay June 26, 1960, iyadoo ku jirta isla xuduudahaas gumeysiga waxayna heshay aqoonsi diblomaasiyadeed oo ka timid in ka badan 35 waddan ka hor inta aysan si ikhtiyaari ah ula midoobin dhulkii hore ee Talyaaniga Somaliland July 1, 1960, si ay u sameeyaan Jamhuuriyadda Soomaaliya.

Xaqiiqdaasi waxay dib u qaabaynaysaa in Soomaaliya aanay ahayn  "dawladdii laga go'ayey" “Parent State”  balse waa “Dawladdii lala-midoobey” "Partner State" arrinkani wuxu leeyahay macne weyn oo qaanuuni iyo siyaasi labadaba ah, waxayna tilmaamaysaa isu-imaansho si xornimo ah u dhacay, si xornimo ahna looga noqon karo.

Iyada oo la waafajinayo tusaalooyinkii hore ee midowyadii la kala diray, kolka la faahfaahiyo, ee la toostoosiyo, waxay meesha ka saaraysaa aragtida ah inay tahay “kala goyn” dhul ama “ku xad-gudub” madax-bannaani, maadaama aysan jirin "gooni-u-goosasho" ka yimid dawlad midaysan. 

Taa beddelkeeda, waxay aqoonsanaysaa in si wada jir ah loo kala diray midow fashilmay, oo kolka horeba voluntary ku yimid,  isla markaana u oggolaanaysa saaxiibbada soomaliland iyo dunida kaleba dariiq ka fudud kan hore, waa jid sahlan oo ay Somaliland ku noqon karto xubin ka tirsan Qarammada Midoobey ,

**FALANQAYN SHARCI CAALAMI AH:

QABSASHADA MADAXWEYNAHA VENEZUELA IYO MAGACAABIDDA MADAXWEYNE KU-XIGEENKA**

Hordhac

Arrinta ku saabsan qabsashada madaxweynaha Venezuela (Faniisweela) iyo in madaxweyne ku-xigeenka loo magacaabo madaxweyne ku-meel-gaar ah waa arrin si toos ah u taabanaysa sharciga caalamiga ah (International Law), madax-bannaanida dowladaha, xasaanadda madaxda qaranka, iyo sharciga dastuuriga ah ee gudaha Venezuela.
Falanqayntan waxay si nidaamsan u eegaysaa:

Sharciyadda qabsashada madaxweynaha

Xasaanadda madaxweynaha marka uu xilka hayo

Saameynta sharciga caalamiga ah

Sharciyadda magacaabidda madaxweyne ku-xigeenka

Aqoonsiga caalamiga ah

Gunaanad sharciyeed

1. QABSASHADA MADAXWEYNAHA IYO SHARCIYADDEEDA

A. Mabda’a madax-bannaanida dowladaha

Sharciga caalamiga ah wuxuu si cad u aqoonsan yahay in:

Dowlad kasta ay leedahay madax-bannaani buuxda (Sovereignty)

Dal kale uusan faragelin karin arrimaha gudaha, gaar ahaan hoggaanka siyaasadeed

Tani waxay ku xusan tahay:

Axdiga Qaramada Midoobay – Qodobka 2(4)

“Dhammaan dowladuhu waa inay ka fogaadaan adeegsiga awood militari ama handadaad ka dhan ah madax-bannaanida dowlad kale.”

➡️ Sidaas darteed, qabashada madaxweyne xil haya iyada oo aan oggolaansho sharci caalami ah jirin:

Waa xadgudub ku ah sharciga caalamiga ah

Waxay jebinaysaa madax-bannaanida Venezuela

B. Xasaanadda Madaxweynaha (Head of State Immunity)

Sharciga caalamiga ah wuxuu siinayaa:

Xasaanad buuxda (Absolute Immunity) madaxweynaha xilka haya

Xasaanaddan waxay ka ilaalisaa: 

In la xiro

In la maxkamadeeyo

In la afduubo

Xasaanaddan waxay khusayso:

Falalka uu sameeyo isagoo xilka haya

Xitaa haddii lagu eedeeyo dambiyo culus (marka laga reebo dambiyada caalamiga ah ee ICC)

➡️ Sidaa darteed:

Haddii madaxweynaha Venezuela la qabto isagoo xilka haya,

Falkaas sharci caalami ah ma aha mid sax ah

2. SHARCI CAALAMI AH IYO DULQAAD LA’AANTA FARAGELINTA

A. Mabda’a Non-Intervention

Sharciga caalamiga ah wuxuu mamnuucayaa:

In dal shisheeye uu beddelo hoggaanka dal kale

In awood militari lagu farageliyo nidaam dowladeed

Arrintan waxaa si cad u qeexay:

Go’aannada Maxkamadda Caalamiga ah ee Cadaaladda (ICJ)

Qaraarrada Golaha Guud ee QM

➡️ Sidaa darteed:

Qabsashada madaxweyne

Iyo saameyn ku yeelashada hoggaanka dalka waa faragelin sharci-darro ah

3. MAGACAABIDDA MADAXWEYNE KU-XIGEENKA: SHARCI MA TAHAY?

A. Dastuurka Venezuela

Dastuurka Venezuela wuxuu oggol yahay in:

Madaxweyne ku-xigeenka uu qabto xilka madaxweynaha

Haddii madaxweynuhu: 

Geeriyoodo

Is casilo

Awoodi waayo inuu shaqeeyo

Aqoonsiga Ogaadeenya oo soo dhaw & Wadamo badan oo danaynaya.

Aqoonsiga qadiyadda Ogaadeenya maanta wuxuu marayaa marxalad ka duwan kuwii hore. Isbeddellada siyaasadeed ee ka socda Geeska Afrika, daciifnimada dawladnimada Itoobiya, & kororka xiisadaha caalamiga ah ee amniga, kheyraadka & marin-biyoodka ayaa ka dhigay Ogaadeenya qodob si isa soo taraysa loo danaynayo.

1. Sababaha aqoonsigu u soo dhawaanayo.

● Tabar daraanta Itoobiya: 
Khilaafaadka gudaha, dagaallada qowmiyadeed & kala daadashada hay’adaha dawladdu waxay fureen albaab ay qadiyadaha la duudsiyay codkooda ku gaarsiiyaan caalamka.

● Isbeddelka aragtida caalamka: 
Dunidu maanta waxay aad u eegaysaa xuquuqda aadanaha, is-maamul doonka & xalalka waara, halkii ay ka taageeri lahayd gumaysi qarsan oo ah mid laga daalay.

● Joogtaynta halganka Ogaadeenya: Ogaadeenya ma aha qadiyad cusub; waa mid taariikhi ah oo leh halgan siyaasadeed, mid bulsho & mid sharci.

2. Wadamada danaynaya – Maxaa ku riixaya?

● Amni & xasillooni goboleed: Ogaadeenya waa marin istaraatiiji ah; cidda xasillisa ama saameysa waxay saameyn ku yeelanaysaa Geeska Afrika oo dhan.

Kheyraad dabiici ah: Shidaal, gaas, iyo dhul ballaadhan oo istaraatiiji ah ayaa ka dhigaya Ogaadeenya meel indhaha lagu hayo.

● Tartanka quwadaha waaweyn:
 Maraykan, Shiinaha, Yurub & quwadaha Bariga Dhexe mid walba wuxuu doonayaa saameyn, taasoo fursad u noqon karta qadiyadda Ogaadeenya haddii si xeelad leh loo maareeyo.

3. Doorka shacabka & hoggaanka
Aqoonsigu si degdeg ah uma iman karo. Waxa uu u baahan yahay: Midnimo shacab & aragti fayoow oo qodo dheer 

Hoggaan aragti dheer leh: Hoggaan fahamsan siyaasadda caalamka, kana faa’iidaysan kara danaha wadamada.
Diblomaasiyad firfircoon: Cod mideysan oo caalamka gaadha, kana shaqeeya sharciyad, warbaahin & xiriirro siyaasadeed.

4. Gunaanad

Aqoonsiga Ogaadeenya ma aha riyo fog, balse waa fursad taariikhi ah oo u baahan diyaar-garow. Wadamada danaynaya waa seef laba af leh: waxay noqon karaan saaxiibo ama caqabad, iyadoo ku xidhan sida ay Ogaadeenya u mideyso mowqifkeeda una ilaaliso danaha dadkeeda & Dalkeeda.

WAR: Sucuudiga oo Burburiyey Qorshihii Imaaraadka ee Yaman iyo Soomaaliya

Sucuudi Carabiya ayaa muddo 24 saac gudahood ah ku fashilisay dadaallo ay Imaaraadku muddo ku dhow toban sano ka waday dalka Yaman, kuwaas oo isugu jiray taageero dhaqaale iyo mid militari. 

Ilo xog-ogaal ah ayaa sheegaya in qorshihii gooni-u-goosadka Yaman uu burburay, iyadoo haatan socda wada-hadallo u dhexeeya Xuutiyiinta iyo dhinacyada Yaman ee taageersan midnimada dalka.

Hannaankan cusub ee Yaman waxaa taageeraya Sucuudi Carabiya, Turkiga iyo Iran, kuwaas oo ku baaqay in dib loo yagleelo dowlad Yaman ah oo mideysan.

Dhanka Soomaaliya, Imaaraadka Carabta ayaa isla maanta soo saaray war saxaafadeed ay si cad ugu muujinayaan ixtiraamka midnimada iyo madax-bannaanida Jamhuuriyadda Federaalka Soomaaliya, tallaabadan oo timid kaddib horumarada ka dhacay Yaman iyo Baxreyn. 

Waxaa sidoo kale la saadaalinayaa in xaaladaha Libya iyo Sudan ay saameyn ku yeeshaan jihada siyaasadeed ee Imaaraadka maalmaha soo socda.

Wasiirka Arrimaha Dibadda ee Sucuudiga ayaa ku sugan magaalada Washington, halkaas oo la filayo inuu gudbiyo farriin ku saabsan doorka Soomaaliya ee amniga gobolka, gaar ahaan ammaanka Sucuudiga.

Dhanka kale, Dhaxal-sugaha Sucuudiga, Maxamed Bin Salmaan, oo hore loogu dhaliili jiray siyaasaddiisa gudaha iyo dibadda, ayaa haatan si isa soo taraysa loogu arkaa hoggaamiye si cad uga soo horjeestay qorshayaasha lagu kala qaybinayo dalalka Muslimiinta.

Sucuudigu waxa uu u arkaa Yaman iyo Soomaaliya inay leeyihiin muhiimad istiraatiiji ah oo la xiriirta amniga qaranka, gaar ahaan marka la eego saameyn kasta oo dibadeed oo ka iman karta Israa’iil.

>Honest Media Tv

Maalmahaan Masuuliyiinta somaliland ee TV-yada caalamiga imaanayo sida Israa'iil oo kale ayaa looga maadeysanayaa 😂 Isku mid ma aha marka TV soomaaliyeed laga hadlaayo iyo marka la joogo mid International ah. Eeg sheekadaan dhex martay.

"Somaliland iyo Israel: mataano wadaaga Taariikh iyo khataro jiritaan oo isku mid ah"

Mararka qaar waxaa jira dalal ku dhasha xanuun, ku kora cadaadis, kuna nool hanjabaad joogto ah. Waxaa jira shucuub aan helin raaxo aqoonsi, balse ku nool xaqiiqo ka adag waraaqaha iyo miisaska Qaramada Midoobay. Marka si qoto dheer loo fiiriyo khariidadda siyaasadda adduunka, laba wadan ayaa mataano noqon kara—inkastoo ay juqraafi ahaan kala fog yihiin: Somaliland iyo Israel.
Labadan dal waxa ay wadaagaan wax ka badan inta indhaha caadiga ahi arki karaan. Waxay wadaagaan taariikh adkaysi, halgan jiritaan, iyo nidaam dawladeed oo ka dhex ifaya gobollo ay hareeyeen colaad, kali-talisnimo iyo xasillooni darro joogto ah.

1) Dimoqraadiyad ku dhex dhalatay deegaan aan dimoqraadi ahayn:
Israel waa dawladda kaliya ee dimoqraadi ah ee ka jirta Bariga dhexe—gobol ay hareeyeen nidaamyo kali-talis ah, dagaallo soo noq noqda, iyo xukunno aan ku dhisnayn rabitaanka shacabka. Waxay deris yihiin Masar, Suuriya iyo Jordan, midkoodna ma gaadhin heerka dawladnimo, xorriyad siyaasadeed iyo isbeddel xukun ee Israel gaadhay.
Sidaas oo kale, Somaliland waa jasiirad dimoqraadi ah oo ka dhex ifaysa Geeska afrika. Iyadoo ay ku hareeraysan yihiin dalal ay ka jiraan colaado, xukuno kali-talis ah, sida Soomaaliya, Itoobiya iyo Jabuuti—Somaliland waxay ku adkaysatay nidaam ku dhisan doorashooyin, xisbiyo siyaasadeed iyo isbeddel xukun oo nabad ah.
Dimoqraadiyadda labadan dal kama iman deeq dibadeed ama cadaadis shisheeye; waxay ka dhalatay go’aan bulsho iyo rabitaan dadweyne—taas oo ka dhigaysa mid qoto dheer oo waarta.

2) Khatar jiritaan oo joogto ah: tiro yar oo ku dhex jira bad weyn diidan.
Israel waa dal ay dadkiisu ku dhow yihiin 10 milyan, balse ku dhex jira gobol ay ku nool yihiin in ka badan 400 milyan oo Carab ah, kuwaas oo intooda badani si taariikhi ah u diidanaa jiritaanka Israel. Khatar jiritaan, dagaal, cunaqabatayn iyo hanjabaad joogto ah ayaa qayb ka noqday nolol-maalmeedka Israel tan iyo maalintii la aas-aasay.
Somaliland-na ma aha mid ka caagan sawirkaas. Iyadoo dadkeedu ku dhow yihiin 6 milyan, waxay ku dhex jirtaa bulsho Soomaaliyeed oo tiradoodu ka badan tahay 20 milyan, kuwaas oo intooda badan aan aqbalin gooni-isu-taagga Somaliland. Diidmadaas mararka qaar waxay isu beddeshaa cadaadis siyaasadeed, mid diblomaasiyadeed iyo mid amni.
Labada dalba waxay ku nool yihiin su’aal aan waligeed dhammaan:
Sideen u ilaalinaa jiritaankeena?

3) Dawladnimo ku dhalatay burbur iyo xanuun
Israel waxay dhalatay sannadkii 1948, iyadoo ka soo baxday mid ka mid ah masiibooyinkii ugu waa weynaa ee taariikhda aadanaha—Holocaust-kii Nazi-ga, kaas oo ay ku naf waayeen ku dhowaad lix milyan oo Yuhuud ah, malaayiin kalena ku barakaceen, ku dayacmeen, kuna waayeen guryo, qoysas iyo mustaqbal. Dawladnimada Israel ma ahayn hadiyad la bixiyey; waxay ahayd jawaab ka dhalatay xanuun, badbaado iyo baahi jiritaan.
Somaliland-na waxay dib u curatay 1991, kadib xasuuqii baahsanaa ee xukunkii Siyaad Barre u geystay kaas oo ay ku naf waayeen ku dhowaad lix boqol oo kun oo qof iyo Magaalooyinkii oo la dumiyey. 
Labada dalba dawladnimadoodu kuma iman miis nabadeed oo lagu wada qoslay, balse waxay ka dhasheen xaalado ay doorashadu ahayd mid keliya: in la noolaado ama la dabar go’o. Xanuunkaas taariikheed wuxuu labadoodaba siiyey adkaysi, qaran ku dhisan xusuus, feejignaan iyo go’aan aan dib looga laaban karin.

4) Amni gudaha oo ka muhiimsan gargaar dibadeed
Israel waxay dhistay ciidan iyo sirdoon ay dunidu qaddariso, kuna tiirsan tiknoolajiyad, feejignaan iyo is-aaminaad gudaha ah. Inkastoo ay hesho taageero saaxiibo, haddana amnigeeda iyo go’aanka madax-banaanideeda marna kama tanaasusho.
Somaliland, iyaduna, iyadoo aan haysan aqoonsi iyo gargaar caalami ah, waxay ku guulaysatay amniga gudaha—taas oo ah guusha ugu weyn ee ay kaga duwan tahay deriskeeda. Ciidamo qaran, nabad bulsho ayaa suurtageliyey xasilloonidaas.

5) Sharciyad ka timaadda shacabka, ee aan ka iman caalamka
Israel waxay jiritaankeeda ku dhistay aqoonsiga iyo u-hurista dadkeeda. Somaliland-na sidaas oo kale, shacabkeedu si buuxda ayay u aqbaleen, una difaacaan dawladnimadooda.
Taasi waa sharciyadda ugu xooggan ee dal yeelan karo.

Gunaanad: mataano kala fog, balse isku qaddar ah.
Somaliland iyo Israel ma wadaagaan diin, midab ama juqraafi—laakiin waxay wadaagaan qaddar siyaasadeed. Waa laba dal oo ku dhex jira deegaan colaad ah, laba nidaam oo dimoqraadi ah oo la dagaallamaya diidmo, laba qaran oo ku nool khatar jiritaan balse aan ka tanaasulin riyadooda.

Hargeysa, Somaliland

KHUDBAD QARAN | QIIRO IYO BARAARUJIN

Shacabka Soomaaliyeedow,

Maalintii 1991-kii ma ahayn oo kaliya maalin uu burburay dowlad, ee waxay ahayd maalin ay dumo cisadii, sharaftii iyo haybaddii qaranka Soomaaliyeed. Waxay ahayd maalin uu ilmeynayo calankii buluugga ahaa, oo uu aamusey codkii midnimada, lana jabiyey riyadii jiilal badan ku naf waayeen.

Maanta, in ka badan soddon sano kaddib, halkii aynu ka dhisi lahayn wixii dumay, waxaan u hamuun qabnaa kala googo’ iyo kala-tag. Halkii aynu ka baran lahayn casharka burburka, waxaan u sacbinaynaa fikrado na sii fogeynaya walaaltinimada iyo wadajirka.

Ayaan daran ummadda Soomaaliyeed!

Qaran la dumiyey waa la dhisi karaa, balse qalbi kala go’ay dib looma mideeyo si fudud. Dhul la kala xadeeyey waa la heshiin karaa, balse damiir kala irdhoobay waa musiibo ka daran burburkii hubka.

Dhallinyaradeennow, adinku ma tihidin jiilkii burburiyey qaranka, balse ha noqonina jiilkii aaski lahaa rajadiisa. Odayaasha, culimada, waxgaradka iyo hoggaamiyeyaasha siyaasadeedow, taariikhdu way idin xukumi doontaa: midnimo ma dhisteen mise kala-qaybsanaan ayaad sii huriseen?

Qabiil, dano gaaban, iyo faragelin shisheeye midna ma dhisi karo qaran. Qaran waxaa dhisa wadajir, cadaalad, is-ixtiraam iyo aragti fog. Calanka buluugga ahi ma matalo qabiil, gobol ama koox; wuxuu matalaa ummad Alle u simay diin, luqad iyo taariikh.

Maanta waa waqtigii la is weydiin lahaa:
Ma kala-tag baa mustaqbal keenaya, mise midnimo dhaawacan oo la daweeyo?

Soomaaliyeey, aynu ka toosno hurdada kala-qaybsanaanta. Aynu ka towbad keenno nacaybka iyo is-eedeynta. Aynu u hiilino qaranimadii dhaawacantay, ka hor inta aanan si buuxda u lumin.

Qaran la badbaadiyo waa sharaf,
qaran la dayacana waa dambiga ugu weyn ee jiil lagu eedeeyo.

Alle ha u naxariisto kuwii u shahiiday qarankan, hana inoo iftiimiyo waddada midnimo, nabad iyo sharaf.

Wabillaahi Towfiiq.

Dowladda Soomaaliya Oo ah  Magac U yeel Beelaha Hubeysan Oo Lunsaday Gargaarka Mareykanka – Beesha Caalamka Oo Qalad Ku Taageerta Awood Qabiil

Muqdisho – Bakhaar uu leeyahay Hay’adda Cunnada Adduunka (WFP) ayaa lagu burburiyey Soomaaliya, iyadoo laga lunsaday 76 tan oo gargaarka cunto ah. Dowladda Mareykanka ayaa si kulul ugu eedaysay mas’uuliyiinta dowladda federaalka Soomaaliya, taasoo keentay hakad ku yimaada barnaamijyadii gargaarka ee dadka nugul loogu talagalay.

Si kastaba ha ahaatee, xaqiiqadu waa mid ka fog muuqaalka dowladda: Dowladda Soomaaliya waa magac u yeel, halka meesha dhabta ah ee awoodda ay ku jirto ay tahay beelo hubeysan oo qabiil ku dhisan, kuwaas oo ka faa’iideysta taageerada Mareykanka iyo hay’adaha caalamiga ah si ay u lunsadaan gargaarka bani’aadanimo.

Arrintani waxay cadaynaysaa khaladka ay beesha caalamka ka galayso taageeridda hay’ad dowladeed oo aan lahayn awood dhab ah oo lagu maareeyo dalka, isla markaana awoodda dhabta ah ku jirto gacanta beelo hubeysan. Gargaarka bani’aadanimo ee loogu talagalay dadka baahan ayaa si joogto ah u noqda mid ay beeluhu lunsadaan, iyaga oo adeegsanaya hub iyo saameyn deegaan.

Waxaa sidoo kale muuqata in dowladdu ay ka gaabisay ilaalinta nidaamka iyo amniga bakhaarrada gargaarka, taasoo mar kale cadaynaysa in awooda dhabta ah aysan ka jirin xafiisyada dowladda, balse ay ku urursan tahay gacanta kooxo hubeysan oo qabiil ku dhisan. Beelahan ayaa mar walba isticmaala fursadaha caalamiga ah si ay u sameeyaan bililiqeyn iyo lunsid, iyagoo ka faa’iideysanaya taageerada Mareykanka, WFP iyo hay’adaha kale ee gargaarka bixiya.

Mareykanka ayaa caddeeyay in arrintani tahay mid aan la aqbali karin, laakiin digniintaas ma aha mid wax ka bedelaysa xaqiiqda ah in siyaasadda Soomaaliya ay ku dhisan tahay qabiil iyo awood ururin, halkii laga maamuli lahaa danaha dadka Soomaaliyeed iyo ilaalinta gargaarka caalamiga ah.

Dhacdadani waxay mar kale muujinaysaa halista ka dhalanaysa taageeridda dowlad magac u leh oo aan ka madax bannaanayn beelo hubeysan, taasoo dhaawacaysa dadka ugu baahan, sumcadda hay’adaha caalamiga ah, iyo kalsoonida gargaarka bani’aadanimo. Waxaa cad in beesha caalamka ay si qalad ah u maalgeliso awood qabiil hubeysan, halka dadka Soomaaliyeed ay mar walba noqdaan kuwa ugu weyn ee waxyeello ka soo gaarta nidaamkan.

Waxaa lagama maarmaan ah in tallaabo dhab ah la qaado si gargaarka bani’aadanimo uu u gaaro dadka u baahan, halkii uu ka ahaank lahaa hub iyo dano gaar ah oo beelo gaar ah u adeegaya. Haddii aan talaabo laga qaadin, taageerada caalamiga ah ee Soomaaliya waxay halis ku noqonaysaa in ay si joogto ah u noqoto fursad uu qabiilka hubeysan kaga faa’iideysto, halkii laga ilaalin lahaa dadka baahan iyo horumarka dalka.

cabasho degdeg .

Xafiiska Dhalinyarada iyo Ciyaaraha Degmada Shinile

Ujeeddada loo aasaasay Xafiiska Dhalinyarada iyo Ciyaaraha ee degmooyinka (DDS) waa in uu horumariyo, dhiirigeliyo, isla markaana maamulo dhammaan arrimaha la xiriira dhalinyarada iyo ciyaaraha. 

Xafiiskani waxa uu door muhiim ah ku leeyahay kobcinta awoodda dhalinyarada iyo dhismaha bulsho firfircoon.

Ujeeddooyinka ugu waaweyn ee xafiiskan loo sameeyay waxaa ka mid ah:
• Isdhexgalka Bulshada
• Kobcinta xirfadaha dhalinyarada, iyadoo la bixinayo tababaro iyo wacyigelin joogto ah
• Kor u qaadista caafimaadka iyo nadaafadda dhalinyarada
• Abuurista fursado waxbarasho iyo shaqo

Si kastaba ha ahaatee, Xafiiska Dhalinyarada iyo Ciyaaraha Degmada Shinile ma muuqato in uu fulinayo midkoodna ujeeddooyinkaas kor ku xusan. 

Dhalinyarada degmada ayaa si weyn uga cabanaya hab-maamulka xafiiska, iyagoo tilmaamaya in miisaaniyaddii ama lacagihii loogu talagalay kobcinta iyo dhiirigelinta dhalinyarada—oo sanadkii ku dhow 2 milyan oo Birr—loo maamulo si aan daah-furnayn (qaab mad-madow ah).

Arrintan waxa ay dhalisay niyad-jab iyo kalsooni-darro ku timid dhalinyarada degmada, kuwaas oo dareemaya in la duudsiyay xuquuqdoodii horumarineed. 

Sidaa darteed, dhalinyarada Degmada Shinile waxay si cad u codsanayaan in xafiiskan si degdeg ah loo qiimeeyo, loo baaro, isla markaana loo hubiyo in miisaaniyadda dhalinyarada si sax ah oo cadaalad ah loo adeegsado.

Ugu dambayn, dhalinyarada Shinile waxaa lagula talinayaa inay u midoobaan danahooda guud, kana dhiidhiyaan wax kasta oo dhaawacaya mustaqbalkooda. 

Haddii kale, budhcadka ku habsaday hantida iyo xuquuqda bulshada lagama yaabo inay si iskeed ah uga tanaasusho falalkaas ilaa cadaadis bulsho iyo mid sharci la saaro.

Eedeyn Culus iyo Dhaleeceyn Toos ah oo Ku Socota Dowladda Xasan Sheekh
Tallaabada lagu burburiyey bakhaarka kaydka ee Hay’adda Cunnada Adduunka (WFP) oo ku yaalla gudaha Dekedda Muqdisho waxay noqotay mid si weyn u gilgishay kalsoonidii caalamku ku qabay Dowladda Federaalka Soomaaliya ee uu hoggaamiyo Madaxweyne Xasan Sheekh Maxamuud

Ficilkan ayaa loo arkaa mid si cad u muujinaya dayacaad, masuuliyad-darro iyo ku tuman danaha shacabka Soomaaliyeed ee duruufaha adag ku nool.
Sida ay xaqiijiyeen ilo-wareedyo kala duwan, Dowladda Federaalka ayaa muddo dheer cadaadis ku haysay WFP si ay uga guurto gudaha dekedda Muqdisho, hase yeeshee hay’addu ma aysan helin beddel ammaan ah oo ay u guurto. 

Taas beddelkeeda, dowladda ayaa dooratay waddo halis ah oo ah in si xoog ah loo burburiyo bakhaarkii keydka gargaarka, tallaabo si toos ah u saameysay kumannaan qoys oo Soomaaliyeed oo ku tiirsanaa cunnadaas.

Waaxda gargaarka ee Dowladda Mareykanka (USAID) ayaa si cad u sheegtay in falkaas kadib ay hakisay caawintii ay siin jirtay Soomaaliya, iyada oo ku eedeysay Dowladda Federaalka in ay masuul ka tahay burburka iyo ammaan-darrada keentay in la lunsado gargaar bani’aadamnimo. Mareykanka wuxuu intaas ku daray in ilaa 76 tan oo cunto ah laga xaday bakhaarka la burburiyey, taasoo ah masiibo bani’aadamnimo oo culus.

Arrinta ka sii daran ayaa ah in ilaa hadda uusan jirin wax war ah ama falcelin rasmi ah oo ka soo baxday Dowladda Federaalka, taasoo sii xoojisay tuhunka ah in xukuumadda Xasan Sheekh ay iska indho-tireyso dhibaatada shacabka, isla markaana aysan dan ka lahayn xiriirka ay la leedahay saaxiibada caalamka.
Hay’adda WFP ayaa lagu warramay in ay dacwad u gudbisay safaaradaha caalamka ee ku sugan Muqdisho, taasoo muujinaysa heerka ay gaartay khilaafka u dhexeeya hay’adaha gargaarka iyo dowladda.
 
Tani waxay dhaawac weyn ku tahay sumcadda Soomaaliya, gaar ahaan xilli dalka uu wajahayo abaaro, barakac iyo cunno-yari baahsan.
Ugu dambeyn, burburinta bakhaarka WFP iyo aamusnaanta dowladda ee arrintaas waxay daliil u tahay fashilka hoggaamineed ee Dowladda Xasan Sheekh, taasoo u muuqata mid ka doorbiday dano siyaasadeed iyo muran hantiyeed badbaadada nolosha shacabka. 

Dowladda Federaalka waa in ay si degdeg ah uga jawaabtaa eedeymahan, u caddeysaa bulshada Soomaaliyeed iyo beesha caalamka sababta ka dambeysay tallaabadan, isla markaana qaaddaa masuuliyadda ka dhalatay khasaaraha bani’aadamnimo ee dhacay

Haddii kale, ficilladan oo kale waxay sii fogeyn doonaan kalsoonida caalamka iyo rajadii shacabka Soomaaliyeed ee ku aaddan dowlad mas’uul ah oo u adeegta dadkeeda.

Adam Smith wuxuu tilmaamay in saddex arrimood ay asaas u yihiin in qaran kasta uu gaaro barwaaqo dhaqaale:

​1. Danta Gaarka ah ee Garaadku Hagayo (Enlightened Self-Interest)

​Smith wuxuu dadka ku dhiirrigeliyey dhaqanka tayeynta,shaqo adag, iyo danta gaarka ah ee garaadku hago. Wuxuu aaminsanaa in ku dhaqanka falsafaddan ay tahay mid dabiici u ah inta badan dadka.

​Tusaalihiisa caanka ah ayuu ku sharxay arrintan: "Kawaanluhu hilibka kuguma siiyo niyad-sami ama samafal, balse wuxuu eeganayaa faa'iidada uu ka helayo iibkaas." Haddii hilibka uu iibinayo uu yahay mid tayo xun, ma helayo macaamiil dib ugu soo laabata, sidaas darteedna ma helayo faa'iido.

​Haddaba, waxaa danta kawaanlaha ku jirta inuu hilib tayo wanaagsan ku iibiyo qiimo ay macaamiishu awoodaan, si labada dhinacba ay uga faa'iidaan macaamilkaas.

​Smith wuxuu aaminsanaa in aragtida fog (long-term view) ay ka hortageyso in ganacsatadu ay dhibaateeyaan macaamiisha. Marka damiirka ganacsatadu shaqeyn waayo, wuxuu u arkayey in dowladdu ay tahay inay soo farageliso si ay u fuliso sharciga.

​Sidoo kale, Smith wuxuu u arkayey tashiilka (Savings) inay tahay dabci muhiim ah, gaar ahaan marka keydkaas la maalgashado. Maalgashigu wuxuu warshadaha siinayaa raasamaal (capital) ay ku iibsadaan mashiinno casri ah oo shaqada fududeeya, dhiirrigeliayana hal-abuurka. Horumarkan farsamo wuxuu kordhinayaa faa'iidada raasamaalka la geliyey, wuxuuna kor u qaadayaa heerka nolosha ee bulshada guud ahaan.

​2. Dowlad Awooddeedu Xadidan tahay (Limited Government)

​Smith wuxuu qabay in mas'uuliyadda dowladdu ay noqoto mid xadidan, kuna kooban: Difaaca qaranka, waxbarashada loo siman yahay, adeegyada guud (kaabayaasha dhaqaalaha sida waddooyinka iyo buundooyinka), ilaalinta xuquuqda sharciga ah (lahaanshaha hantida iyo heshiisyada), iyo ciqaabista dembiyada.

​Dowladdu waa inay soo dhexgashaa kaliya marka dadku ay u dhaqmaan si lid ku ah danta guud iyaga oo eeganaya dano gaaban. Waa inay dejisaa, fulisaana sharciyo ka dhan ah tuuganimada, khiyaanada, iyo dembiyada la midka ah. Smith wuxuu ka digay dowladaha waaweyn ee burjuwaasiga  ah (Bureaucratic governments), isagoo yiri: "Ma jirto farshaxan ay dowladdu si dhaqso ah uga barato dowladda kale marka laga reebo farshaxanka ah in lacagta laga saaro jeebka dadweynaha."

​Smith wuxuu sidoo kale aaminsanaa in waxbarashada dadweynuhu ay muhiim tahay si looga hortago saameynta taban ee caajiska iyo aqoon-darrada  ah ee ka dhalata qeybsiga shaqada (division of labor), taas oo ahayd qeyb daruuri ah oo kamid ah nidaamka warshadaha.

​3. Lacag Adag iyo Dhaqaale Suuqu Xor yahay

​Qodobka saddexaad ee Smith soo jeediyey wuxuu ahaa in la helo lacag adag oo barbar socota mabaadi'da suuqa xorta ah. Smith wuxuu doonayey in lacagta waddanku ay noqoto mid ay dhabarka u riixayso macdan (sida dahab ama qalin) si looga hortago in qiimaha lacagtu uu hoos u dhaco (depreciation) marka si xad-dhaaf ah loo daabaco. Tani waxay sidoo kale xakameynaysaa kharashaadka macno-darrada ah ee dowladda (sida ku bixinta lacagta dagaallada).

​Iyada oo lacagta adag ay xadidayso kharash-bixinta, Smith wuxuu doonayey in dowladdu raacdo mabaadi'da suuqa xorta ah. Kuwaas waxaa kamid ah in canshuuraha hoos loo dhigo iyo in meesha laga saaro caqaabadaha ganacsiga (tariffs) si ganacsigu xuduudaha uga gudbo (Free Trade).

​Wuxuu tilmaamay in canshuuraha soo-dejinta (tariffs) iyo canshuuraha kale ay kaliya guuleystaan inay nolosha ku qaaliyeeyaan dadweynaha, isla markaana ay cabburiyaan warshadaha iyo ganacsiga caalamiga ah.

Taariikhda Midnimadii Soomaaliyeed iyo Go’aankii Somaliland. 

Sanadkii 1957 ayaa la isku dayay midowgii shanta Soomaaliyeed, waxaana madax iyo aqoonyahanno ka socday dhulkii la odhan jirey Waqooyiga Soomaaliya (Somaliland) ay u tageen Muqdisho si arrintaas looga doodo. Hase yeeshee, shirkiiasi ma suuragelin, waxaana dib loogu noqday sanadkii 1958.

Waa xilligii ay dalalkii Yurub ku jireen talo-gelin ku saabsan sidii bulshada Soomaaliyeed looga tashan lahaa arrimaha xorriyadda.

Shirkii xigayna midho-dhal ma noqon. Rabitaanka midnimadu wuxuu dhab ka ahaa Somaliland iyo Jabuuti, halka ay Koonfurta iyo NFD ka cago-jiideen.

Sanadkii 1959 ayaa mar kale shirkii dib loo furay, iyadoo weli dadka Somaliland ay aad u doonayeen midnimo. Qaar ka mid ah madaxdii Somaliland metelayay ayaa, markay daaleen, soo jeediyay in arrintaas muddo dib loo dhigo, balse waa laga diiday.

Bishii Luulyo 1960 ayaa mar kale la isu noqday, iyadoo Somaliland ay aqbashay 27 qodob, kuwaas oo uu ansixiyay Baarlamaankii ka koobnaa 33 xildhibaan, lana geeyay Muqdisho.

Markii la fadhiistay Luulyo 1960, qodobadii quseeyay masiirka ummadda Somaliland waa la laalay, labadii dowladood iyo golayaashoodiina waa la isku daray.

Qodobadii sharciga ahaa ee ilaalin lahaa xuquuqda Somaliland waa laga tegey, si loo dardargeliyo waxa loogu yeedhay midnimada ummadda Soomaaliyeed. Tallaabadaasi waxay meesha ka saartay in uu jiro is-raac sharci ah, isla markaana labada dowladood si dastuur ah u midoobaan.

Intaas ka dib, cadaaladdii ummadda Somaliland waxay noqotay mid lagu tunto, oo aan marna loo garsoorin si caddaalad ah. Xuquuqdoodii waa laga duudsiyay, lagana xayuubiyay fursado ay ka mid ahaayeen waxbarashada, tababarrada ciidanka, saamiga hoggaamineed iyo ganacsiga.

Ra’iisul Wasaare Cigaal waa la afgambiyay, waa la xidhay, waxaana si toos ah loo weeraray xukunkii iyo hantidii ummadda Somaliland. Taasi waxay sababtay in dalku galo dagaal sokeeye, laguna kala yaaco.

Halkaas ayay ku burburtay riyadii Jamhuuriyadda Soomaaliyeed, iyadoo qolo walba u jeesatay danteeda. Koonfurtuna waxay qaadatay nidaam federaal ah oo cusub, kaas oo aan weli lagu heshiin.

18 May 1991, Somaliland waxay si rasmi ah dib ula soo noqotay madax-bannaanideeda, waxayna dhisatay Dawladda Somaliland oo ku dhisan dimuqraadiyad. Dhibaatooyinkii gudaha ayaa lagu xalliyay hab guurtinimo iyo wada-tashi ah.

Kadib 35 sano, Somaliland waxay gaadhay heer aqoonsi caalami ah. In Soomaaliya riyo hore daba taagnaato waa waqti-lumis; maanta iyaga ayaa u baahan gargaar iyo dib-u-dhis nidaam dowladeed, maadaama 40 sano ay ku guul-darraysanayeen inay ka baxaan dagaal sokeeye.

Somaliland waa dal dhamaystiran, dunidana kula jira wada-hadal iyo gorgortan, kuna socda danaheeda gaarka ah, isla markaana aan wax dan ah ka lahayn qalalaasaha siyaasadeed ee ay madaxda Muqdisho ku mashquulsan yihiin.

Somali Clerics, Citizens Protest Israel’s Recognition of Somaliland

Somali religious scholars, joined by large crowds of civilians, gathered in Mogadishu on Wednesday to strongly protest Israel’s decision to recognize Somaliland as an independent state. The demonstration, held at Daljirka Dahson in the heart of the capital, was marked by chants, speeches, and banners rejecting what participants described as foreign interference that threatens Somalia’s unity, sovereignty, and religious identity.

Adduunka 10ka Janaayo, 2026  :- Wakaaladaha u Janjeera Qaar kamid ah Wadamada Qadar iyo Turkiga ayaa Faafinaya Warar sheegaya In Imaaraatku Ka Baxayo Guuda ahaan Soomaaliya Sida Magaalooyinka Boosaaso  , Muqdisho iyo Barbara  .
Wararkaan ayaa Faafaya Xilli Dawladda Faderaalka Soomaaliya ay ku jirto marxalad ah labo Doorasho Ma Imaaraat mise Sucuudi kay raacayaan , Xilli Madaxweyne Xasan Sheekh uu ku jiro 140 Cisho ee Ugu danbeeyay Muddo Xileedkiisa .

Dawladda Imaaraadka Carabta ayaa codsi rasmi ah soo gaarsiisay Dowladda Federaalka oo ku saabsan inaan laga joojin isticmaalka hawada Soomaaliya diyaaradeehada ciidanka.
Sidii aan hore u baahinnay, Soomaaliya ayaa 8-dii bishan Janaayo hawada dalkeeda ka mamnuucday inay isticmaalaan dhammaan diyaaradaha xamuulka iyo kuwa ciidan ee laga leeyahay dalka Imaaraadka.
Amarka Soomaaliya ayaa soo baxay saacado kaddib markii la baahiyay in Cayduruus Al-Zubaydi oo ahaa hoggaamiyihii Goonigooska STC ee dalka Yemen la marsiiyay hawada Soomaaliya.
Inkasta oo ay Dowladda Federaalka ah ay War-Saxaafeed ka soosaartay arrinka Al-Zubaydi oo ay sheegtay inay tallaabooyin dheeraad ah qaadayso. Haddana, Somali Stream waxay ogaatay in Dowladda Federaalka ah ee Soomaaliya ay go’aan hordhac ah ku qaadatay in dalkeeda laga joojiyo isticmaalka diyaaradaha ciidanka iyo xamuulka ee Imaaraadka.
Imaaraadka oo helay amarka Soomaaliya ayaa codsi soo gudbisaday in waqti la siiyo hase ahaate Soomaaliya ayaa ku adkaystay go’aankeeda.
Wadahadal kaddib, Dowladda Federaalka ah ee Soomaaliya ayaa Imaaraadka u ogolaatay in duullimaadyadii ugu dambeysay ay kaga rarato dalka, inkastoo Muqdisho aysan wali toos u sheegin in ay joojisay wada shaqeynta amni ee labada dal.
6 duulimaad oo rakaab iyo agab ka qaadayo ayaa ka baxayo Boosaaso, halka 4 kale loo fasaxay in ay Muqdisho ka daad gureeyaan wixii agab ciidan oo ka yaal.
Abu Dhabi ayaa si degdeg ah u bilowday inay u fuliso amarka Dowladda Soomaaliya, waxaana duulimaadyadii ugu horreeyay ay xamuul iyo agab ciidan ka qaadeen Boosaaso.
Somali Stream, waxay xaqiijisay in go’aanka Soomaaliya uu dhaqangalay kaddib markii madaxda Dowladda Federaalka ah ay ku adkaysteen.
Xiriirka Imaaraadka iyo Soomaaliya ayaa ku jira maalmihii ugu adkaa, Soomaaliya ayaana noqotay dalkii labaad oo Imaaraadku qalabkiisa ciidan kala baxayo kaddib Yemen.
India 10ka Janaayo 2026 Dowladda Hindiya ayaa "warar been abuur ah"  ku tilmaantay qoraallo lagu baahiyay baraha bulshada oo sheegayay in Madaxweynaha maamulka Somaliland uu wada-hadallo rasmi ah la yeeshay Ra’iisul Wasaare Narendra Modi, iyo in Hindiya ay qarka u saaran tahay inay aqoonsato Somaliland.
Waaxda Xaqiiqo-Raadinta ee Wasaaradda Arrimaha Dibadda Hindiya oo ka jawaabeysa sheegashooyinkan ayaa qoraal ay soo dhigtay barta X (ex-Twitter) ku tiri: "Digniin warar been abuur ah! Qoraallada hoose waa been!".
Caddayntan ayaa timid xilli ay baraha bulshada qabsadeen warar si xawli ah u faafay oo sheegayay in Ra'iisul Wasaare Modi uu wada-hadallo rasmi ah la yeeshay Madaxweyne Cabdiraxmaan Cirro iyo in aqoonsiga Somaliland ee "dimoqraadiyadda ugu weyn adduunka" uu soo dhow yahay.
Hindiya ayaa sidoo kale meesha ka saartay wararka sheegaya in Soomaaliya ay u yeeratay danjiraheeda u fadhiya Hindiya sababo la xiriira tallaabada aqoonsiga ee la sheegay, iyadoo caddeysay in wararkaas internet-ka ku jira ay yihiin kuwo aan sal iyo raad toona lahayn.
Sawirro (Screenshots) ay wadaagtay waaxdu ayaa muujinayay muuqaallo iyo qoraallo si qaldan u taswiiraya xiriir rasmi ah oo dhex maray Hindiya iyo Somaliland, taas oo dowladda Hindiya sheegtay in aanay waxba ka jirin.
Muqdisho 10ka Janaayo 2026 Madaxweynaha Soomaaliya, Xasan Sheekh Maxamuud, oo caawa jeediyay khudbad uu kula hadlayay shacabka Soomaaliyeed, ayaa si adag u cambaareeyay tallaabooyinka ay qaadday Somaliland, kuwaas oo uu ku tilmaamay kuwo khatar ku ah midnimada iyo madaxbannaanida dalka, isagoo sheegay in Somaliland ay marar badan ka leexatay fursado wadahadal oo lagu gaari lahaa xal siyaasadeed.
Madaxweynaha ayaa tilmaamay in maamuladii kala dambeeyay ee Somaliland ay ka gaabiyeen ka faa’iidaysiga wadahadallo horseedi karay lahaa midnimo iyo is-afgarad qaran, islamarkaana ay qaadeen waddooyin sii kala fogeeyay dadka Soomaaliyeed. Wuxuu xusay in dowladda federaalku marar badan ku celcelisay in arrimaha la xiriira khilaafka siyaasadeed ay yihiin kuwo u dhexeya shacabka Soomaaliyeed iyo dowladdooda, laguna xallin karo oo keliya wadahadal.
Madaxweynaha ayaa sidoo kale si gaar ah uga hadlay heshiiskii is-afgarad (MOU) ee Somaliland ay la gashay Ethiopia, isagoo ku tilmaamay mid lama filaan ah, xilli ay socdeen wadahadallo kale, taasoo uu sheegay inay sii fogeysay rajadii xal siyaasadeed. Wuxuu ku eedeeyay maamulka Hargeysa inuu aad ugu nugul yahay faragelin shisheeye, gaar ahaan isku day kasta oo la xiriira raadinta aqoonsi dibadeed.
Dhinaca kale, madaxweynuhu wuxuu si kulul u diiday wax kasta oo ka hor imaanaya midnimada dhuleed ee Soomaaliya, isagoo caddeeyay in Jamhuuriyadda Federaalka Soomaaliya tahay dal madax-bannaan oo aan lagu kala goyn karin warqad ama saxiix dal shisheeye. Wuxuu sheegay in isku dayada aqoonsi raadinta aysan dan u ahayn shacabka ku nool waqooyiga dalka, balse ay adeegayaan dano shisheeye oo halis ku ah amniga gobolka Geeska Afrika, Badda Cas iyo Bariga Dhexe.
Madaxweyne Xasan Sheikh ayaa u diray farriin gaar ah shacabka Soomaaliyeed ee ku nool waqooyiga dalka, isagoo xusay in aqoonsi dhab ah uu ka imaan karo oo keliya shacabka iyo dowladda Soomaaliyeed ee ay wadaagaan diin, dhaqan iyo dalnimo. Wuxuu ku booriyay hoggaanka Hargeysa inay dib u milicsadaan waayo-aragnimada caalamiga ah ee muujinaysa in kala go’ lagu gaaro oo keliya heshiis siyaasadeed oo ay labada dhinac ku qanacsan yihiin. Isagoo soo hadal qaaday tusaalooyin caalami ah sida Koonfur Suudaan, Eritrea, East Timor, Taiwan iyo Catalonia, madaxweynuhu wuxuu sheegay in aqoonsi caalami ah uusan suurtagal noqon karin haddii aan la helin heshiis siyaasadeed oo ay wada oggol yihiin dhinacyada ay khusayso.
Xasan Sheekh ayaa mar kale adkeeyay in dowladda federaalku diyaar u tahay tanaasul iyo wadahadal dhab ah si loo helo midnimo qaran, isagoo sheegay in wax kasta oo suuragal ah loo hurayo midnimo iyo dowladnimo wadajir ah.
Wuxuu ugu dambayn mahad celiyay shacabka Soomaaliyeed meel kasta oo ay joogaan sida ay uga dhiidhiyeen tallaabooyinka uu ku tilmaamay kuwo khatar ku ah dalka, wuxuuna sidoo kale mahadcelin u jeediyay beesha caalamka iyo ururrada caalamiga ah ee taageeray midnimada, madaxbannaanida iyo wadajirka dhuleed ee Soomaaliya.
Koonfur Galbeed 10ka Janaayo 2026 Ciidamada sida gaarka ah u tababaran ee Kumaandooska Danab ayaa xalay hpwlgal qorshaysan oo lagu beegsaday kooxda Al-shabaab ka fuliyay deegaanka Buur Eyle ee degmada Buur Hakaba ee gobolka Baay.
Howlgalka ayaa lagu bartilmaameedsaday xubno ka tirsan maleeshiyaadka Al-Shabaab oo la sheegay in ciidamadu mudo ku raad joogeen, kuwaas oo diyaarinayay weeraro is qarxin ah iyo gaadiid qaraxyo lagu rakibay.
Warsaxafadeed kasoo baxay Wasaaradda Gaashaandhigga Soomaaliya ayaa lagu sheegay in howlgalka lagu dilay 22 xubnood oo ka mid ah maleeshiyaadka Al-shabaab, islamarkaana lagu burburiyay dhamaan agabkii qaraxyada iyo gaadiidkii qaraxyada u siday. 
"Xogta la helay ayaa muujinaysa in kooxdaasi ay qorshaynayeen weerarro lagu waxyeelleeyo shacabka Soomaaliyeed iyo bartilmaameedyo amni, balse ciidamada Danab ayaa ka hortagay qorshahaas ka hor inta uusan fulin" ayaa lagu yiri qoraalka kasoo baxay Wasaaradda Gaashaandhigga Soomaaliya. 
Howlgalkan ayaa kusoo aadaya, iyadoo 72-kii saacadood ee lasoo dhaafay ciidanka xoogga dalka Soomaaliyeed howlgalo khasaarooyin kala duwan lagu gaarsiiyay Al-shabaab ay ka fuliyeen qeybo ka mid ah gobolada dalka.
Muqdisho 10ka Janaayo 2026 Dowladda India ayaa xaqiijisay sida ay uga go’an tahay dhowrista midnimada dhuleed ee Soomaaliya, iyadoo iska fogeysay dhaq-dhaqaaqyada sii kordhaya ee gobolka ee lagu aqoonsanayo Somaliland.
Intii lagu jiray war-saxaafadeed soo baxay Jimcihii maanta, afhayeenka Wasaaradda Arrimaha Dibadda ee Hindiya, Randhir Jaiswal, ayaa sheegay in New Delhi ay ixtiraamayso madaxbannaanida iyo midnimada dhuleed ee Soomaaliya.
“Hindiya waxay Soomaaliya la leedahay xiriir soo jireen ah. Waxaan mar walba adkeyneynaa muhiimadda ay leedahay in la ixtiraamo madaxbannaanida iyo midnimada dhuleed ee dalka,” ayuu Jaiswal u sheegay wariyeyaasha, isagoo ka jawaabayay su’aalo la xiriira maamul iskiis isu dhawaaqay.
Hadalkaas ayaa imaanaya xilli ay cirka isku sii shareerayaan xiisadaha diblomaasiyadeed ee Geeska Afrika, kaddib go’aankii Israa’iil ay dabayaaqadii sannadkii hore ku aqoonsatay Somaliland.
Soomaaliya, oo haatan haysa guddoomiyaha Golaha Ammaanka ee Qaramada Midoobay, ayaa ballanqaadday inay qaadi doonto dhammaan tallaabooyinka sharciyeed ee lagama maarmaanka ah si ay u difaacdo xuduudaheeda. 
Hindiya waxay la safatay inta badan beesha caalamka iyo mowqifka Midowga Afrika ee ah in aan la taaban karin xuduudaha la dejiyay xilligii gumeysiga ka dib.
Muqdisho 10ka Janaayo 2026 Safaaradda Jamhuuriyadda Shacabka Shiinaha ee Soomaaliya ayaa si rasmi ah u faahfaahisay sababta dib-u-dhaca ku yimid booqashadii la qorsheeyay ee Wasiirka Arrimaha Dibadda Shiinaha, Wang Yi, oo lagu waday inuu 9-ka Janaayo soo booqdo magaalada Muqdisho.
Afhayeen u hadlay safaaradda ayaa sheegay in go’aanka dib-u-dhigista booqashada uu ka dhashay isbeddel ku yimid jadwalka safarka Wasiirka Arrimaha Dibadda, kadib wadatashi saaxiibtinimo oo dhex maray wasaaradaha arrimaha dibadda ee Shiinaha iyo Soomaaliya. 
Waxa uu intaa ku daray in dowladda Shiinaha ay wax ka beddeshay jadwalka safarka Wang Yi, isla markaana labada dhinac ay hadda ka wada hadlayaan waqti cusub oo booqashada la qaban doono.
Safaaradda Shiinaha ayaa hoosta ka xariiqday in dib-u-dhigistaasi aysan wax saameyn ah ku yeelan doonin xiriirka u dhexeeya labada dal. 
Waxay carrabka ku adkaysay in Beijing ay muhiimad gaar ah siiso iskaashiga istaraatiijiyadeed ee ay la leedahay Soomaaliya, isla markaana ay si buuxda u taageerto dadaallada dowladda Soomaaliyeed ee lagu ilaalinayo madax-bannaanida, midnimada iyo wadajirka dhuleed ee dalka.
Sidoo kale Shiinaha ayaa muujiyay diyaar u ahaanshihiisa ah inuu sii xoojiyo iskaashiga dhinacyada kala duwan ee uu la leeyahay Soomaaliya, isagoo tilmaamay in xiriirka labada dal uu yahay mid waqti dheer ku dhisan oo ku saleysan ixtiraam iyo dan wadaag.
War-saxaafadeedkan ayaa yimid kadib markii warbaahinta qaar ay tabiyeen warar sheegaya in xaalad amni darteed uu wasiirka uga baaqsaday inuu yimaado Muqdisho, taasoo keentay in Safaaradda Shiinaha ay bixiso caddeyn rasmi ah.
Shaqsiga aaminsan Fadarada Federalka Xoolaha Soomaliya ciidamada shisheeye wardiye ka yihiin in midnimo Soomaaliyed ka shaqeynayan ama waa jaajuus ama waa badow jaahil ah https://t.co/Ne5g3635bb

Dambiyada Systamka Lagu Galo Laguma Asturi Karo Mas’uul La Beddelay

Maalmahan dambe waxa la arkayaa in komishineer-ku-xigeenka booliska deegaanka booskiisii laga beddelay, laguna eedeynayo wixii xadgudub ahaa ee ka dhacay hay’adda booliska. Arrintan waxa loo soo bandhigayaa si ay shacabka ugu muuqato in “tallaabo la qaaday” iyo in “cadaalad la helay”. Hase yeeshee, xaqiiqadu waa mid ka duwan sawirkaas la qurxiyay.

Dambiyada dhacay kuma baaba’ayaan qof la beddelay.
Waxa dhacay ma aha khalad shaqsi, ee waa dambi nidaamsan (systemic crime) oo ay si wadajir ah ugu lug lahaayeen systamka amarka bixinayay, fulinayay, kana faa’iidaysanayay.

Xaqiiqo Aan La Asturi Karin
Muddo dheer:
Shacab ayaa la cabburinayay
Dad ayaa lagu xidhayay xabsiyo qarsoon
Qaar ayaa ilaa maanta ku jira xabsiyo aan maxkamad lahayn
Jirdil joogto ah ayaa ka socday xabsiyada
Xuquuqdii aasaasiga ahayd waa la duudsiyay
Inta arrimahaas oo dhan dhacayeen:
Komishineerka Booliska Deegaanka wuu joogay
Madaxweynaha deegaankuna wuu joogay
Labaduba way oggaayeen, wayna ka aamuseen, isla markaana way taageerayeen dambiyadaas dhacayay.

Haddaba, sidee suurtagal u tahay in dhammaan dambiyadaas lagu soo koobo hal komishineer-ku-xigeen oo booskiisii laga beddelay?

Theory-ga Marin-habaabinta: Halkee Laga Keenay?
Cilmiga siyaasadda iyo cilmiga bulshada waxa arrintan looga yaqaannaa dhowr aragtiyood oo caan ah:
1. Scapegoating Theory (Aragtida Eedeynta Qofka Keliya)
Tani waa marka dawladdu:
Qof keliya dusha ka saarto dambi ay wada galeen hay’ad ama nidaam
Qofkaas loo adeegsado “allabari siyaasadeed” si cadhada dadweynaha loo dejiyo

2. Systemic Responsibility Theory (Mas’uuliyadda Nidaamka)
Aragtidani waxay qabtaa in:
Dambiyada ka dhaca hay’ad dawli ah ay ka yimaadaan amarro sare iyo nidaam shaqaynaya
Mas’uuliyadda ugu weyn ay saaran tahay hoggaanka sare, ee aanay ku koobnayn shaqsi hoose.

3. Political Damage Control (Xakamaynta Khasaaraha Siyaasadeed)
Waa xeelad dawladuhu adeegsadaan marka:
Xadgudub bannaanka yimaado
Ay qaadaan tallaabo muuqaal ah (xil-ka-qaadis ama boos-beddel)
Iyaga oo aan waxba ka beddelin nidaamka dhibka dhalinaya.
Saddexdan aragti waxay isku raacsan yihiin hal qodob:
Marka dambigu yahay mid nidaamsan, xal shaqsiyeed ma noqon karo caddaalad.

Mas’uuliyadda Dhabta Ah Halkee Ayay Saaran Tahay?
Mas’uuliyadda wixii ka dhacay hay’adda booliska:
Waxay si toos ah u saaran tahay Madaxweynaha deegaanka maadaama uu isagu magacaabo komishineerka boliska.
Waxay kaloo saaran tahay Komishineerka Booliska
Waxay saaran tahay systamka ay wada hoggaaminayaan.

Komishineer-ku-xigeen booskiisii la beddelay:
👉  Ma bixin jirin amarka ugu dambeeya
👉  Ma lahayn awoodda siyaasadeed ee go’aamada waaweyn
👉  Kaligiis ma abuuri karin xabsiyo qarsoon iyo jirdil nidaamsan
Sidaas darteed, in isaga lagu eedeeyo ama boos loo beddelo kama dhigna in dambigii dhammaaday.
Waxa kaliya oo dhacay waa:
In wajigii la beddelay, halka systamkiina uu siduu ahaa u sii shaqaynayo.

Shacabka waa in ay si cad u gartaan:
In magac la beddelay uusan la mid ahayn cadaalad la helay
In xil-ka-qaadis aysan la mid ahayn la-xisaabtan dhab ah
In boos-beddel uusan joojinayn jirdilka iyo xadgudubyada socda Haddii:
Madaxweynihii Magacabay weli joogo
Komishineerkii Booliska weli joogo
Xabsiyadii qarsoonaa weli shaqaynayaan
Markaas cadaalad lama helin, ee waxaa la sameeyay marin-habaabinta siyaasadeed.

Ugu dambayn: Dambi Nidaamsan waa in loo helaa  Xal Nidaamsan.
Dambiyada ay dawladdu shacabkeeda ka gashay:
Laguma cafin karo qof la beddelay
Laguma asturi karo eed qof keliya

Caddaalad dhab ah waxay imanaysaa oo keliya marka:
Mas’uuliyiinta sare lala xisaabtamo
Nidaamka dulmiga dhalinaya la burburiyo
Maxaabiista sharci-darrada ku xidhan la sii daayo
Xuquuqda shacabka dib loogu soo celiyo
Ilaa inta intaas la helayo, boos-beddel komishineer-ku-xigeen ma noqon karo caddaalad, waana waajib in shacabka aan indhahooda laga jeedin xaqiiqda ah in dhibku ka socdo madaxtooyada iyo hoggaanka sare ee booliska, ee aan lagu mashquulin qof la beddelay.

Iyadoo lagu jiro dadaallada lagu xoojinayo amaanka iyo xasiloonida, waxaa dhowaan la arkay in booliska ay qaateen tallaabooyin nidaamin ah, oo ay ka mid tahay in dadka kiraysta baabuurta laga weydiiyo ujeedada isticmaalka, ha ahaato mid shakhsi, bulsho, ama dalxiis. In kasta oo tallaabooyinkan ay muhiim u yihiin dhinaca nidaamka, haddana ma ahan xal waara ama istiraatiiji ah oo dabooli kara baahida loo qabo amaan gudaha oo waara.

Khibradda siyaasadeed iyo amni waxay cadeyneysaa in Aqoonsiga Qaranka ee la aamini karo uu yahay tiirka ugu muhiimsan ee dhismaha dawlad casri ah, xoojinta sharciga, iyo awoodsiinta hay’adaha amniga si ay si hufan u gutaan waajibaadkooda. Si kastaba ha noqotee, aqoonsiyada hadda jira waa kuwo duug ah, badankoodna laga soo saaray in ka badan 10 sano, taasoo keentay dhibaatooyin la xiriira saxnaanta xogta, fudeydka khiyaanada, iyo adkaanta lagu xaqiijiyo aqoonsiga shakhsiyaadka.

Marka laga duulayo arrintaas, hirgelinta mashruuc qaran oo dhameystiran oo lagu casriyeynayo nidaamka aqoonsiga ma aha oo kaliya arrin maamul, balse waa baahi siyaasadeed iyo amni oo degdeg ah, gaar ahaan iyadoo la isu diyaarinayo doorashooyinka soo socda iyo dadaalka Jamhuuriyadda Somaliland ay ku doonayso inay ku adkeyso inay tahay dawlad xasiloon oo u hoggaansan shuruucda dawladnimo ee casriga ah.

 • Taageeridda shaqada booliska iyo hay’adaha amniga
 • Yareynta khiyaanada iyo ku dayashada aqoonsiyada

Taariikhda Patrice Émery Lumumba

Patrice Lumumba – Halgan, Qaranimo iyo Dhalashada Hoggaamiye Run Sheega

Patrice Émery Lumumba wuxuu ku dhashay Congo xilli dalkiisu ahaa hanti gumeysi oo ay si adag u maamuli jireen Beljim. Carruurnimadiisii iyo dhalinyaranimadiisii wuxuu ku barbaaray jawi ay caddaalad-darro, takoor iyo bahdil joogto ah ka jireen. Inkastoo gumeysigii Beljim uu ku faani jiray “ilbaxin”, Lumumba wuxuu indhihiisa ku arkay sida dadkiisa loogu khasbay shaqo adag, loogu ciqaabi jiray hadal ama diidmo yar, looguna diiday xuquuqda aasaasiga ah ee bini’aadamka.
Waxbarashadiisa iyo aqoontiisa ayaa ka dhigtay nin ka duwan inta badan hoggaamiyeyaashii xilligaas. Wuxuu noqday qof si qoto dheer u fahmay in dhibaatada Congo aysan ahayn mid qabiil ama gobol ku kooban, balse ay ahayd dhibaato qaran oo ka dhalatay gumaysi. Sidaas darteed ayuu u diiday kala-qaybsanaanta, wuxuuna rumaysnaa in Congo mideysan oo madax-bannaan ay tahay furaha xorriyadda dhabta ah.
Sanadihii u dambeeyay ee gumeysiga, Lumumba wuxuu noqday codka shacabka. Wuxuu hadal cad ku sheegay in xornimada aan la baryi karin, balse la kasbado. Hadalkiisa iyo fikirkiisa ayaa ka dhigtay hoggaamiye si degdeg ah caan u noqday, isla markaana cabsi ku abuuray gumaystihii Beljim. Markii ugu dambeysay ee Congo xornimada qaadatay 30-kii Juun 1960, Patrice Lumumba waxaa loo doortay Ra’iisul Wasaarihii ugu horreeyay ee dalka, isagoo matalaya rajo cusub oo shacabka dhexdiisa ka dhalatay.

Khudbaddii Xornimada – Runtii Gumaysiga iyo Hadalkii Ka Caraysiiyay Boqorka Beljim

Maalintii xornimada Congo, dunidu waxay sugaysay hadal qurxin iyo mahadnaq ah. Boqorka Beljim wuxuu jeediyay khudbad uu gumaysiga ugu sawiray mid wanaag iyo horumar keenay. Laakiin Patrice Lumumba wuu diiday in xornimada lagu furo been. Isagoo aan qorshaha ku jirin ayuu istaagay, wuxuuna jeediyay khudbad beddeshay taariikhda Afrika.
Lumumba wuxuu si cad uga sheekeeyay wixii gumaysigu ku sameeyay shacabka Congo. Wuxuu xusay in xukunkii Beljim uusan ahayn naxariis, balse uu ahaa dulmi joogto ah oo dadka lagu garaacay, lagu shaqaysiiyay si qasab ah, laguna xukumay sharci aan iyaga u adeegayn. Hadalkiisa wuxuu ahaa mid xusuusinaya in xornimada la joogo aysan ahayn wax hadiyad ahaan loo bixiyay, balse ay tahay natiijo halgan dheer oo ay dadku u soo mareen silic, xabsi iyo dhimasho.
Markii uu ka hadlay xornimada, Lumumba ma uusan u hadlin si hoos u eegis ah. Wuxuu ku hadlay kalsooni iyo sharaf, isagoo caddeeyay in Congo hadda ka dib ay iyadu masiirkeeda maamulanayso, isla markaana aysan aqbali doonin gumaysi kale oo magac cusub wata. Hadalkaasi wuxuu si toos ah uga hor yimid wixii Boqorka Beljim rabay in la maqlo, wuxuuna noqday sababtii ay khudbaddaas uga caroodaan quwadihii gumaysiga.
Khudbaddii Patrice Lumumba ma ahayn hadal caro ku saleysan, balse waxay ahayd hadal run ku dhisan. Runtii gumaysiga ayaa la sheegay, sharafkana waa la difaacay. Taasi waa sababta hadalkaas uusan u ahayn mid Congo keliya quseeya, balse uu noqday cod Afrika oo dhan. Lumumba wuxuu doortay in uu runta sheego, xitaa haddii ay ka careysiiso boqor, gumayste, ama quwad shisheeye, waayo wuxuu rumaysnaa in xornimo aan run lagu dhisin aysan ahayn xornimo dhab ah

Opinion Statement: Puntland Has Reached Its Breaking Point — A Majority View

This is the reality many Puntlanders express openly today: our patience is finished, our sacrifices have been exploited, and our future cannot be tied to a federal system that has failed us for more than two decades.

Puntland built Somalia’s federal system. Puntland defended it. Puntland paid for it in blood and resources.
And for twenty years, the south has responded with nothing but obstruction, sabotage, and a relentless campaign to weaken Puntland’s autonomy.

This is not frustration anymore — it is a collective awakening.

1. Puntland Carried Somalia — The South Dragged It Down

Across Puntland, people say the same thing:

“We built the federal system — they destroyed it.”

“We stabilized Somalia — they undermined us.”

“We sacrificed our sons — they repaid us with hostility.”

Puntland created the federal model to prevent dictatorship and ensure fair power‑sharing.
But the south has spent twenty years trying to reverse it, centralize power, and erase Puntland’s influence.

The majority view is blunt:
The south has never accepted federalism and never will.

2. Puntland Will Not Be a Launchpad for Federal Ambitions

A sharper sentiment is rising across Puntland:

“No more presidents who use Puntland as a stepping stone to Muqdisho.”

People are tired of leaders who:

leave Puntland behind for federal campaigns

chase positions in a system that doesn’t work

ignore Puntland’s suffering while seeking national power

The public expectation is clear and forceful:

Puntland’s president must stay focused on Puntland — not on federal elections.
The people demand leadership rooted in Puntland’s survival, not in political fantasies about fixing a system that refuses to be fixed.

3. Puntland Cannot Keep Reliving the Same Nightmare

For two decades, Puntland has repeated the same cycle:

Build Somalia

Support Somalia

Stabilize Somalia

Get betrayed by Somalia

People across Puntland say openly:

“We cannot keep dying for a system that collapses every year.”

“We cannot keep waiting for a federal government that works against us.”

“We cannot keep pretending the south is ready for federalism.”

The majority opinion is now crystal clear:
There is no future in waiting for Muqdisho.

4. Puntland Must Take Bold, Unapologetic Action

The public mood has shifted from frustration to determination. Many Puntlanders believe that Puntland must now:

assert its constitutional rights under Article 4.3

protect its security partnerships, especially with the UAE

defend its institutions from federal interference

prioritize Puntland’s interests above all else

take decisive steps to secure its future

This is not aggression — it is self‑defense.

The majority view is sharp and unwavering:
“Puntland must act now, before more damage is done.”

5. Puntland’s Destiny Cannot Be Decided in Muqdisho

Across Puntland, people say:

“Muqdisho cannot dictate our future.”

“We have waited long enough.”

“Puntland must stand on its own feet.”

The belief is growing that Puntland must chart its own path — one that protects its people, its security, and its future without depending on a federal system that has repeatedly failed.

Conclusion: Puntland’s Era of Sacrifice Is Over

This opinion reflects what many Puntlanders feel today:

Puntland has sacrificed enough

Puntland has waited enough

Puntland has been undermined enough

Now, Puntland must take bold, historic, and irreversible action to safeguard its people and secure its future.

The majority view is unmistakable:
Puntland first — now, tomorrow, and always.

𝐷ℎ𝑎𝑛𝑎𝑎𝑛 𝑀𝑒𝑑𝑖𝑎/Kismayo

Jubbaland President Ahmed Mohamed Islam (Ahmed Madoobe) has warned that Somalia’s statehood is moving along a dangerous and uncertain path, accusing the Federal Government of Somalia (FGS) leadership of undermining the national system and centralizing power in Mogadishu.

Speaking at the opening of the Jubbaland Parliament’s new session, President Ahmed Madoobe said that Somalia’s governance has effectively become confined to Mogadishu, arguing that federalism is being eroded by the current leadership of the FGS.

Somaliland Issue and Emerging Risks

Addressing the Somaliland question, the Jubbaland president stated that Somaliland has the right to seek justice for its grievances. However, he argued that Somaliland chose to pursue solutions “far away,” while closer and more realistic options existed within Somalia. He warned that the direction Somalia is taking could give rise to new and more serious risks.

Warning of Regional Self-Reliance

Ahmed Madoobe further cautioned that if President Hassan Sheikh Mohamud is not restrained politically, Puntland and Jubbaland could be forced to pursue an independent course of self-reliance. He noted that such a path could go even beyond the current discussions surrounding Somaliland, signaling a deeper fragmentation of the country.

Drone Attack Allegation

The Jubbaland leader also raised serious allegations regarding a drone attack. He said that while discussions had previously focused on a plane landing in Hargeisa, Jubbaland had instead witnessed a drone—provided to Somalia by the international community—being used to attack Jubbaland forces in Ras Kamboni. According to him, this incident reflects what he described as irresponsibility by the leadership of the Federal Government.

Ports and Airspace Dispute

On recent federal decisions affecting ports, Ahmed Madoobe said such measures cannot change the reality on the ground. He accused the FGS of failing to properly manage Somalia’s airspace and claimed that attempts to control or interfere with ports are unrealistic and unworkable.

Election Timeline Warning

Finally, the Jubbaland president issued a political ultimatum, stating that if President Hassan Sheikh Mohamud does not respond within 20 days, Jubbaland will proceed with initiating its own electoral process. He emphasized that the election will not take place on May 15 as previously anticipated, but will instead be held earlier.

His remarks underscore escalating tensions between Jubbaland and the Federal Government, raising renewed concerns about Somalia’s political stability and the future of its federal system.

PUNTLAND: isbadbaadintu maaha kala goyn,
Muddo ka badan 30 sano, Soomaaliya waxay ku jirtay burbur, khilaaf siyaasadeed, faragelin shisheeye iyo fashil dawladnimo. Ballan-qaadkii Federaalka wuxuu noqday mid magac uun ah, halka dastuurkii kumeelgaarka ahaa ee heshiiska lagu ahaa si sharci daro ah loo burburiyay iyo midnimadii lagu heshiiyay si joogto ah loo jebiyay.
Puntland waxay ku dhalatay badbaadinta shacabka iyo ilaalinta midnimo Soomaaliyeed oo caddaalad ku dhisan. Laakiin maanta xaqiiqadu waa mid ka duwan riyooyinkii hore: qaranimadii wadajirka ahayd ma shaqaynayso, hay’adihii qarankuna waa kuwo ku fashilmay inay matalaan dhammaan Bulshada Soomaaliyeed.
Marka qaran fashilmo, sharciga caalamiga ahi wuxuu aqoonsan yahay mabda’a State Succession (Isbadbaadin Bulsho)  si bulsho ama maamul u badbaadsado jiritaankiisa, amnigiisa iyo mustaqbalkiisa.
Puntland sharci ahaan waxay xaq u yeelan kartaa inay waddadan qaado haddii:
Dowladda Federaalka si rasmi ah u fashilantay.
Dastuurka federaalka si joogto ah loo jebiyay, qaybsigii Deeqaha Caalamigaaba la siyaasadeeywy oo loo adeegsaday in lagu burburiyo Maamuladii Amaanka ahaa.
Xuquuqda siyaasadeed, dhaqaale iyo amni ee shacabka Puntland si nidaamsan loo duudsiyo.
Puntland waxay buuxisay shuruudaha dawladnimo Madax Banaan:
– dhul cad
– dad joogto ah
– maamul shaqaynaya
– ciidan iyo hay’ado amni
– iyo awood ay isku maamusho (kuwaas oo ay maanta haysato).
In si sharci ah loola macaamilo beesha caalamka.
Is-badbaadin ma aha khiyaano qaranimo, mana aha kala-qaybin jacayl loo qabo. Waa mas’uuliyad siyaasadeed iyo mid sharci marka midnimo dhab ah la waayo.
Midnimo ku dhisan Cay, Hanjabaad iyo cadaalad-darro, burburin iyo been ma dhisi karto dal.
Qaranimo dhabta ahi waxay ku dhalataa oggolaansho, sinaan iyo kalsooni — ma aha amar ku taaglayn iyo ku danatsi Awoodii Dowladnimo.
Puntland waxay mudnaan siinaysaa:
badbaadada shacabka
xasilloonida dhulka
maamul hufan
iyo mustaqbal la hubo
Haddii midnimo dhab ah timaaddo  waa la soo dhaweynayaa.
Haddii ay sii ahaato mid fashilan shacab walba wuxuu xaq u leeyahay inuu badbaadiyo naftiisa iyo mustaqbalkiisa.
Puntland waxay dooranaysaa sharci, xaq iyo mas’uuliyad, waana inay ku dhaqaaqdaa tilaabadaas.

Waxa kale oo jirta asbaabo sharci oo aan is leeyahay Somaliland xaq iyo gar bay ku taagan tahay in ay ahaato qaran dunida laga aqoonsan yahay. 

kolkuu socday hanaankii midawga labada dhinac ee Somaliland iyo Somalia ee la rabay in xeerarkii iyo habraacyadii midawga labada dhinac la dhamaystiro, waxaa gaabis badheedh ahi ka yimid xagga Somalia/Koonfur oo ka cararaysay in xagga saamiga iyo wax qaybsiga si siman oo laba dawladood ah loo qaybsado.
