Aragtida Maslow ee Kala Sarreynta Baahiyaha (Maslow’s Hierarchy of Needs) waxay sheegaysaa in baahiyaha aadanaha loo habeeyey shan heer, laga bilaabo baahiyaha aasaasiga ah (physiological needs) ilaa baahiyaha is-dhammaystirka nafta (self-actualization). Qofku waxa uu dhiirrigelin ka helaa in uu marka hore daboolo baahiyaha heerka hoose ka hor inta uusan u gudbin baahiyaha heerka sare. Aragtidani waxay ka caawisaa maamulayaasha in ay fahmaan dhiirrigelinta iyo dabeecadda aadanaha.

Shirkadda Sagaljet oo sannadkiiba mar warbaahinta ku qabata Employee of the Year Award, waxa ay inta badan ku sheegtaa in ay shaqaalaha abaalmarinayso, hase yeeshee micno badan uma laha shaqaalaha. Maamulka se waxa laga yaabaa in ay ka dhex arkaan fursad suuq-geyn ah. Shaqaale aan haysan baahiyihii aasaasiga ahaa, mushaharka uu qaataana xaddidan yahay, duruufaha uu ku shaqeeyaana qallafsan yihiin—in la yidhaahdo waxa lagu abaalmarinayaa heerka afraad ee Maslow (aqoonsiga/esteem), isaga oo ka madhan heerarkii ka horreeyay, waa dhalanteed.

Haddii shirkaddu ka dhab tahay in ay shaqaalaha abaalmariso, waa in ay ku abaalmarisaa waxyaabaha aasaasiga ah, sida mushahar u qalma shaqaalaha, taageero dhinaca guriyeynta ah, fursado waxbarasho, iyo tababbarro xirfadeed. In shaqaale habeen hudheel lagu marti-qaado, suudhadhna la soo gashado, iyada oo la og yahay in iibsiga suudhkaasi laftiisu culays ku yahay mushahar-yaraanta jirta darteed, wax macno ah uma kordhinayso shaqaalaha, mana yarayso culayskooda nololeed.

Maalmihii ugu dambeeyay ee noloshii Nebiga (SCW), markuu xanuunka ku sii adkaaday, Madiina waxaa hareeyay murugo iyo walwal xoogan.

Hase yeeshee, xilli ay xaaladdu sidaas u adkayd, waxaa soo baxay go'aan muujinaya aragtida dheer ee Nebiga iyo mustaqbalka fog ee Islaamka.. Rasuulku (SCW) wuxuu amray in la diyaariyo ciidan aada dhanka waqooyi, ee dhulka Shaam..

si loo edbiyo qabiilada Qudaaca ee xulafada la ahaa Boqortooyada Ruum, kuwaas oo ahaa quwad wayn oo dhabarka ka taagnayd cadowga, waana dhulkii ay horay uga dhacday dagaalkii Mu'tah ee ay ku shahiideen geesiyaashii Zayd, Jacfar iyo Cabdullaahi Binu Rawaaxa.

​Xikmad dheer darteed, Nebigu (SCW) wuxuu hogaanka ciidankaas culus u dhiibay wiil dhalinyaro ah oo la yiraahdo Usaama Binu Zayd (RC). Maadaama Usaama uu aad u da' yaraa oo 18 sano jir ahaa, dadka qaar ayaa la yaabay..

Waxay is waydiiyeen sida wiil yar uu u hogaaminayo ciidan ay ku jiraan odayaashii waaweynaa ee Muhaajiriinta iyo Ansaarta. kuwaas oo ka soo qayb galay Badar iyo Uxud. Markuu warkaas gaaray Nebiga (SCW), dadkii ayuu la hadlay isagoo xanuunsanaya wuxuuna yiri: 

"Haddii aad dhaliishaan hogaankiisa, waxaad horay u dhaliisheen hogaankii aabihiis. Wallaahi inuu u qalmo hogaanka." 

Hadalkaas wuxuu noqday cashar taariikhi ah oo lagu cadeeyay in hogaanku yahay karti iyo aqoon, ee uusan ahayn da' ama darajo qabiil.

​Ciidankii wuxuu u baxay duleedka Madiina, waxayna dageen deegaanka Al-Jurf si ay u sugaan amarka bixitaanka. 

Laakiin nasiib xumo waxaa dhacday masiibadii ugu waynayd ee soo marta dunida oo ahayd Geeridii Xabiibka Alle (SCW). Madiina way ruxantay, dadkiina way argagaxeen naxdin darteed, ilaa uu ka istaagay Abu Bakar Al-Siddiq (RC), wuxuuna dadka ku dajiyay khudbad xikmad leh iyo aayaddan Quraanka ah:

{وَمَا مُحَمَّدٌ إِلَّا رَسُولٌ قَدْ خَلَتْ مِن قَبْلِهِ الرُّسُلُ}
(Muxammad ma aha waxaan Rasuul ahayn, ay geeriyoodeen hortiisba Rasuullo).

​Geeridii kadib xaaladdu aad bay u qasantay. Jasiiradda Carabta waxaa ka bilowday fowdo, qabiilooyin badan ayaa diinta ka laabtay, Munaafiqiinta iyo Ruum-na waxay sugayeen in Islaamku burburo. 

Sidaas darteed, Saxaabada qaar ayaa u soo jeediyay Khaliifada cusub, Abu Bakar, in la hakiyo ciidanka Usaama si loo ilaaliyo Madiina. Ma ahayn kaliya safar ciidan, ee waxay ahayd imtixaan adag oo lagu tijaabinayay thabaatka Dawladda islaamka. 

Abu Bakar (RC) wuxuu qaatay go'aan geesinimo leh oo muujinaya iimaan adag, wuxuuna yiri: 

"Wallaahi furi maayo calan uu xiray Rasuulka Alle (SCW)." Wuxuuna diiday inuu badalo amarkii Nebiga xitaa haddii khatartu badato.

​Kadibna wuxuu sagootiyay ciidanka isagoo lugaynaya, halka Usaama uu saarnaa faraska. Markii Usaama yiri: "Ama soo kor ama waan soo dagayaa", Abu Bakar wuxuu ugu jawaabay si tawaaduc leh: 

"Soo dagi maysid, aniguna soo kori maayo". Intaas kuma uusan ekaanin ee wuxuu ciidanka siiyay dardaaran cajiib ah oo muujinaya akhlaaqda Islaamka, isagoo yiri:

"Ha khiyaanina, ha dilina caruurta & haweenka iyo waayeelka, ha jarina geedaha miraha leh, hana gubina guryaha."

Go’aanka Dowladda Federaalka ee Ciidamada Puntland & Jubaland: Ma saxbaa mise waa la degdegay?

Wakhtigan waa mid xasaasi ah. Qof kasta oo yiraahda “waan go’ay” ama “waan diidanahay wadajir” lama siin karo fursad ay quwado shisheeye ama dalal daris ahi uga faa’iideystaan kala-qaybsanaanta Soomaaliya.
Fariintaydu waxay ku socotaa madaxda dowladda iyo Puntland & Jubaland labadaba:

 midnimada dalka waa in mudnaan la siiyaa, caasimaddana cabsi aan jirin laguma abuuri karo. Khilaaf siyaasadeed waa jiri karaa, balse amniga qaranku waa inuu mar walba ka sarreeyaa dano gaar ah.

FG: Itoobiya iyo Kenya, Abiy Ahmed iyo Ruto amniga dalkooda waxaa suga Ciidanka Xoogga Dalka.

 Haddaba sidee maamul hoos yimaada dowladda dhexe loogu aamini karaa ciidan hub culus wata oo si madax-bannaan u gala caasimadda?

Xaqiiqda waa tan: waxaa jira quwado shisheeye oo diyaar u ah inay dhaqaale ku taageeraan cid kasta oo carqaladeysa wadajirka Soomaaliyeed, si mar kale waddanka loogu furo dariiq gumeysi. Taasi waa halis dhab ah.

Dhanka kale, kuwa maanta xukunka haya waxaan leeyahay: tallaabo kasta miisaama saameynteeda qaran. Dadku way ka daaleen musuq, boob, iyo siyaasad aan wax dhisin. Haddii caqligu shaqayn waayo, dhaawaca dalka qarniyo ayuu qaadan karaa inuu bogsado.

Arrinta hubka
Xoguhu waxay sheegayaan in ciidamada Puntland & Jubaland ay wateen:
• 172 askari
• 9 Baasuuke
• 30 BKM
• 100 AK-47
• 33 bastoolado
• rasaas tiro aad u badan
Tani waa hub xad-dhaaf ah marka laga hadlayo gelitaanka caasimadda.

Su’aalaha muhiimka ah waa:
• Ma la aamini karaa in ciidan hub sidan u culus wata si xor ah Muqdisho u galo?
• Yaa qaadaya mas’uuliyadda haddii wax dhacaan?
Haybadda dowladnimo iyo amniga caasimad lama ciyaaro.

Xaqiiqda 
Go’aanka lagu yidhi “Muqdisho hubkan laguma soo gelayo” wuxuu ku salaysnaa sugidda amniga shacabka. Waa la dhaliili karaa habkii loo wajahay, balse mabda’a ah in hub culus si aan nidaam lahayn loo gelin caasimad waa mabda’ dowladnimo.

Waxaa loo baahan yahay:
• wada hadal iyo tanaazul Soomaaliyeed
• is-qancin iyo walaaltinimo
• in dan qaran laga hormariyo dano gaar ah
Soomaaliya ma qaadi karto dagaal siyaasadeed cusub ama fursad uu cadawgu ka faa’iideysto.
Haddii aad rabto, waan kuu diyaarin karaa:

Seeing the video of Robert Sanchez telling the Chelsea fans to relax as it was only half time, made me want to talk about something that has been on my mind for a while: why football stadiums are becoming more impatient, more toxic and polarised.

The pandemic changed our routines and it accelerated a transformation that was already happening in society: overnight, our lives moved onto screens. We watched sport through devices, we debated online, we consumed information in fragments and, importantly for this point, we lived inside a constant stream of opinions.

And with that, something else grew stronger: extremisation.

We have become less able to accept what doesn’t match our own perception. The world has turned into a place where difference is a threat and disagreement feels personal. 

Even when those opinions are built on incomplete information, we treat them as unquestionable truths. The most important voice is no longer the most informed one, but the loudest one, the strongest in the moment.

And football, as always, reflects society.

In stadiums now, we increasingly see impatience that would have been unthinkable years ago. Fans protesting a team even before half-time. Whistling after one mistake, even teams that are top of the table. Demanding changes immediately, as if football were a video game and not a complex sport shaped by confidence, form (both appearing in waves during a campaign), injuries, personalities, the limits of a squad or the finances.

We forget that coaches work every day with these players. That they know the realities behind the scenes. That progress is not always instant. But patience has become rare, because the modern world trains us to expect immediate solutions.

What’s worse is that creating a toxic atmosphere no longer feels like a problem for many supporters. The priority becomes: “I want what I want, and I want it now.” Even if it damages the team. Even if it poisons the environment. Even if it turns the stadium into a place of tension instead of support. I cannot think of anything worse than your own fans chanting, “you are going to be sacked in the morning.”

This phenomenon is particularly noticeable in England right now, where protests and frustration inside grounds are becoming more common. Perhaps it is less frequent in Spain, where there is still — sometimes — a different relationship with suffering, with time, with process, with football clubs and the role of fans. At Real Madrid, the whistling to the team lasted a game and it was a protest against the sacking of Xabi Alonso, or a message to the players. The following game, they had moved on. I feel that is legitimate. But the trend is spreading. 

The truth is hardly any club lives in happiness anymore. And I feel it is not because football has changed dramatically, but surely because society has.

The modern fan experience is shaped by constant noise, constant judgement, constant outrage. And football, which used to be an escape, has become another space where people project frustration and impatience.

It’s not really about the manager. Or the player. Or even the result. What we are hearing is basically about the world we have become. Although I do feel there is another way. 

I know none of this is new. But how about if we thought we might not be right. Someone else might be. Or changing an opinion. Or listening a bit more. Or considering we might not know everything. And respect our differences.

Mustaqbalka Somaliland wuxuu ku xidhan yahay, sida aan u xaqiijinno cadaalad, wadaag, iyo matalaad loo siman yahay. 

Dastuurku wuxuu dammaanad qaadayaa in dhammaan muwaadiniintu helaan xuquuq iyo fursado isku mid ah. Wada-hadal furan ayaa ah jidka kaliya ee lagu gaadhi karo horumar waara, midnimo iyo Qaran ku taagan jirido adag.

Sidaa awgeed, gobollada galbeedka Somaliland,  marna ma dalbanayaan wax ka baxsan Dastuurka Somaliland, balse waxa ay si buuxda oo dhammeystiran u dalbanayaan wax u dhigma xuquuqdoodii, karaamadoodii, iyo kaalintoodii ay wadar ahaan qarankan ku lahaayeen, taasi oo ah xaq caddaaladeed iyo sinnaan ummadeed oo mudan in laga wada hadlo oo wax garadka iyo  dawladdu tixgalin weyn siiyaan.

Maxaa yeelay, gobollada galbeedku waa tiir ka mid ah tiirarka ay Somaliland ku taagan tahay, oo isku haya dhulka, dadka, iyo taariikhda, waxaynna jiritaanka dalkan ku soo bixiyeen naf-hurnimo aan la inkiri karin. Haddana, muddo dheer waxa jiray dareenno ah in matalaadda hoggaamin siyaasadeed, fursadaha awood-wadaagga dawladda, iyo go’aan-qaadashada qaranka aanay u dhigmin tacabkii dal-dhisnimo, iyo waxtarka ay ku bixiyeen hirgalintii dhismaha Qaranka. 

Tani ma aha arrin la iska indha tiri karo, mana aha cabasho la dib dhigi karo. Waa marxalad go’aan ah oo daawadeedu maanta taagan tahay, waana qodob aan sinaba u aqbalayn dib u dhac berrito ah.

Haddaba, dastuurka JSL waxa uu si cad u dammaanad qaadayaa sinnaanta muwaaddiniinta reer Somaliland, caddaalad qaanuun ku qotonta iyo ka-qaybgal siyaasadeed oo loo wada siman yahay talada dalka. Balse, haddii dastuurka JSL la wada tixgelin waayo oo ummadda deggan ama ku dhaqan gobollada galbeedka Somaliland loo arko duul dheregsan oo dheeraad dalbanaya, halkii loo arki lahaa gobollo dalbanaya wax ay xaq u leeyihiin oo ay mutaysteen.  

Haddiise ay caddaaladdu noqoto tu cid gaar ah siisa mudnaan gaar ah iyo lahaansho gaar ah, waxa hubaal ah in qarannimadii la wada lahaa ay dhaawacmayso, se haddii ay caddaaladdu wada gaadho dhammaan muwaaddiniinta Somaliland, waxa dhab ah in qaranku yeelanayo Midnimo iyo awood xooggan oo waafi ah oo iskaga dufaaco cidkasta oo isku dayda inay fara galiso.

Ugu danbayntii, waxa xilligan loo baahan yahay in la abuuro wada hadal furan oo ka  turjumaya xaqiiqda dhabta ah ee hadda ka taagan gobollada galbeedka Somaliland. Tani waa jidka kaliya ee lagu gaadhi karo midnimo, walaalnimo waarta iyo kalsooni qaran. 

Hubaalna waxa ah, Qaran ku taagan jirid adag ayaa codkiisa dunidu dhegeysan kartaa, waxa keliya ee lagu gaadhi karaana waa helidda caddaalad sugan iyo sinnaansho ummadeed oo hoggaaminta sare ee dalku hadda hirgaliso.

Sidaa darteed, maanta Reer Awdal, waxa ay codsanayaan in ay helaan cadaalad iyo matalaad u dhiganta tacabkooda.

Xaraarada Dadka Awdal halka ay maraysaana  maaha mid u dulqaadan karta dib u dhac berrito ah, oo luminaya mustaqbalkeenna fog,
Maxaa yeelay; marxaladdan dawadeedu dib u dhac ma leh, cawaaqibkeeduna waa mid taabanaya jiritaanka iyo midnimada shacabka Somaliland..

Kursiga Soomaaliya ee Qaramada Midoobay ayaa lagala noqon doonaa Qaraarka 2758, kaas oo lagu aasaasay dukumenti kaydsan oo ku taariikhaysan 26 Juun 1960, maalintii Somaliland ay xornimada ka qaadatay Maxmiyadda Ingiriiska.
Xaaladdan waxay la mid noqon doontaa kiiska Taiwan iyo Shiinaha ee Qaraarka 2758, kaas oo horseeday in Jamhuuriyadda Shiinaha (Taiwan) laga saaro Qaramada Midoobay oo lagu beddelo Jamhuuriyadda Dadka ee Shiinaha (PRC).
Oktoobar 25, 1971, Golaha Guud ee Qaramada Midoobay ayaa ansixiyay qaraarkan.
Dhibaatadu maaha aqoonsiga Somaliland; dhibaatada dhabta ah waa fashilka dawladda Soomaaliya.
Isku dayga Muqdisho ee ah in Somaliland lagu tilmaamo mashruuc gooni-u-goos ah ayaa iska indha tiraya xaqiiqada dhabta ah ee dhulka taal wuxuuna si khaldan u marin habaabinayaa diiwaanka taariikhiga ah.

Warbaahinta dowladda ayaa ku warantay, in Shiinaha uu dil ku fuliyay afar xubnood oo ka tirsan mafiyada qoyska Bai, oo ah mid ka mid ah boqortooyooyinka caanka ah ee maamulayay xarumo been abuur ah oo ku yaal Myanmar.

Waxay ka mid ahaayeen 21 xubnood oo qoyska ka tirsan iyo la-hawlgalayaal oo maxkamad ku taal gobolka Guangdong ay ku heshay dambiyo khiyaano, dil, dhaawac iyo dambiyo kale.

Bishii Nofeembar ee la soo dhaafay, maxkamaddu waxay shan ka mid ah ku xukuntay dil, oo uu ku jiro madaxa qabiilka Bai Suocheng, kaasoo u dhintay xanuun ka dib markii xukunkiisa la riday, sida ay werisay warbaahinta dawladdu.

Toddobaadkii hore, Shiinaha wuxuu dilay 11 xubnood oo ka tirsan mafiyada qoysla Ming, taasoo qayb ka ah howlgallada khiyaanada ah ee Koonfur Bari Aasiya oo lagu qabtay kumanaan dhibanayaal Shiinees ah.

Sannado badan, Bais, Mings iyo dhowr qoys oo kale ayaa maamulayay magaalada xuduudda Myanmar ee Laukkaing.

Maxkamaddu waxay sheegtay in falalka dambiyeed ee qoyska Bai ay horseedeen dhimashada lix muwaadin oo Shiinees ah, isdil hal qof iyo dhaawacyo badan.

Reer Bays waxay xukunka ka qabsadeen Laukkaing horraantii 2000-meeyadii ka dib markii dagaal-ooge magaaladaas xilligaas looga saaray hawlgal milatari oo uu hoggaaminayay Min Aung Hlaing - kaasoo hadda hoggaamiya dowladda militariga ee Myanmar

Labataankii sano ee la soo dhaafay, dalka gudihiisa waxa ka koray wax ka badan kobaca dhaqaalaha musuqmaasuqa.

Kooxaysiga heysashada awoodda dhaqaale waxa loo arkaa dammaanad u ah heysashada awoodda siyaasadeed.

Arrintan awgeed, musuqmaasuqu kama uusan joogsan heer qarsoon; wuxuu isu beddelay bahal duulaya. Koritaankiisuna tallaabo tallaabo ayuu uga gudbay fal shaqsiyeed una noqday nidaam.

Hay’adihii dawladdu waxay hilmaameen waajibaadkoodii aasaasiga ahaa. Tartanku wuxuu noqday:
“Yaa ka xaday kan kale in ka badan?”
“Yaan la safannaa si aan u xadno wax badan?”

Qaab-dhismeedyadii dawladdu waxay isu beddeleen meelo ay tuugo ku dhuuntaan iyo godad ay ku gambadaan bililiqaystayaal.

Mabda’ii dawlad horumarineed waa la qalloociyey; qaybta gaarka loo leeyahay iyo nidaamka dawladdu waxay ku wada fariisteen hal kursi oo dano wadaag ah.

Jubbaland 2da Feebaraayo, 2026 Maamulka Jubbaland ayaa xorriyaddiisa dib ugu soo celisay Senator Ilyaas Bedel Gaboose, kaddib markii uu muddo ku dhow hal sano iyo afar bilood u xirnaa maamulka uu hoggaamiyo Madaxweyne Axmed Maxamed Islaam (Axmed Madoobe).
Saacado kaddib sii dayntiisa, Madaxweynaha Jubbaland ayaa kulan wada-tashi ah la yeeshay Senator Ilyaas Gaboose iyo Sheekh Daahir Axmed Cabdullaahi, Kulanka ayaa diiradda lagu saaray xoojinta midnimada, nabadda iyo danta guud ee shacabka Jubbaland.
Qoraal uu Madaxweyne Axmed Madoobe ku baahiyay bartiisa Facebook ayuu ku sheegay in dhinacyadu isla qaateen in danta guud, nabadda iyo midnimada dadka Jubbaland ay ka sarreeyaan khilaaf kasta oo siyaasadeed, Wuxuu sidoo kale carrabka ku adkeeyay in maamulka Jubbaland uu diyaar u yahay tanaasul ballaaran si loo xaqiijiyo wadajir buuxa iyo xasillooni waarta.
“Waxa naga go’an in dhammaan kala aragti duwanaanta siyaasadeed lagu xalliyo waddo kasta oo nabadeed, isla markaana ilaalinaysa danta guud, xasilloonida iyo mustaqbalka dadka reer Jubbaland,” ayuu yiri Madaxweynaha Jubbaland.
Senator Ilyaas Gaboose ayaa la xiray sanadkii 2024, kaddib markii koox mucaarad ah oo ka soo horjeeday Madaxweyne Axmed Madoobe ay doorasho ay ku qabteen Kismaayo ugu doorteen inuu noqdo madaxweynaha Jubbaland, arrintaas oo si weyn u sii xumeysay khilaafka u dhexeeyay Jubbaland iyo Dowladda Federaalka Soomaaliya.
Sii daynta Senator Gaboose ayaa loo arkaa tallaabo siyaasadeed oo muhiim ah, isla markaana qayb ka ah dadaallo lagu doonayo in lagu dhiso isfaham cusub oo u dhexeeya dhinacyada siyaasadda Jubbaland, si loo mideeyo mowqifka siyaasiyiinta deegaanka loogana gudbo khilaafaadkii soo jiitamayay.
Muqdisho 2da Feebaraayo, 2026 Hay’adda Sirdoonka iyo Nabad-Sugidda Qaranka (NISA) ayaa Axaddii shaacisay inay fulisay howlgal gaar ah oo ka dhan ah kooxda Al-Shabaab, kaas oo lagu dilay 13 xubnood oo ka tirsan kooxda, kuna jiray shan horjooge oo sare, kaddib weerar ka dhacay deegaanka Maxaa Saciid ee gobolka Shabeellaha Dhexe.
War-saxaafadeed kasoo baxay NISA ayaa lagu sheegay in howlgalka lagu beegsaday kulan ay lahaayeen horjoogeyaasha Al-Shabaab, kuwaas oo la rumeysan yahay inay qorsheynayeen weerarro argagixiso isla markaana ay cadaadis ku hayeen bulshada deegaanka si ay uga helaan taageero qasab ah.
“Horjoogeyaashan dhiig-miiratada ah waxay ku jireen kulan ay ku abaabulayeen falal argagixiso iyo caburin ay ku hayaan shacabka, waxaana lagu soo afjaray halkaas,” ayaa lagu yiri bayaanka hay’adda.
NISA ayaa magacyada horjoogeyaasha la dilay ku sheegtay Moalim Aseyr, Moalim Maxamuud Axmed Xasan, Sheekh Cali Guuraale, Cabdiraxmaan Sheekh Cali Dhegey, iyo Moalim Caddey, kuwaas oo hay’addu sheegtay inay mas’uul ka ahaayeen falal amni darro oo ka dhacay gobollada Shabeellaha Dhexe, Galgaduud iyo Baay.
Sidoo kale, NISA waxay xaqiijisay in siddeed xubnood oo kale oo Al-Shabaab ah, oo ay ku jiraan saddex horjooge, ay si daran ugu dhaawacmeen howlgalka.
Tan iyo bishii July ee sanadkii hore, ciidamada Soomaaliya oo ay garab siinayaan Howlgalka Midowga Afrika ee Taageerada iyo Xasillinta Soomaaliya (AUSSOM) iyo saaxiibada caalamiga ah, ayaa kordhiyay howlgalada militari ee ka dhanka ah Al-Shabaab. 
Muqdisho 2da Feebaraayo, 2026 Raysal-wasaarihii hore ee Turkiga, Ahmet Davutoğlu, ayaa sheegay in sannadkii 2012 uu hor istaagay qorshe uu Ingiriisku dabada ka riixayay, kaas oo lagu doonayay in Midowga Yurub uu Somaliland ugu aqoonsado dal madax-bannaan.
Davutoğlu waxa uu sheegay in Xoghayihii hore ee Arrimaha Dibadda Ingiriiska, William Hague, uu ku qanciyay dalalka Yurub in ay aqoonsadaan Somaliland, balse uu isagu joojiyay dadaalkaas, kaddib shir ay wada yeesheen madaxda Turkiga iyo Ingiriiska.
“Xoghayaha Arrimaha Dibadda Ingiriiska ayaa diblumaasiyiinta Yurub ka dhex waday ololaha aqoonsiga Somaliland. Markii aan kulanka soo galay, ololahaasi meel wanaagsan ayuu marayay. Waxaan ku idhi: maxaad samaynaysaa? Anaguna Soomaaliya ayaanu dajinayayna adiguna waad kala qaybinaysaa,” ayuu yidhi Davutoğlu.
Waxa uu sheegay in Hague uu ugu jawaabay in Somaliland tahay goob deggan oo dimuqraadi ah, isla markaana u qalanta in la aqoonsado, halka Soomaaliya xilligaas ay ahayd dal ay ka jireen qalalaase iyo dowlad-la’aan baahsan.
Davutoğlu waxa kale oo uu sheegay in aqoonsiga Somaliland uu ka dhigan yahay in Ingiriisku sidoo kale aqoonsan karo Jamhuuriyadda Turkiga ee Waqooyiga Cyprus, oo iyaduna ah dal deggan oo aan argagixiso ka jirin. “Dadkii qolka joogay way la yaabeen,” ayuu yidhi.
Waxa uu ku faanay in isla maalintaas uu wacay Madaxweynihii Somaliland ee xilligaas, Axmed Maxamed Maxamuud (Siilaanyo), iyo Madaxweynihii Dowladdii Ku-meelgaadhka ahayd ee Soomaaliya, Sheekh Shariif Sheekh Axmed, isaga oo uu ku yidhi: “Waxaynu nahay dalal Muslim ah, cid kale yaanay arrimaheena soo faragelin.”
Intaa kaddib, ayuu sheegay in Turkigu shir isugu yeedhay labada dhinac si loo sii wado wadahadallada Somaliland iyo Soomaaliya, isaga oo ujeeddadiisu ahayd in Somaliland aan la aqoonsan, isla markaana caalamku u arko in labada dhinac ay wada-hadallo ku jiraan, sidaasna faraha uga qaado arrinta aqoonsiga.
Wadahadalladii Somaliland iyo Soomaaliya oo socday in ka badan toban sano, isla markaana aan wax natiijo ah laga gaadhin, ayaa dad badan oo reer Somaliland ahi u arkaan in ay ahaayeen dabin loo dhigay dadaallada aqoonsi-raadinta Somaliland, si beesha caalamku u sugo natiijadooda oo aanay tallaabo kale qaadin, halka kuwo kalena ay qabaan fikrad taa kasoo horjeeda.
Wadahadalladii labada dhinac ayaa hadda burburay, waxaana sii kala fogaaday xidhiidhka Muqdisho iyo Hargaysa kaddib markii ay Somaliland ka xumaatay doorka ay Dowladda Federaalka Soomaaliya ku yeelatay dhismaha Maamulka Waqooyi Bari ee laga sameeyay gobolka Sool, taas oo Somaliland ku tilmaantay faragelin ka dhan ah madax-bannaanideeda.
Dhanka kale, Golaha Wasiirrada Soomaaliya ayaa Somaliland ku daray khataraha ay Soomaaliya wajahayso, iyaga oo khatarta koowaad ka dhigay argagixisada, halka khatarta labaadna ay ku tilmaameen fikirka gooni-u-goosadka, oo ay ula jeedeen Somaliland.
Somaliland ayaa markii ugu horreysay 26-ka December ee sannadkii hore ka heshay aqoonsi buuxa dowladdii ugu horreysay ee ka tirsan Qaramada Midoobay, kaddib markii dowladda Israa’iil ku dhawaaqday inay si buuxda u aqoonsatay.
Muqdisho 2da Feebaraayo, 2026 Safiirka Midowga Yurub u fadhiya Soomaaliya, Francesca Di Mauro, ayaa muujiyay niyad-jab ku saabsan dib-u-dhacyada ku yimid diyaar-garowga wadahadal siyaasadeed oo muddo dheer la sugayay oo lagu qaban lahaa Muqdisho.
Di Mauro ayaa ku qortay barta X in ay ahayd arrin ceeb ah in kooxihii hordhaca ahaa ee ka socday laba ka mid ah dowlad-goboleedyada federaalka aysan maanta soo gaari karin Mqudisho, iyadoo sabab uga dhigtay waxa ay ku tilmaantay is-faham la’aan.
Safiirka Midowga Yurub ee Soomaaliya waxay mar kale ku celisay rajada Midowga Yurub ee ah in dhammaan dhinacyadu helaan xal si wadahadalku u sii socdo.
Kulammada wadatashiga ee la qorsheeyay in lagu qabto Muqdisho ayaa qayb ka ah dadaal caalami ah oo lagu doonayo in lagu jebiyo ismariwaaga siyaasadeed ee soo jireenka ah ee ku saabsan sida Soomaaliya u qaban doonto doorashooyinka sanadkan, ka hor inta aysan dhammaan mudnaanta hay’adaha muhiimka ah.
Maalmihii la soo dhaafay, Ergada Midowga Yurub ayaa soo dhaweysay go’aanka Golaha Mustaqbalka Soomaaliyeed ee ah inay aqbalaan casuumaadda dowladda federaalka si ay uga qeyb galaan madasha wadatashiga ee ka bilaabanaysa Muqdisho 1-da Febraayo.
Waxay tallaabadaas ku tilmaameen mid dhisaysa kalsooni, balse waxay adkeeyeen baahida loo qabo jawi ku habboon wadahadallo macno leh.

SIYAASADDA & SIDEY ISU BEDESHAY.

50 sanadood ee igu dambeeysay siyaasadda caalamka waxaa ku dhacay isbedel aad oo weyn, sidaas si la mid ayaa waxaa isbedel ku socdaa dhaqaalaha iyo militariga intaba.

Isbedelkaas oo lagu tilmaamay sida; isbedelka ( dirxi oo isu bedelo balan-baalis  qalimo leh oo duuleyso ).

Waxaa meelo badan oo dunidda ka mid ah madax ka noqday dad ka soo jeedo ururada aan dowladda maamulin NGO sida Somalia iyo dhaqdhaqaaqyada bulshadda ( social movements ) sida Mareykanka ( pride boys & qaqon ).

50 sano ka hor, madaxda badankood waxay ku imaan jireen jidka isbedelka ee ku saleysan af-gembi militari iyo wixii la mid ah.
Dowladdo badan dhaqaalahoodii hoos ayuu dhacay, militarigii ama ciidankoodii wuxuu isu bedelay maleeshiyaad sida Mareykanka, Israel Ciraaq, Suuriya, Yemen, Somalia & Iiran.

3daas arrimood ee kala ah; 1-madaxda sidey ku gaarto xukunka iyo meelaha ay ka soo galeen.
2- dhaqaalaha hoos u dhaca ku yimaado iyo waxyaabaha sababo.
3- burburka ku dhaco ciidamadda iyo arrimaha keeno, waxay noqdeen daraasaad cusub oo bedelay wejigii lagu yiqiin dowladnimadda iyo sharciga dunidda.

Ka dib, markii dhammaantood loo adeegsaday maslaxad iyo danno gaaban.
Waxaa isu ekaaday ganacsigii iyo siyaasadii, siyaasada oo horseed u aheyd dhaqaalaha iyo ciidamadda dal waba leeyahay.
Waxaa kaloo intaas dheer iney jiraan arrimahii dhaqaalihii iyo ciidanka in lagu dhex milo diimo si bulshooyinka lagu dawaqiyo.
Taasina, waxaa loogu magac daray ( siyaasadda hal abuurka ) oo ka dhigto dowladaha iney u xisaabtamaan sidii taajir dukaanle oo kale ( faa'do iyo khasaaro ).

Jamhuuriyadda Somaliland ayaa  doonaysa inay  dhawaan la gaadho heshiis ganacsi oo ay la saxeexato Israa’iil,  oo noqotay waddankii ugu horreeyay ee ictiraafay madax-bannaanideeda.

Sidaasna waxa werisay Wakaaladda Wararka ee Reuters oo Waraysi uu muuqaal ah la yeellatay Madaxweynaha Jamhuuriyadda Somaliland Md. Cabdiraxmaan Maxamed Cabdilaahi (Cirro) oo ka qaybgalay shirweynaha dawladaha Adduunka ee ka socda Dubai.

Israa’iil ayaa daboyaaqadii bishii December si rasmi ah u aqoonsatay Jamhuuriyadda Somaliland.  Ra’iisal Wasaaraha Israa’iil ayaa xusay in dalkiisu doonayo wada shaqayn degdeg ah oo ku wajahan beeraha, caafimaadka, tignoolajiyadda iyo dhaqaalaha.
Madaxweynaha Jamhuuriyadda  Somaliland Cabdiraxmaan Maxamed Cabdillaahi (Cirro),  ayaa sheegay in ilaa hadda aan la gelin heshiis dhaqaale oo laba geesood ah, hase ahaatee  ay jiraan himilooyin xoog leh  oo la xidhiidha inay labada dawladod galaan heshiis iskaashi.

Madaxweynuhu wuxuu tilmaamay in   Somaliland ay si buuxda u rajaynayso maalgelin, iyo iskaashi ganacsi oo ay la yeelato ganacsatada iyo dawladda Israa’iil mustaqbalka  dhow.

Madaxweyne Cabdiraxmaan Cirro wuxuu intaas ku daray  inay Somaliland  tahay dal qani  ku ah kheyraad dabiici ah, oo ay ka mid yihiin macdanta, shidaalka, gaaska, khayraadka badda, beeraha iyo tamarta. Waxaanu tibaaxay in Somaliland leedahay xoolo, kalluun iyo macdan, kuwaas oo suuq weyn u noqon kara Israa’iil, isla markaana ganacsigu ku bilaabmi karo qeybahaas aasaasiga ah, iyada oo fursaduhuna aad u mug weyn yihiin.

Waraysigan waxa ay Wakaaladda Wararka ee Reuters bayaamisay in Jamhuuriyadda Somaliland ay doonayso in ay ka faa’iidaysato tignoolajiyadda horumarsan ee Israa’iil, gaar ahaan dhinacyada wax-soo-saarka, tamarta iyo adeegyada casriga ah. Somaliland waxay xustay in khayraadkeeda macdaneed ay ka mid yihiin keyd ballaadhan oo lithium ah, taas oo muhiim u ah baytariyada iyo gaadiidka korontada ku shaqeeya. 

Waraysiga Reuters ay la yeellatay Madaxweynaha Somaliland oo ay soo turjuntay Wakaaladda Wararka Somaliland ee SOLNA, waxa lagu xusay in  Sannadkii 2024kii  shirkadda macdanta ee Sacuudiga ah ee Kilomass ay Somaliland ka heshay heshiis sahamin oo la xidhiidha lithium iyo macdano kale oo muhiim ah.

Madaxweyne Cabdiraxmaan Cirro  ayaa u  mahadnaqay  Israa’iil oo noqotay dalkii koowaad ee aqoonsada Somaliland. Inkasta oo Somaliland ay mustaqbalka filayso iskaashi dhinaca amniga iyo milatariga ah, haddana waxa uu caddeeyay in aan weli laga wada hadlin  saldhigyo ciidan oo Israa’iil ay ka samaysato Somaliland.

Madaxweynaha Jamhuuriyadda Somaliland  wuxuu sheegay in uu aqbalay martiqaad uga yimid Ra’iisal Wasaaraha Israa’iil, isla markaana uu booqan doono Israa’iil, inkasta oo aan  la muddaynin wakhtiga socdaalkiisa.

 Wasiirka Arrimaha Dibadda ee Israa’iil ayaa hore u booqday Somaliland bishii hore.

Sidoo kale, Madaxweynaha Somaliland ayaa  hoosta ka xariiqay  rejada ah in dhammaan dalalka xubnaha ka ah Qarammada Midoobay ay mustaqbalka raaci doonaan tubtii Israa’iil, kuwaasi  oo ay ka mid yihiin  Imaaraadka Carabta iyo Maraykanka, isaga oo xusay in aqoonsiga caalamiga ahi uu qaato wakhti.

Madaxweynaha JSL waxa uu  intaas ku ladhay  in Somaliland ay xidhiidh  wanaagsan la leedahay Maraykanka, oo uu aaminsan yahay in Madaxweynaha Maraykanku mustaqbalka aqoonsan doono Somaliland.

  Madaxweynaha Jamhuuriyadda  Somaliland  ayaa dhawaan fursado maalgashi ku soo bandhigay kulan ka dhacay Davos, kaas oo ay ka qaybgaleen ganacsato uu ku jiray wiilka Madaxweynaha Maraykanka.

Reuters waxa ay warbixinteeda ku soo gabogabaysay in Somaliland ay  wada shaqayn la leedahay Imaaraadka Carabta, iyadoo shirkadda DP World ay maalgashi ballaadhan ku leedahay dekedda Berbera.

 Jamhuuriyadda  Somaliland  waxay  filaysaa in dawladda Sucuudigu ay ku  samayso dalka  maalgashi la mid ah kan ay dalal kale ka fuliyeen Somaliland.

Siyaasadda Deegaanka Soomaalida

(Falanqayn ku saabsan Hoggaanka, Musuq-maasuqa, iyo Rajada Bulshada) 

Deegaanka Soomaalida waxa ka muuqda xaalad siyaasadeed oo ku dhisan munaafaqad, is–dhiibid, kala shakisan, muran joogto ah, iyo maangabnimo aan ka duwanayn xukuumadihii hore. Inkastoo magacyo iyo wajiyo is beddeleen, haddana dabeecadihii hore weli way sii jiraan.

Waxaa jira hoggaan aan u muuqan in uu fahamsan yahay culayska iyo mas’uuliyadda xilalka ay hayaan, balse u arka jagooyinka fursad dano gaar ah lagu gaaro. Musuq–maasuq ayaa xadhkaha goostay, eex iyo nin–jeclaysina waxay noqdeen nidaam aan qarsoodi ahayn. Rajadii bulshada Deegaanka waxay u leexatay rajo–beel, gaar ahaan dhalinyarada mustaqbalka u ahayd tiirka qaranka.

Hoggaanka inta la shaqaynaya waxa lagu xulaa qabiil, saaxiibtinimo iyo dano gaar ah, taas oo keentay in hay’adaha dawladdu noqdaan kuwo kala firdhan, isla markaana xanta iyo isku dirku noqdaan hub ay mas’uuliyiintu isku adeegsadaan. Deegaanku wuxuu gaaray heer uu dallacsiinta iyo booska fiican ku heli karo qofka kan kale ka wanjalka badan, halkii lagu qiimeyn lahaa karti iyo hufnaan.

Waxaa kale oo muuqata in Madaxweynaha hoggaamintiisa ay hadheeyeen hadal–hayn iyo eedo kaga imanaya qaybaha dhaqanka iyo bulshada. Wasiirro badanina ma laha awood ay ku ilaaliyaan sirta iyo nidaamka dawladnimo, taas oo sababtay in hab–maamuuskii iyo kalsoonidii hay’adaha burburaan.

Waxqabadka wasiirrada badankood wuxuu noqday “Camera iyo muuqaal”, halkii uu ka ahaan lahaa adeeg dhab ah oo taabanaya nolosha shacabka. Hagrasho hoggaamineed ayaa ka jirta dhammaan dhinacyada: amni, dhaqaale, adeeg bulsho, iyo caddaalad.
Marka korka iyo kaamiraddu shaqaynayso, waxaa la arkaa wanaag, daacadnimo, waxqabad iyo soomaalinimo la muujinayo. Laakiin marka runta la eego, sawirku aad buu uga duwan yahay dhabta ay bulshada ku nooshahay.

A 25-year-old woman from St Paul’s Bay was remanded in custody after pleading not guilty to defrauding around 200 people by posing as a bank.

Tammy Caruana, who told the court she is unemployed, was charged following an extensive online fraud investigation carried out by the Malta Police Force’s Financial Crimes Investigations Department in coordination with Europol and authorities in Ireland and the United Kingdom.

The investigation led to the arrest on 2 February of Caruana and her 82-year-old grandfather. Police said Caruana is the main local suspect and is believed to have operated an online fraud scheme in which she allegedly impersonated a bank.

AWDAL & HAWLAHA TAAGAN:  Ergo & Unnuf waalan
———————————————————————————
Marna ha illaabin dhismaha ACA ama ADF inuu yahay karaamaynta nolosha siyaasadeed ee mustaqbalka, gobaynta shacabka, iyo fududeynta heer-fahanka siyaasadda ragaagsan ee muddo dhan 34 sanno ah ku dhali wayday walaalow, qalin, iyo aqoonyahannimo, taasi oo ay sal-dhig u tahay dheellisannaanta awood-wadaagga dawladnimada Somaliland. Iyadoo aan is leeyahay weli lama gaadhin oo nidaamku muu garan ahmiyadda xilligan ee dheellitirka awood-wadaagga dawladda, filashadayduna waxay i siineysaa in aannu madaxweyne Cirro dheg u dhigi doonin baaqyada wax-galka , haldoorka, waxgaradka, nin-karboodka reer Awdal, iyo adkaanta xaaladda juquraafi-siyaasadeed ee gobolka Awdal.

Hasayeeshee, kaddib marka Eebbe garan-siin waayo madaxweyne Cirro muhiimmadda dheellitirka awood-wadaagga dawladnimada dalka Somaliland ay xilligan  u leedahay sii adkaynta heerka jiraalka qarannimada, iyo sii socoshada geeddiga dawladdeed ee qaranka, waxaa dhici doona qiyaame siyaasadeed, kala guur ummadeed iyo kala gurasho hoggaamineed oo dhab ah. Markaa, haddii aynnu hadda isla wada fahanno kaalinta waafiga ah ee dhismaha ACA/ ADF, muddo gaaban dabadeed, marka si shaacsan loo arko cududda ciidan ee ACA /ADF, waxaa hubanti ah in dirbadiiba miiska hoggaaninta siyaasadda la soo dhigi doono awood-wadaag  dawladeed oo gobaysan. Waayo, maanta geeska Afrika waxaa laga ga noolaan karaa keliya in la fuliyo jideynta maahmaahdii Soomaaliyeed ee ahayd “Ninka Warankaagu galo ayay weedhaadu gashaa”. Dabcan, haddii aanad weli Ila garan duluc-abbaarka hadalkayga, ogow marna suurtagal maaha in awood ciidan la’aanteed aad gob ka ahaato geyi adeegsiga qoriga iyo quwadda ciidamada laysku tixgeliyo. Islamarkaana aad guul ka gaadho siyaasad ku dhisan dawarsi xeeladaysan, iyo dood fuleynimo oo qalin ku salaysan. 

Ugu danbeyntii, marna yaan la dhagaysan wax la yidhaa qarameyn, hubka dhigis, iyo nin Hargeysa ka taga oo yidhaa anigaa dhulka leh, haddana ergo sheeganaya, ergo hadalkeedu nabad buu ku unkamaaa, balse hanjabaaddu waa talo ergo maaha, waa hiil iyo garabsiin cid wax la la doonayo oo gaar ah. Dhulka ragga hadda isku dilaya ee maydkoodu yaallo ayaa leh, waxii intaa ka soo hadhaa waa dhul ballaadhsi dawladeysan  oo xeel iyo xamaasad lagu koriyey, kuna salaysan ku qabso ku qadi mayside. Sidaa awgeed, geeska Afrika keliya waxaa ku noolaan kara ninka is waafajiya qoriga, qalinka, qabka, quudhka, qabiilka iyo qabyaaladda. Nabadda Selel waxay ku xidhan tahay dhawaaqa Ugaas Mustafe iyo yeelmada Ugaas Dooddi, yaan lagu jabin hoosaasin kasta oo ka timaadda gole guurti, wasiirro & naban siyaasadeed. 

Jamal A. Muse

MINNEAPOLIS: Tom Homan u qaabilsanaha xuduudaha iyo socdaalka Mareykanka ayaa Arbacadii ku dhawaaqay in 700 sarkaal oo federaal ah si degdeg ah looga saarayo gobolka Minnesota. Saraakiishan waxay ka tirsan yihiin ICE, Border Patrol, iyo Customs and Border Protection.

Go’aankan wuxuu yimid kadib wadahadallo u dhexeeyay dowladda federaalka iyo maamulka maxalliga ah. 

Waxaa jira heshiis sharci ah oo suurtagal ah oo u oggolaanaya in degmooyinka Minnesota ay la shaqeeyaan ICE, iyagoo xiran kara maxaabiis ilaa 48 saacadood oo dheeraad ah xitaa iyada oo aan amar maxkamadeed jirin.

Homan wuxuu sheegay in wada shaqeyntu ay si weyn u hagaagtay, isla markaana degmooyin badan ay hadda ICE u oggolaanayaan inay qabtaan muhaajiriinta sharci-darrada ah 

Kadib dhimistan:

Tirada saraakiisha federaalka ee Twin Cities waxay noqon doontaa ku dhowaad 2,000 

Si kastaba, waxaa weli jiri doona ciidan gaar ah oo la dagaallama dambiyada khiyaanada (fraud)

Guddoomiyaha Minnesota, Tim Walz, ayaa sheegay in hawlgalkan uusan gobolka ka dhigin mid ammaan ah, wuxuuna dalbaday in:

si degdeg ah loo yareeyo ciidanka

baaritaanno uu gobolka hoggaamiyo la sameyo

la joojiyo waxa uu ku tilmaamay “olole ciqaabeed”

Homan dhankiisa wuxuu sheegay in ujeeddadiisu tahay in hawlgalkan gebi ahaanba la soo afjaro, balse taasi ay ku xirnaan doonto iskaashiga maamulka maxalliga ah. Wuxuu carrabka ku adkeeyay inuusan oggolaan doonin in saraakiisha federaalka khatar la geliyo, gaar ahaan iyadoo ay jiraan mudaaharaadyo iyo weerarro ka dhan ah ICE.

Ugu dambeyn, Homan wuxuu ugu baaqay hoggaamiyeyaasha maxalliga ah inay dejiyan xiisadda, isla markaana ay la shaqeeyaan ICE si loo hubiyo amniga.

Minneapolis ayaa la daala dhacaysa dhibaatooyinka ka soo gaaray howlgalada ICE oo sababay dhimasho, dhaawac, kala carar, qab qabasho, iyo cabsi galin jogtaa.

Warar sugan oo ay heshay warbaahinta Somali Stream ayaa xaqiijinaya in shirkii  masiiriga ahaa ee u qorshaysnaa inuu dhexmaro Golaha Mustaqbalka Soomaaliya iyo Dowladda Federaalka ah uu suuratgali waayay inuu qabsoomo.

Xogtan oo aan ka helnay ilo wareedyo xog-ogaal ah ayaa muujinaysa in xaaladda dalku ay marayso meel aad u xasaasi ah, ayna Madasha Samatabixinta ka quusatay rajadii ay ka qabtay in si degdeg ah shirka loo qabto.

Sababaha keenay inuu shirku baaqdo, waxaa ugu horreeysay sidii aan hore u baahinay daacadnimo la’aanta Madaaxtooyada Qaranka oo muddo dhawr maalmood ah ka cagajiidaysay inay ka garawdo celintii diyaaradaha iyo tabashooyinkii Puntland iyo Jubaland.

Dhinacyada xogta nasiiyay ayaa inoo sheegay in Madaxweyne Xasan uu ciyaarayo siyaasad laba weji leh. Mid waa isaga oo gacanta midig ku qabtay Beesha Caalamka, lana galay ballanqaadyo qurxoon, halka gacanta kale uu ku duminayo heshiis kasta oo keeni kara kalsooni dhab ah. Camalkiisa ayaa lagu tilmaamay “gaadmo siyaasadeed,” isagoo adeegsanaya xeelado dib-u-dhac ah si uu uga fogaado mabaadi’da dhabta ah ee isu-soodhawaanshaha iyo wada-xaajoodka dhabta ah.

Waxa kale oo ay xogtu intaas ku daraysaa in Madaxwaynuhu qorsheeyey safarro uu ku marayo saddex dal oo dibadda ah usbuucan sida Masar, Qatar iyo Itoobiya oo uu ak dhacayo Shirka Midowga Afrika. Safaradaas waxay waqtiga ka dileen gogosha.

Kulankii Beesha Caalamka iyo Golaha Mustaqbalka

Dhinaca kale, Somali Stream waxay heshay faahfaahinta kulan 3-dii bishan  dhexmaray Beesha Caalamka iyo Golaha Mustaqbalka oo ay halkan ku matalayeen xubno katirsan Samatabixinta oo uu horkacayay Raysal Wasaare hore Xasan Cali Khayre iyo Hoggaamiyaha Xisbiga Wadajir Cabdiraxmaan Cabdishakuur Warsame.

Kulankan ayaa lagu soo hadal qaaday dhacdadii 1-dii bishan Dowladdu ku hor istaagay diyaaradihii hordhaca u ahaa wafdiyada Puntland iyo Jubaland, taas oo loo arkay weerar toos ah oo lagu qaaday kalsoonida, habraaca shirka iyo nidaamka guud ee dawladnimada.

Golaha Mustaqbalka ayaa gudbiyay eedayn culus oo ku aaddan in Madaxweyne Xasan Sheekh uu dalkii dib ugu celiyay nidaam kooxaysi, isagoo macno tiray hay’adihii dowladda si uu u gaaro dano gaar ah.

In kasta oo Beesha Caalamku ay codsatay in 4-ta bishan ay yimaadaan miiska wada-hadalka, haddana Madaxweynayaasha Puntland iyo Jubbaland ayaa  caddeeyey inaysan diyaar ahayn, isla markaana aysan soo safri karin maalinta Arbacada ah sababo la xiriira amniga iyo kalsooni darrada taagan.

Go’aanka Jubbaland iyo Puntland: Khatarta Mashruuca Federaalka

Xogta ugu dambeysay ee ay heshay Somali Stream ayaa muujinaysa in Jubbaland iyo Puntland ay hadda u yeeranayaan xubnaha ku matala Dowladda Federaalka si ay ula sameeyaan la-tashiyo masiiri ah. Waxaa jira xog xooggan oo sheegaysa inay qarka u saaran yihiin inay ku dhawaqaan inay gebi ahaanba ka baxeen mashruuca dowladnimada ee hadda socda.

Tani waxay ka dhigan tahay halis aan hore loo arag, iyadoo wararka qaar ay sheegayaan in xildhibaannada iyo masuuliyiinta deegaannadaas matala aysan mar dambe kasoo muuqan doonin aqallada baarlamaanka iyo guud ahaan nidaamka dowladnimada ee Muqdisho saldhiga u tahay. Haddii tallaabadan ay hirgasho, waxay calaamad u tahay burburka nidaamkii federaalka ee la soo dhisayay labaatankii sano ee u dambeeyay.

U sheega kuwa Somaliland gooni goosad ku tilmaama!

Waddamo cusub waxay ku abuurmaan habab taariikheed iyo sharciyeed oo kala duwan, sida kala qaybsanaan (partition), midow (unification), goosasho (secession), iyo burbur ama kala daadasho (dissolution). Waxaa ka mid ah midowgii Ingiriiska iyo Scotland oo uu ka abuurmay Great Britain, goosashadii Bangladesh ee Pakistan, iyo burburkii Midowgii Soofiyeeti oo u kala jabay jamhuuriyado madax bannaan.

Kala duwanaansho muhiim ah ayaa u dheexaya marka la eego sharciga caalamiga ah oo u dhaxaysa hababkan ay waddamadu ku abuurmaan,  goosashada oo ah ka bixitaan hal dhinac ah oo laga go’o dawladii hooyada ahayd (sida kiiska Kosovo), iyo burburka, oo ah marka awoodda dhexe ay burburto isla markaana goboladu ay noqdaan kuwo madax bannaan, sida ku dhacday Federaalka Mali. Xaaladdaas, Senegal iyo Sudan-kii Faransiiska (oo markii dambe noqday Mali) waxay galeen federaal muddo gaaban ah ka hor intaanay si nabad ah u kala bixin, hab ay fududeysay isafgarasho labada dhinac ah.

Haddaba, arrinta Somaliland waa xaalad ama dood gaar ah oo ku salaysan burbur midow fashilmay, sida lagu caddeeyay warbixintii Guddiga Xaqiiqo raadinta ee Midowga Afrika ee 2005. Warbixintani waxay sheegtay in Somaliland aanay ka go'ayn Soomaaliya, balse ay dib ula soo noqotay dawladnimadii Jamhuuriyadda Somaliland ee hore (British Somaliland Protectorate), taas oo si ikhtiyaari ah ula midoowday Soomaaliyadii Talyaaniga ee 1960. Kadib markii ay burburtay Jamhuuriyadda Soomaaliya 1991, Somaliland waxay ku dhawaaqday madaxbannaani iyada oo ku salaynaysa xuduudihii ka hor midowga.

Aniga, Ekombola Mbula Joseph, oo ah u dhaqdhaqaaqa xuquuqda qaxootiga iyo difaaca xuquuqda aadanaha, waxaan jeclaan lahaa inaan si rasmi ah u soo bandhigo welwelkeyga qoto dheer iyo cambaareynta xooggan ee ku saabsan sii socoshada xadgudubka, takoorka, iyo dayaca ay UNHCR Kenya iyo Waaxda Adeegga Qaxootiga (DRS) u hayaan qaxootiga Soomaaliyeed iyo magangelyo-doonka ee Kenya.

Muddo dheer, qaxooti badan oo Soomaali ah ayaa la duudsiyay xuquuqdooda aasaasiga ah, gaar ahaan xuquuqda ilaalinta, xaqa magangelyo iyo xaqa ay u leeyihiin inay ku noolaadaan si sharaf leh. Tiro badan oo magangalyo doon ah oo Soomaali ah ayaa UNHCR Kenya si ula kac ah u hoos geysay xaalad "la sugayo" oo dheer. Xaaladani waxay ka dhigaysaa aqoonsi la'aan sharci, ilaalin la'aan, gargaar la'aan, oo ay la kulmaan dhibaato maalinle ah, cabsi iyo hubanti la'aan.

Qaxootiga Soomaalida ayaa si xun loogula dhaqmaa geeso badan oo Kenya ah. Waxay la kulmaan takoor, ka saarid, iyo sinnaan la'aan marka loo eego qaxootiga jinsiyadaha kale. Dhaqankan xulashada ah kaliya maahan cadaalad darro, laakiin sidoo kale waxay jebinaysaa sharciga caalamiga ah ee qaxootiga, mabaadi'da xuquuqul insaanka, iyo waajibaadka asaasiga ah ee UNHCR lafteeda.

Aad ha u caddaato:
Soomaalidu waa dad.
Waxay la siman yihiin qaxootiga Congo, qaxootiga Koonfurta Suudaan, qaxootiga Burundi, iyo qaxootiga dhammaan jinsiyadaha kale. Qaxootina waa in loola dhaqmo mid ka hooseeya sababtoo ah dhalashadooda, isirkooda, ama asalkooda.

UNHCR Kenya iyo DRS waxaa saaran waajibaad sharci iyo mid damiir ah inay si isku mid ah ula dhaqmaan dhammaan qaxootiga, iyadoon la takoorin. Ilaalintu waa in aanay noqon mid door ah. Xuquuqul insaanku waa in aanay ku xidhnayn dhalasho. Cadaalada waa in aan dib loo dhigin, waayo cadaalada dib u dhaca waa cadaalada.

Baydhabo dhiig bay qubanaysaa Lafta Gareenna waa mas’uulka koowaad

Magaalada Baydhabo maanta ma aha mid amni ku nool, waa magaalo cabsi, barakac iyo rasaas lagu hoggaaminayo. Dagaal culus oo maalintii labaad ka socda ayaa burburiyay noloshii caadiga ahayd, kumannaan qofna waxay ka carareen guryahoodii iyagoo badbaado raadinaya.

Isgaarsiintii Baydhabo waa la jaray, xogtii runta ahaydna waa la qariyay taas oo caddeyn u ah in wax la daboolayo. Dadka rayidka ah ayaa la geliyay mugdi, iyagoo aan ogeyn halka ay u qaxaan ama cid ay gargaar ka helaan.

Mas’uuliyadda masiibadan si toos ah waxay u saaran tahay Cabdicasiis Lafta Gareen, oo doortay inuu kursi ku difaaco rasaas, halkii uu dadkiisa ku difaaci lahaa nabad. Maamul waqtigiisii dhammaaday ayuu xoog ku haystaa, dhiigga shacabka Baydhabo-na wuxuu u adeegsaday gaashaan siyaasadeed.

Carruur, haween, iyo waayeel ayaa hoy la’aan ah, halka Lafta Gareen uu ku mashquulsan yahay aamusin, caburin, iyo amarro rasaas ah. Taariikhda lama khiyaaneeyo qof walba oo dhiig shacab ku dhista kursi, mar bay kula xisaabtamaysaa.

Baydhabo ma rabto dagaal, mana rabto hoggaan ku dhisan cabsi. Waxay rabtaa cadaalad, nabad, iyo maamul sharciyaddiisu ku timaado rabitaanka dadka not rasaas iyo barakac.

Lafta Gareen: dhiigga shacabka ma asturo kursi dhacay.

Maxaa Sababay In Soomaaliya Laga Waayo Meel Ay Ku Mideysan Yihiin Nabad iyo Cadaalad?

Mid ka mid ah su’aalaha ugu waaweyn ee maanta horyaalla Soomaaliya waa: maxaa keenay in ku dhowaad 90% dalka aysan ka jirin meel ay si dhab ah ugu wada sugan yihiin nabad iyo cadaalad?

Dhawaan waxaan ka qaybgalay barnaamij lagaga hadlayay saddex-xagalka murugsan ee siyaasadda, qabiilka, iyo diinta. Intii dooddu socotay, gabar ayaa hadal kooban jeedisay, balse si qoto dheer u taabanaya xanuunka Soomaalida, iyadoo tiri:
“Soomaaliya wax walba waa isku dhex yaacsan yihiin; ma jirto meel si cad loo fahmi karo halka aan taaganahay.”
Hadalkan, inkastoo qosol lagu qaaday, wuxuu ka tarjumayaa xaalad murugo leh oo dhab ah.

Soomaaliya gudaheeda, wax walba waxaa loo adeegsadaa dagaal: qabiil, diin, iyo siyaasad—wax aan la isku dilinna ma muuqato. Waxaase kasii yaab badan in aan la helin hal goob oo ay si wadajir ah uga jiraan nabad iyo cadaalad. Mararka qaar waxaa la tilmaamaa in Somaliland iyo Puntland ay nabad yihiin, balse xaqiiqda dhabta ah ayaa ah in cadaalad dhab ah aysan ka jirin, xitaa dadka wada dhashay dhexdooda. Tani waa arrin mudan in si daacad ah loo wajaho.

Dad badan waxay rumaysan yihiin in dhibaatada Soomaalida ay sal u tahay qabiil. Si kastaba ha ahaatee, waxa muuqata in dhibaatadu aysan qabiil ahayn, balse ay tahay damac shakhsiyeed, kibir, iyo loollan awoodeed. Qof awood ama dhaqaale leh marka uu waayo danihiisa, wuxuu khilaafka u baddalaa mid qabiil, isagoo ka dhigaya arrin guud. Haddii uu danihiisa helo, isla qabiilkaas ayuu ku ammaanaa wax walba—taasi waa is-diiddan aan la dafiri karin.

Sidoo kale, marka nidaam kali-talis ah la iska caabiyo, waxaa kacaya kooxo lagu magacaabo mucaarad, kuwaas oo marka hore u dagaallama xaq iyo caddaalad. Laakiin marka ay guuleystaan, khilaafkoodu wuu isu beddelaa mid ku saleysan kheyraad, mansab, iyo awood-qaybsi, taas oo horseedda burbur cusub. Sidaas ayay hal daalinimo mid kale ugu baddashaa.

#XOG Dagaal ka dhacay Baydhabo iyo xaaladda ugu dambeysay

Wararka laga helayo magaalada Baydhabo ayaa sheegaya in dagaal hubeysan uu ka dhacay gudaha magaalada, gaar ahaan agagaarka guriga Wasiirka Xanaanada Xoolaha ee Xukuumadda Federaalka Soomaaliya, Xildhibaan Xasan Eelaay.

Iska horimaadka ayaa si gaar ah uga dhacay aagga Geedka Bardaha, Buundada magaalada iyo hareeraha guriga wasiirka. Rasaas xooggan ayaa laga maqlayay xaafadahaas, waxaana cabsi iyo jahwareer soo wajahay shacabka ku dhaqan goobaha ku dhow halka uu dagaalku ka socday.

Waa kuma Sarkaal Nishow?

Cabdiraxmaan Nishow ayaa lagu sheegay inuu hore uga tirsanaa Qaybta 60-aad ee Ciidanka Xoogga Dalka Soomaaliyeed. Xogaha hadda soo baxaya ayaa sheegaya inuu yahay hoggaamiye malleeshiyaad ka amar qaata Wasiirka Xanaanada Xoolaha ee Xukuumadda Federaalka Soomaaliya, Xasan Eelaay, isla markaana uu hoggaaminayay ciidamo taabacsan wasiirka oo ku lug yeeshay xiisadda ka taagan Baydhabo.

Sidee kusoo Galay Baydhabo  sarkaal Nishow?

Sarkaalka ayaa ku sugnaa Muqdisho isla markaana la xaddiday dhaqdhaqaaqiisa laguna amray inuusan ka dhoofin karin Garoonka Diyaaradaha Muqdisho, Wararka la helayo ayaa tilmaamaya in Nishow uu safar dhulka ah ku soo galay magaalada Baydhabo, isagoo la sheegay inuu ka soo dhaqaaqay Muqdisho. Ilo wareedyo ayaa sheegaya inuu maray deegaanno ay maamusho kooxda  (AS), islamarkaana uu  soo dhexmaray, ka hor inta uusan gaarin Baydhabo. Qaar ka mid ah wararka ayaa sidoo kale sheegaya inuu watay mooto nooca Fekon ah 

Maxaa huriyay dagaalka?

Iska horimaadka ayaa la rumeysan yahay inuu salka ku hayo muran la xiriira dhul ay leedahay Wasaaradda Xanaanada Xoolaha oo ku yaalla Baydhabo. Wararka qaar ayaa sheegaya in maamulka Koonfur Galbeed uu qorsheynayay dhismo laga hirgeliyo dhulkaas, taasoo dhalisay khilaaf horseeday dagaalka.

Xaaladda ugu dambaysay ?

Wararka ugu dambeeya ayaa sheegaya in Dowladda Koonfur-Galbeed ay ku guuleysatay inay soo afjarto malleeshiyaadkii ku lugta lahaa dagaalka, islamarkaana dib u soo celisay ammaanka goobihii lagu dagaallamay. Lama shaacin weli khasaaraha rasmiga ah ee ka dhashay iska horimaadka.
Maamulka Koonfur-Galbeed iyo laamaha ammaanka ayaa la filayaa inay si rasmi ah uga hadlaan dhacdada iyo tallaabooyinka la qaaday.
Xaaladda magaalada Baydhabo ayaa hadda u muuqata mid deggen, inkastoo weli laga dareemayo saameynta dagaalkii ka dhacay gudaha magaalada.

Khaa'imada waddan waa fal ka dhan ah danaha qaranka iyo sharciga. Khaa’inul waddan waa qofka ka shaqeeya inuu waxyeeleeyo amniga, dhaqaalaha, iyo madax-bannaanida dalkeena, iyada oo uu ka faa’iideysanayo siraha qarsoon ama fursadaha xadidan ee lagu kalsoon yahay. Su’aasha isweydiinta naga mudan waxay tahay: yaa mas’uul ka ah difaaca waddanka iyo ka hortagga khaa'inimada?
¹. Sharci Federaal iyo Khaa'nimada
Sharci federaal ee waddamo badan wuxuu qeexaa in khaa'inimada waddanku ay tahay dambiyo culus. Qofkii lagu helo inuu si ula kac ah u xadgudbo ama u faafiyo siraha qaranka waxaa lagu ciqaabaa xukun adag, oo ay ka mid yihiin:

▪︎Xabsi muddo dheer ah
Xaddidid dhaqaale
Xirista xuquuqaha shaqo iyo siyaasadeed..
Sharciga wuxuu cadeeyaa in difaaca waddanka uu yahay waajib guud, oo aanu ku koobnayn booliska ama milatariga kaliya.

². Doorka Hay’adaha Amaanka Hay’adaha ammaanka qaranka, sida sirdoonka, booliska, iyo ciidamada difaaca, ayaa ah kuwa ugu horeeya ee ka hortaga khaa'imida. Waxay sameeyaan:
Kormeer iyo baaritaan sirdoon
Ka hortagga falalka dambiyeed ee gudaha iyo dibadda
La socoshada siraha xasaasiga ah iyo ilaalinta xogta muhiimka ah..
Waxaa muhiim ah in hay’adahan ay si sharci ah u shaqeeyaan, iyaga oo ilaalinaya xuquuqda muwaadiniinta iyo hufnaanta dowladnimo.

³. Doorka Shacabka
Shacabka waa tiirka ugu muhiimsan ee difaaca waddanka. Qof kasta oo muwaadin ah waxaa laga filayaa:
▪︎Inuu ka warqabo falalka ka soo horjeeda danaha qaranka
▪︎ Inuu la shaqeeyo hay’adaha ammaanka marka uu arko wax khatar gelinaya waddanka
▪︎Inuu ku dhaqmo sharciga iyo anshaxa bulshada
Tani waxay muujineysaa in difaaca waddanku aanu kaliya ahayn mas’uuliyadda dowlad, balse uu yahay waajib bulsho oo guud.

⁴. Cawaaqibka Khaa'nimida qaranka
Khaa'imida waddanku waxay keeni kartaa:
▪︎Qalalaasaha siyaasadeed
▪︎Dhaawac dhaqaale oo baahsan
Khatarta amniga qaranka
▪︎Sumcad xumo caalami ah
Tani waxay cadeyneysaa in difaaca waddanku uu yahay arrin muhiim ah oo u baahan iskaashi joogto ah oo u dhexeeya dowlad, hay’ado, iyo shacabka.

#Gunaanad
Difaaca waddanka waa waajib sharci iyo mid bulsho. Qofkii khaa'inimo ku kacaa waa in sharcigu la marsiiyo, si loo ilaaliyo nabadda, amniga, iyo madax-bannaanida waddanka. 
Sharciga, hay’adaha ammaanka, iyo shacabka waa tiirarka ugu muhiimsan ee ka hortaga falalka noocaas ah.
Su’aasha muhiimka ah waa: haddii aad tahay muwaadin, ma kaalin buuxda ayaad ka qaadaneysaa ilaalinta waddankaaga?

Can Ilhan Omar Survive the President’s Latest Attack on Her Wealth and Reputation?

Somali Report - Trump Accuses Rep. Ilhan Omar of Illicit Wealth as Minneapolis Faces Federal Crackdown.

President Donald Trump claimed that the Justice Department is investigating Democratic Rep. Ilhan Omar, accusing the Somali-born congresswoman of amassing a multimillion-dollar fortune—allegations Omar immediately dismissed as a political “deflection” from a faltering administration.

The announcement, made via Trump’s Truth Social platform, marks a new escalation in his long-standing feud with one of his fiercest congressional critics.

“The DOJ and Congress are looking at ‘Congresswoman’ Ilhan Omar, who left Somalia with NOTHING, and is now reportedly worth more than 44 Million Dollars,” Trump wrote, offering no evidence for the figure, which far exceeds estimates in her official financial disclosures.

Omar, a former refugee representing Minneapolis since 2019, fired back on social media, calling the claims a smear.

“Years of ‘investigations’ have found nothing. Get your goons out of Minnesota,” she wrote, referencing the federal immigration agents deployed in her district after two deadly shootings this month. 

Residents have protested in response, demanding the removal of ICE and Border Patrol agents following the deaths of Renee Good and Alex Pretti under disputed circumstances.

Omar’s financial disclosures have come under scrutiny, showing a significant rise in reported wealth attributed mainly to her spouse, Tim Mynett, whose business holdings include stakes in a venture capital firm and a winery. 

While Republican House Oversight Chairman James Comer has promised an investigation into the couple’s finances, sources familiar with the Justice Department say a preliminary inquiry initiated in June 2024 has stalled due to insufficient evidence.

The current dispute highlights the ongoing tension between Trump and Omar. 

Since her historic election as one of the first Muslim women in Congress, Omar has been a frequent target of Trump’s rhetoric, including past “send her back” chants at rallies and personal attacks, which critics describe as racially charged.

Trump’s announcement, along with the deployment of his border czar Tom Homan to Minneapolis, has intensified both political and local tensions. 

The confrontation underscores the collision of national politics, racial dynamics, and immigration enforcement in Omar’s district, with potential implications for the broader 2026 election cycle.

As federal scrutiny and protests continue, the standoff between the president and Omar is shaping into a major flashpoint in U.S. politics, combining personal attacks, partisan investigations, and real-world unrest on the streets of Minneapolis.

Waa maxay sababta Bitcoin sidan hoos ugu dhacday?📈

1. Suuqa Guud ee Caalamiga ah ayaa noqday “Risk-Off”
Maalgashadayaasha waxay ka baxayaan hantida khatarta leh sida Bitcoin, waxayna door bidaan hanti ammaan u muuqata sida lacagaha adag ama bonds, kadib markii walwalka dhaqaalaha guud uu kordhay — taasoo hoos u dhigtay kalsoonida crypto.

2. Liquidations

Marka qiimuhu bilaabo hoos-u-dhac, meelo badan oo ganacsi oo leh amaahno (leverage) ayaa khasab ku laabay iibinta si loo xiro khasaaraha — taasoo sii dedejisay hoos u dhaca. Qaddar booqle oo malaayiin doolar ah ayaa lagu khasbay in la iibiyo Bitcoin.

3. Dareenka Suuqa oo Aad u Cabsi Badan

Indhaha maal-gashadayaasha ayaa hadda ku jira heer cabsi ah (Fear), taas oo loo yaqaanno “extreme fear”, taasoo ka dhigan in “buy orders” aysan jirin — taasoo sii rogtay hoos-u-dhaca.

 4. Dhaqaalaha Mareykanka & Siyaasadaha Bangiga Dhexe

Wararka ku saabsan siyaasadaha adag ee Federal Reserve (tusaale ahaan madax cusub oo taageeraya sicir-xirid) ayaa ka dhigay in lacagaha la xakameeyo iyo dulsaarka uu ahaan doono mid sareeya muddo dheer, taas oo ka dhigaysa Bitcoin inay ka yaraato soo jiidashada maalgashadayaasha.

5. Maalgashadayaasha Waaweyn (Institutions) oo Bixinaya

Saxeexa lacagaha ka imanaya sanduuqyada Bitcoin ETFs (fursado maal-gashi oo Bitcoin haysta) ayaa sii kordhay, taasoo ka dhigtay in maal-gashadayaasha waaweyn ay qaadaan Bitcoin-kooda oo bixiyaan, iyagoo raadinaya badbaado kale.

6. Xiriirka Suuqa Kale ee Maaliyadda

Qiimaha saamiyada tiknoolajiyada iyo suuqyada kale ee “risk assets” ayaa hoos u dhacay, taasoo Bitcoin ku riixday hoos sidoo kale sababtoo ah dadka maal-gashadayaashu waxay wada joojiyeen hantida halista leh.

Somaliland kama go’in Soomaaliya sabab la’aan. Turkigu waxay aaminsan yihiin in haddii ay aqoonsadaan ama si toos ah ula macaamilaan Somaliland, ay dhabarka ka tooganayaan saaxiibkooda Muqdisho. Waxay u muuqataa inay doorteen "khariidadda hadda jirta" si ay qandaraasyadoodu u badbaadaan.

Qabyaalad muddo dheer raagtay, kalsooni darro bulsho, iyo siyaasiyiin dano gaar ah ka hormariya danta guud ayaa sabab u noqday in horumar waara la gaari waayo.

Burburkii dowladdii dhexe ee Soomaaliya, dagaalladii sokeeye, faragelinta shisheeye, iyo dib-u-heshiisiin la’aanta ayaa sii adkeeyay xaaladda, iyadoo bulshada badankeedu ay ku nool yihiin jahwareer iyo niyad-jab. 

Dadka intooda badan waxay ka doorbideen in ay nolol ka sameystaan dibadda, halka dalkooda uu weli ku jiro fowdo, dagaal, iyo dib-u-dhac horumarineed.

Inta aan la helin is-cafis bulsho, hoggaan masuul ah, iyo danta qaran oo la wada hormariyo, doodda, dagaalka, iyo fowdadu way sii jiri doonaan.

Siyaasiyiinta Koonfurta Soomaaliya ayaa inta badan dano gaar ah ka hormariya danta guud, taasoo keentay in hannaan dowladnimo oo waara uu weli ku adkaado.

Barri waxaad arki doontaa dood iyo fowdo, maalinta xigta dagaal iyo siyaasad xumo, mar kasta siyaasad weji badan iyo maamulo cusub oo kala aragti duwan iyo shirar aan dhamaad laheyn oo la isku mashquuliyo.

Koonfurta Soomaaliya waxay u muuqataa halka uu dib-u-dhaca iyo jihada toosan ee horumarka uu ka hor istaagay.

Taariikhdu waxay muujinaysaa in xal waara oo dowladnimo iyo nabad ku wada noolaasho uu u baahan yahay cafis bulsho, dib-u-heshiisiin qaran, iyo ujeeddo mideysan oo bulshada oo dhan ay wada qaadato.

Rajo-beelka iyo ciilka siyaasadeed ayaa weli curyaaminaya horumarka, laakiin jiilalka cusub ayaa laga rajeynayaa inay dalka dib u dhisaan, nabad iyo horumar ku soo kordhiyaan, isla markaana ay ku noolaadaan sharaf iyo karaamo.

HOOS UDHAC KU YIMAADAY DOLLARKA 🎤

Tusmada dollarka (Dollar Index) ayaa wax yar hoos ugu dhacay Jimcihii, iyadoo ka hooseysay heerka 98, balse weli ku dhoweyd heerarkii ugu sarreeyay ee laba toddobaad oo ay gaartay horraantii toddobaadka. Sidoo kale, waxaa la filayaa in toddobaadka koowaad ee Febraayo uu ku dhammaado koror ku dhow 0.9%.

Doollarka Maraykanka (greenback) wuxuu toddobaadka oo dhan taageero ka helay doorkiisa ah hoy ammaan ah (safe-haven), gaar ahaan Khamiistii, markii xogta shaqada Mareykanka ay ka timid mid ka liidatay intii la filayay, taas oo dhalisay walaac ku saabsan caafimaadka dhaqaalaha. Arrintaas, oo ay wehelisay hoos u dhac ku yimid saamiyada tiknoolajiyadda iyo sicir-dhac xooggan oo ku yimid hantida crypto-ga, ayaa keentay in maal-gashadayaashu u cararaan meelaha amniga ah.

Dareenka suuqa ayaa hagaagay Jimcihii, kadib markii ay dib u kaceen saamiyada tiknoolajiyadda, isla markaana xog hordhac ah ay muujisay in tusmada kalsoonida macaamiisha ee Jaamacadda Michigan ay si lama filaan ah u gaartay heerkii ugu sarreeyay lix bilood.

Marka la eego mustaqbalka, maal-gashadayaashu waxay diiradda saari doonaan warbixinta shaqooyinka Mareykanka ee dib u dhacday iyo warbixinta CPI (sicir-bararka) ee la sii deyn doono toddobaadka dambe, si ay u helaan tilmaamo dheeraad ah oo ku saabsan aragtida Bangiga Dhexe ee Mareykanka (Fed). Suuqyadu hadda waxay qiimeynayaan in sannadkan la sameyn doono hoos-u-dhigis dulsaar oo ku dhow 58 dhibcood (bps), taas oo ka sarreysa qiyaastii 50 bps oo la filayay horraantii toddobaadka.

Qabyaaladdu waa dab—ma iftiimiso, waxay gubtaa.

Haddii aad rabtaan taageero, keenna aragti.
Haddii aad rabtaan hoggaan, muujiya waddaniyad.

Wax la dhiso ayaannu rabnaa—ma wax la dumiyo.

Madaxwayne  Musuq ku Timi iyo Xildhibaano Musuq ku Yimi: Ma ka Shaqayn Karaan Danta Ummadda?
————————————————————————

Dalka maanta waxaa isku haysta xildhibaano lagu eedeeyo in ay xilka ku yimaadeen laaluush, iyo madaxweyne isna lagu tilmaamo in isla waddadaas ku yimid. Taasi waa masiibo laba-laab ah oo ku habsatay jiritaanka dowladnimada. Sida maahmaahdu leedahay: “Hal xaaraan ahi nirig xalaal ah ma dhasho.”

Haddii saldhigga dowladnimo uu yahay musuq, khiyaano, iyo iibinta codka shacabka, maxaa laga filan karaa natiijada ka dhalata? 

Dowlad ku dhalatay musuq ma dhalin karto caddaalad; baarlamaan lagu soo xulay laaluush ma ilaalin karo danta ummadda; hoggaan ku yimid khiyaano ma noqon karo badbaadiye qaran.

Xildhibaan musuq ku yimid wuxuu xilka u arkaa ganacsi, ee uma arko mas’uuliyad Qaran. Go’aankiisu kuma salaysna dan guud, ee wuxuu ku salaysan yahay cidda bixisa lacagta badan. Madaxweyne ku yimid isla habkaasna wuxuu u arkaa kursiga maalgelin la soo celinayo, ee ma arko amaano Eebbe iyo mid shacab.

Marka labadaas ay isku dhacaan, muranku ma aha mid Dastuuri ah, mana aha mid Dan Qaran lagu kala aragti duwan yahay; waa isku Dhac dano gaar ah, mid walbana doonaya in uu helo qaybtiisa musuqii uu ku soo bixiyey.

Badbaadada dalka kama imaan karto nidaam laaluush ku dhisan, ee waxay ka imaanaysaa hoggaan daahfuran, doorasho xalaal ah, iyo xildhibaano matala rabitaanka shacabka, kana madax-bannaan lacag Raadis iyo Dhuuni.

𝐒𝐨𝐦𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐚 𝐔𝐧𝐯𝐞𝐢𝐥𝐬 𝐑𝐞𝐟𝐨𝐫𝐦𝐞𝐝 𝐋𝐚𝐛𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐋𝐚𝐰 𝐀𝐟𝐭𝐞𝐫 52 𝐘𝐞𝐚𝐫𝐬

Senior officials from the Federation of Somali Trade Unions (FESTU) participated in the official launch ceremony of the New Labour Law, Law No. 36/2024, organised by the Ministry of Labour and Social Affairs, Wasaaradda Shaqada iyo Arrimaha Bulshada Soomaaliya.

The event brought together the tripartite labour constituencies, including the government, trade unions and employers, with members of parliament and other government officials also in attendance.

The FESTU delegation was led by Nasra Haji Ahmed, Vice President of FESTU, who stated that the reform of the Labour Law represents a historic step, as it has been updated for the first time in 52 years.

She noted that the new law is the result of a long struggle and advocacy campaign by trade unions over more than a decade to secure legislation that fully protects workers’ rights and is aligned with the Provisional Constitution of Somalia and international labour standards, in particular the ILO Conventions ratified by Somalia.

Nasra also emphasised that the review of the law was achieved through cooperation and sustained social dialogue between the Ministry of Labour and Social Affairs, FESTU and the Somali Chamber of Commerce and Industry, with the ILO providing both technical and financial support.

She further stated that FESTU will continue working closely with the Ministry to ensure the effective implementation and enforcement of the law and make sure it becomes a practical tool for promoting decent work, justice and equality throughout the country.

Abdirahman Sheikh Mohamud, FESTU’s Education and Training Officer, was awarded a certificate of recognition and appreciation by the Minister of Labour and Social Affairs, Professor Salim Alio Ibrow for his tremendous efforts on behalf of the trade union movement in contributing to the drafting of the revised Labour Law.

Wadankii la odhan jirey Soomaaliya, waxa qabsadey Turkiga. Wuxuu ka faaideystey baahiyaha Dawladnimo ee Soomaaliya (National vulnerabilities). Wuxuu ka dhamaystey Madaxda Soomaaliya, ee uu ugu sareeyo Madaxweynaha Soomaaliya, Xasan Sheekh, si ay ugu gacan geliyaan dhamaan ilaha dhaqaalaha dalka Soomaaliya.

Bal u fiirso: Turkigu wuxuu la wareegey Dekedihii, Madaarka, Baddii iyo kalluumunkii, Macdantii, Amnigii iyo Maamulka ilaha dhaqalaha dalka Soomaaliya ee muhiimka ah oo dhan. 

Tan iyo 2013, Turkiga oo ka faaideysanayay awood darida Dawlada Soomaaliya, wuxuu ku sasabtay oo ku maalgeliyay Soomaaliya lacag dhan $1 billion, isagoo og inuu faa’iido intaa ka badan ka macaashayo Soomaaliya.

Turkigu wuxuu Soomaaliya usoo degey shax iyo kaarto uu ku qabsado ilaha dhaqaalaha dalka Soomaaliya. Bal u fiirso, waan tirinayaa eeg:

1. Dekedda Muqdisho : 2013, Albayrak Group, shirkad Turki ah, ayaa la wareegtay heshiis 20 sano ah si ay u maamusho Dekedda Muqdisho.

2. Dekedda Hobyo: 2024, Metag Holding, shirkad Turki ah, ayaa saxiixatay heshiis lagu horumarinayo Dekedda Hobyo.

3. Maamulka Madaarka: Favori LLC, shirkad Turki ah, ayaa la wareegtey Garoonka Diyaaradaha Caalamiga ah ee Aadan Cadde.

4. Isbitaalka Digfer: Turkigu wuxuu dhisay isbitaalka oo magaca loogu qorey “the Recep Tayyip Erdogan Research Hospital”.

5. Ciidanka: Turkiga wuxuu tababaray in ka badan 16,000 oo askari oo Soomaali ah.

6. Saliidda iyo Gaaska: Heshiisyo ayaa loo saxiixay Turkiga si uu u sahamiyo una qodo saliidda Soomaaliya.

7. Kalluumeysiga: OYAK, shirkad Turki ah, ayaa la siiyay awood ay ku maamusho shatiga kalluumeysiga.

8. Dakhliga: Turkigu wuxuu gacanta ku qabtay ilaha Dakhliga ee dalka Soomaaliya.

9. Amniga: Turkiga wuxuu diyaaradaha dagaalka geeyay Soomaaliya si uu u difaacdo danihiisa.

10. Macdanta: Turkigu wuxuu sahamiyay macdanta Soomaaliya.

11. Badda Soomaaliya: Heshiis iskaashi oo ballaaran oo dhanka badda ah ayaa lala galay Turkiga.

12. Qashinka iyo Saadka: Turkigu wuxuu maamulaa qashinka magaalada Muqdisho iyo saadka.

13. Madaafiicda: Turkigu wuxuu wadaa inuu Xarun uu ka tuurto madaafiicda “Ballistic Missiles” uu ka sameysto Soomaaliya.

14. eVisa: Turkigu wuxuu Soomaaliya ka caawiyey eVisa si uu ula socdo dhaqdhaqaaqa siyaasiyiinta dalalka shisheeye ee soogalaya Soomaaliya.

Kaartada iyo Istaraatiijiyadda uu wato Turkigu waa nooc ka mid ah gumeysi waxa la yidhaahda (Exploitation Colonialism).

Dalkii Soomaaliyada koonfureed waxa qabsadey oo gumeysta Turkiga. Turkigu markii ay Israel aqoonsatay Somaliland, wuu ka qayliyay. Muxuu la qayliyey? Wuxuu isleeyahay Israel way kugu qabsan nimcadaas uu cidlada ka helay, sidaas darteed ayuu la qayliyay Madaxweynaha Turkigu. Daawo video hoose. Haddii aad rabto muuqaal u eg Filim—iska dhaaf "Auto Mode"! 📸🚫

Ma ogtahay in sirta tayada kaamirada ay ku jirto 3-daan qodob? Haddii aad gacantaada (Manual Settings) u maamusho, muuqaalkaagu wuxuu u guurayaa heer kale:

1️⃣ Shutter Speed: Mar walba ka dhig laban-laabka Frame Rate-kaaga. (Tusaale: Haddii aad ku duubayso 24fps, Shutter-ka ka dhig 1/50). Tani waxay ku siinaysaa dhaqdhaqaaq dabiici ah (Motion Blur).

2️⃣ ISO: Mar walba isku day inuu hooseeyo (inta u dhaxaysa 100-400). Haddii ISO-gu bato, muuqaalka waxaa galaya "Grain" ama dhibco dhibco dila tayada iyo quruxda.

3️⃣ White Balance: Ha u deyn Auto. Dooro "Daylight" ama "5500K" si midabka muuqaalkaagu u noqdo mid degan oo aan isbed-beddelayn inta aad duubista ku jirto.

Save-gareey qoraalkan si aad u isticmaasho marka aad duubista ku jirto! 💾

𝗧𝘂𝘀𝗮𝗮𝗹𝗲 𝗮𝗵𝗮𝗮𝗻 𝗗𝗮𝗯𝗸𝗮 𝗶𝘆𝗼 𝗞𝗮𝗮𝗹𝗺𝗼𝗼𝘆𝗶𝗻𝗸𝗮
Bal qiyaas adigoo isku dayaya inaad dab bakhtiiso, waxaadna ku shubaysay biyo muddo sannado ah, xataa tobanaan sano. Waxaad ku bixisay balaayiin doollar biyaha, tuubada, gaadhiga, iyo dhammaan shaqaalaha. Laakiin mar kasta oo aad qiiqa dhexdiisa fiiriso, kaliya maahan in dabkii wali gubanayo, laakiin waxay u muuqataa sidii in qof uu isticmaalayo biyahaagii si uu dabka u sii huriyo. Taasi waa muuqaal cabsi leh, waana tusaale sax ah oo ku saabsan dhibaatada aan maanta ka hadlayno.

𝗦𝗲𝗻𝗮𝘁𝗼𝗿 𝗝𝗶𝗺 𝗥𝗶𝘀𝗰𝗵 𝗶𝘆𝗼 𝗗𝗶𝗴𝗻𝗶𝗶𝗻𝘁𝗶𝗶𝘀𝗮
Taasina waxay noo horseedaysaa Geeska Afrika, gaar ahaan Soomaaliya. Maanta waxaan si qoto dheer u eegaynaa dukumiinti culus oo cinwaankiisu yahay: "𝗦𝗲𝗻𝗮𝘁𝗼𝗿 𝗝𝗶𝗺 𝗥𝗶𝘀𝗰𝗵 𝗼𝗼 𝗸𝗮 𝗱𝗶𝗴𝗮𝘆 𝗞𝗵𝗮𝘁𝗮𝗿𝗮𝗵𝗮 𝗔𝗺𝗻𝗶𝗴𝗮 𝗠𝗮𝗿𝗮𝘆𝗸𝗮𝗻𝗸𝗮 𝗲𝗲 𝗸𝗮 𝗶𝗺𝗮𝗻𝗮𝗮𝘆𝗮 𝗦𝗼𝗺𝗮𝗮𝗹𝗶𝘆𝗮."

Senator Risch maaha qof iska caadi ah; waa codka ugu sarreeya ee Xisbiga Jamhuuriga ee siyaasadda dibadda, waana xubinta ugu darajada sarreysa Guddiga Xiriirka Dibadda ee Aqalka Sare. Marka uu isagu yiraahdo "xeeladda hadda jirta waa mid fashilantay," taasi maahan ra'yi kaliya, ee waa khariidada isbeddel siyaasadeed oo weyn.

𝗜𝘀𝗯𝗲𝗱𝗱𝗲𝗹𝗸𝗮 𝗫𝗮𝗾𝗶𝗶𝗾𝗮𝗱𝗮 𝗸𝘂 𝗱𝗵𝗶𝘀𝗮𝗻 (𝗥𝗲𝗮𝗹𝗶𝘀𝗺)
Senator-ku wuxuu ku doodayaa in habka Mareykanku u wajaho Soomaaliya uu noqday mid "𝗱𝗵𝗮𝗺𝗮𝗮𝗱 𝗹𝗮𝗵𝗮𝘆𝗻"—sida adigoo bixiya lacagta adeeg (𝘀𝘂𝗯𝘀𝗰𝗿𝗶𝗽𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻) aad ilowday inaad joojiso. Wuxuu rabaa in kaalmadu noqoto mid "is-dhaafsi ah" (𝘁𝗿𝗮𝗻𝘀𝗮𝗰𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝗮𝗹). Taas macnaheedu waa: doollar kasta oo la bixiyo waa inuu u adeego danta qaranka Mareykanka. Haddii dowladda kaalmada helaysa aysan natiijo keenin, lacagta waa la joojinayaa.

Wuxuu ka digayaa musuqmaasuq baahsan. Waxaa jira dad ka faa'iida qalalaasaha oo aan rabin in dhibaatada la xalliyo sababtoo ah markaas lacagta kaalmadu waa istaagaysaa. Tusaale dhab ah ayaa jira: Mareykanku wuxuu joojiyay qayb ka mid ah gargaarka ilaa dowladda Soomaaliya ay dib u soo celisay raashin la xaday oo loogu talagalay dadka tabaalaysan.

𝗦𝗶𝘆𝗮𝗮𝘀𝗮𝗱𝗮 "𝗦𝗼𝗺𝗮𝗹𝗶𝘆𝗮 𝗠𝗶𝗱 𝗮𝗵" (𝗢𝗻𝗲 𝗦𝗼𝗺𝗮𝗹𝗶𝗮 𝗣𝗼𝗹𝗶𝗰𝘆)
Tan iyo hadda, wasaaradda arrimaha dibadda Mareykanka waxay raacaysay siyaasadda "Halkii Soomaaliya," taas oo ah in lala macaamilo kaliya dowladda federaalka ee Muqdisho. Risch wuxuu leeyahay habkani waa mid duugoobay oo aan ka turjumayn xaqiiqada ka jirta dhulka.

𝗜𝗰𝘁𝗶𝗿𝗮𝗮𝗳𝗸𝗮 𝗦𝗼𝗺𝗮𝗹𝗶𝗹𝗮𝗻𝗱
Halkan waa meesha ay arrintu ka kululaanayso. 𝗥𝗶𝘀𝗰𝗵 wuxuu soo jeedinayaa in lala macaamilo Somaliland. Wuxuu ku sifeeyay Somaliland inay tahay "𝘀𝗮𝗮𝘅𝗶𝗶𝗯 𝗱𝗲𝗴𝗴𝗮𝗻 𝗼𝗼 𝗱𝗶𝗺𝗼𝗾𝗿𝗮𝗮𝗱𝗶 𝗮𝗵," isagoo ka duwan koonfurta ay dhibaatadu ka jirto. Wuxuu leeyahay: "Maxaynu isaga indho-tiraynaa qaybta kaliya ee gobolka ka shaqaynaysa sababtoo ah khariidaddayadu waxay leedahay waa qayb ka mid ah meesha kale?"

Tani waxay caqabad ku tahay midnimada Soomaaliya, waxayna calaamad u tahay in Washington ay luminayso kalsoonidii ay ku qabtay mashaariicda Muqdisho.

𝗚𝘂𝗻𝗮𝗮𝗻𝗮𝗱
Haddii qorshaha Risch uu noqdo mid rasmi ah, waxaan arki doonnaa:
✪ 𝗦𝗵𝘂𝗿𝘂𝘂𝗱𝗼 𝗔𝗱𝗮𝗴: Kaalmadu ma noqon doonto jeeg furan.
✪ 𝗫𝗶𝘀𝗮𝗮𝗯𝘁𝗮𝗻 𝗗𝗵𝗼𝘄: Dabagal adag oo lagu sameeyo lacagta.
✪ 𝗫𝗶𝗿𝗶𝗶𝗿 𝗱𝗵𝗶𝗻𝗮𝗰 𝗸𝗮𝘀𝘁𝗮 𝗮𝗵: Mareykanka oo si toos ah ula shaqeeya Somaliland dhanka amniga.
Ugu dambeyntii, tani waa isbeddel ka yimid "riyadii dhismaha qaranka" loona guuray "xaqiiqada danta amniga." Waa su'aal ku saabsan: goormay ku dhaganaanshaha khariidadda rasmiga ah noqonaysaa ficil is-indho-tir ah?

 * Mudnaanta koowaad (Priorities): Waxay muujinaysaa in maamulku uu mudnaanta siiyo nidaamka siyaasadda iyo kharashka ku baxa xafiisyada, halkii laga samatabbixin lahaa nolosha dadka masaakiinta ah.

 * Balse, dhowr kiiloomitir marka laga baxo, waxaa jira dad aan haysan biyo iyo raashin. Tani waa fashil ku yimid hannaanka "baahinta adeegga bulshada" (Decentralization of services).

3. Isla-xisaabtan la'aanta (Accountability)
Dadka isweydiinaya "Cid la xisaabtanta ma la waayay?" waxay u muuqdaan inay tilmaamayaan in:

 * Beesha uu ka dhashay: Mararka qaarkood difaaca qabiilka ayaa ka xoog bata xaqiiqda jirta ee ah in dadka tabaalaysan ay yihiin isla dadkii uu codka iyo magaca ku metelayay.

Sheekadii Laba Geed

Waxaa jiray laba geed oo walaalo ah, hal xidid ka soo wada baxay, hal carro ku wada barbaaray. Midkood hadh buu bixiyay, kan kalena miro buu dhalay. Dadkii safarka ahaa labadaba way ku nastaan, wayna ku nafaqeystaan.

Laakiin maalin ayaa dabayl xun timid. Mid ka mid ah geedihii ayaa qalbigiisa ka beeray masayr. Wuxuu yiri:
“Maxaa adiga hadhkaaga loo doortaa, anigana la ii iloobaa?”

Isagoo hadal la’aan ah, ayuu faas u qaatay, wuxuuna ku dhuftay walaalkiis. Dhulkii ayaa dhiig noqday, shimbirihii waa aamuseen, cirkiina wuu madoobaaday.

Geedkii dhacay ma caban, kaliya caleentiisii ayay dhulka ku daadatay, sida ilmada hooyo aamusan.

Geedkii faaska watay wuu istaagay…
Laakiin toobad ma keenin.
Wuxuu ku dooday dabayl iney dumisay ayuu shegay, wuxuuna ku eedeeyay qorrax, wuxuuna iska illoobay faaskii gacantiisa ku jiray.
Sanado ayaa kasowareegay.
Hadh ma uu helin.
Miro ma dhalin.
Dadkii way ka fogaadeen.
Habeen kasta, marka dabayl yar kacdo, wuxuu maqlaa caleemo dhacaya—
waa codkii walaalkiis oo leh:
“Faasku wuu aamusaa, balse dambigu hadal buu leeyahay.”

Dadaalladaasi waxay ku salaysnaayeen aragti siyaasadeed oo ku dhisnayd ka-qaybgalka tooska ah ee nidaamka talada u haya dalka, si lagu xaqiijiyo in xuquuqda siyaasadeed iyo dhaqaalaha ee bulshada Soomaaliyeed.

Alle ha u naxariisto Dr. Cabdul-Majiid Xuseen, wuxuu ahaa hoggaamiyihii ugu horreeyay ee u istaaga in Soomaalidu iyo Itoobiya si nabad ah ugu dhex heli karto xuquuqooda siyaasadeed iyo kuwa dhaqaale, kuna dhisan cadaalad wax-ku-qaybsasho loo siman yahay. Wuxuu ku bixiyay dadaal kasta oo suuragal ah in ururkii uu hoggaaminayay ka mid noqdo EPRDF, hase yeeshee mar walba waxaa laga jawaabi jiray hadal ku soo ururaya aragti khaldan oo ah in Soomaalidu yihiin bulsho xoolo-dhaqato ah oo aan buuxin shuruudaha ka-mid-noqoshada.

Dhammaan madaxda xisbigu waxay si cad u muujiyeen dadaal dheeri ah iyo mowqif siyaasadeed oo qeexan, hase yeeshee jawaabtu mar walba waxay ahayd mid aan wax isbeddel ah xambaarsanayn, kuna soo koobnayd isla hadalkii hore. Waxaa halkaa ka tihiin xoolo-dhaqato.

Si kastaba ha ahaatee, ka-mid-ahaansho la’aanta ururkii talada dalka hayay ayaa si weyn nooga hor istaagtay ka-qaybgalka shirarka lagu go’aaminayay masiirka siyaasadeed, dhaqaalaha, iyo arrimaha bulshada ee dalka. Waxaa guul weyn u aragnay markii EPRDF noo oggolaaday in aan ka-qaybgalno shirarka go’aamada lagu gaadho, inkastoo ka-qaybgalkaasi uu ku koobnaa ka-qaybqaadasho dood oo keliya, isla markaana aanu lahayn wax cod ah. Hase yeeshee fursad aan ku galno shirarka go’aamada waa ahayd.

Markaan intaasi dhaafno, ka dib isbeddelladii Itoobiya ka dhacay iyo burburkii EPRDF, waxaa la sameeyay Xisbiga Prosperity Party (PP). Aniga iyo Mudane Maxamed Rashiid Isaaq, iyo madaxda afarta deegaan ee kale, waxaan ka-qaybgalnay shirkii golaha dhexe, hase yeeshee markii la gaaray xilligii tartanka doorashada Ra’iisul-Wasaaraha, waxaa nalaga wargeliyay in aanu shirarka baxno. Markii aan dib u baxnay, waxaan madaxda deegaanka kale ku idhi: “Waxay ahayd in aynu ugu yaraan ka hadalno si go’aan la geliyo dood uu falanqeyn wadjir ah.”

Go’aanka taariikhiga ah wuxuu xukuumadda deegaanka siiyay fursad siyaasadeed, dhaqaale, iyo mid kuwoo arrimo bulsho oo aan waligood hore loo helin xukuumaddii deegaanka soo maray. Jihaynta siyaasadeed ee ururka Prosperity Party iyo dowladdii Mudane Abiy Ahmed ayaa fursadaha dhabiga ah ee deegaanka gaadhsiiyay.

Aniga maanta, shakhs ahaan, waxaan u arkaa in madaxda deegaanka ay ku shaqeeyaan mas’uuliyad iyo cilmiyad, kana fog eex, kana wada shaqeeyaan dhammaan qaybaha bulshada. Tani waa mid ka tarjumaysa aragtida hoggaamineed ee Dr. Abiy Ahmed Ali.

Xilligii ay comments-yada lagu muujinayay aragtiyada, waxaan dareemay in dad badan ay ka hadlayeen arrimo aan sal iyo raad toona lahayn, kuna salaysan shaki iyo dareen. Ninkii ama haweenaydii hadalkaas jeediyay waxay muujiyeen aragtiyo aan dhisnayn, taas oo keentay jahawareer siyaasadeed.

Guulaha uu gaadhay Xisbiga Prosperity Party waxay ka mid yihiin in maanta Soomaalidu si buuxda uga mid yihiin maamulka, go’aamada, iyo hoggaaminta dalka. Maanta comments-ku waxay noqdeen hadal iyo qoraal oo keliya. Ujeeddada qoraalkani waxay ahayd in aan cabbiro fursadaha dhabiga ah ee ay Soomaalidu ku heleen Prosperity Party."

Intii uu xilka hayey  Maxamed Cabdullaahi Farmaajo, gaar ahaan muddadii u dhaxaysay 2017 ilaa 2021/2022, dowladdii Federaalka Soomaaliya waxay wajahday eedeymo culus oo la xiriira sida ay ula dhaqmeysay kooxda argagixisada ah ee Al-Shabaab. Inkastoo dowladdu si rasmi ah ugu dhawaaqi jirtay dagaal ka dhan ah argagixisada, haddana ficillada dhabta ah ee la arkay, go’aannada la qaatay, iyo qaabka amniga loo maamulay waxay abuureen tuhun ballaaran oo ah in uu jiray iska indha-tiris, wada shaqayn dadban, ama ugu yaraan dan wadaag siyaasadeed oo u dhexeeyay dowladdii Farmaajo iyo Al-Shabaab.

Mid ka mid ah arrimaha ugu waaweyn ee shaki geliyay shacabka ayaa ahaa joogtaynta iyo awood sii kordhaysay ee Al-Shabaab xilligii Farmaajo. Halkii laga filayay in kooxdaasi la wiiqo ama laga xoreeyo deegaannada ay ka taliso, waxaa muuqday in ay sii ballaarinayso canshuur ururinta, dilalka qorsheysan, iyo weerarrada waaweyn ee ay ka fulinayso caasimadda Muqdisho iyo magaalooyinka kale. Tani waxay keentay su’aal ah: sidee bay suuragal u tahay in dowlad sheeganaysa taageero caalami ah, ciidan, iyo sirdoon horumarsan, ay uga hortagi weydo koox si furan u dhaqmeysa?

Dhaliisha ugu weyn ee loo jeediyay Farmaajo waxay ahayd siyaasadeynta amniga. Ciidamada qaranka iyo hay’adaha sirdoonka waxaa loo adeegsaday dano siyaasadeed, gaar ahaan caburinta mucaaradka iyo dowlad-goboleedyada aan la safnayn Villa Soomaaliya. Intii ay hay’adahaas ku mashquulsanaayeen la dagaallanka siyaasiyiin, wariyeyaal, iyo dad rayid ah, Al-Shabaab waxay heshay firaaqo ay ku sii abaabusho, kuna dhex milanto bulshada. Dad badan waxay rumeysnaayeen in dowladdu ay ka doorbiday cadow siyaasadeed mid argagixiso ah, taas oo si dadban ugu adeegaysay Al-Shabaab.

Sidoo kale, waxaa jiray eedeemo ku saabsan in xubno ka tirsanaa hay’adaha amniga ay la shaqeynayeen Al-Shabaab xilligii Farmaajo. Inkastoo aan si rasmi ah loo caddeyn, haddana weerarro badan oo si fudud u dhacay, xog sir ah oo baxday, iyo bartilmaameedyo si gaar ah loo beegsaday ayaa dhalisay tuhun ah in Al-Shabaab ay ku lahayd gacmo gudaha ah dowladda. Dowladda Farmaajo marna si dhab ah uguma guuleysan inay shacabka u caddeyso ama baaritaan hufan ku sameyso eedeymahaas, taas oo sii xoojisay kalsooni darrada.

Arrin kale oo muran dhalisay waxay ahayd habka ay dowladdu ula macaamishay dhaqaalaha Al-Shabaab. Waxaa la wada ogaa in kooxdaasi ay canshuur ka qaaddo ganacsatada Muqdisho, shirkadaha waaweyn, iyo xitaa shaqsiyaad la shaqeeya dowladda. Halkii dowladda Farmaajo si adag uga hortagi lahayd nidaamkaas, waxaa muuqday in ay iska indha-tirtay ama aqbashay si uu “nabadgelyo ku meel gaar ah” u jiro. Dad badan waxay tan u fasirteen in dowladdu ay ogolaatay in Al-Shabaab sii jirto, si ay uga faa’iideysato cabsi joogto ah oo marmarsiiyo u noqota adkeynta awoodda Villa Soomaaliya.

Dhanka siyaasadda, Al-Shabaab waxay si cad uga faa’iidaysatay khilaafaadkii doorashooyinka ee xilligii Farmaajo. Markii uu madaxweynuhu muddo kordhin sharci darro ah sameeyay, isla markaana dalka geliyay qalalaase siyaasadeed, Al-Shabaab waxay kor u qaaday weerarradeeda. Halkii Farmaajo ka qaadi lahaa mas’uuliyadda qalalaasahaas, wuxuu doorbiday in uu ku adkaysto kursiga, taas oo dad badan u muuqatay in danihiisa siyaasadeed ay ka muhimsanaayeen amniga shacabka. Qaar ka mid ah falanqeeyayaasha waxay aaminsan yihiin in Al-Shabaab ay ka faa’iidaysatay xaaladdaas si ay u muujiso in “dowladdu fashilantay”.

Waxaa kale oo jirta aragti ah in Farmaajo uu u adeegsaday Al-Shabaab cabsi gelin siyaasadeed. Weerar kasta kadib, dowladdu waxay shacabka u sheegi jirtay in mucaaradku wiiqayo dagaalka argagixisada, isla markaana ay tahay in madaxweynaha la taageero si loo helo amni. Taasi waxay abuurtay dareen ah in Al-Shabaab ay noqotay aalad siyaasadeed oo si dadban loogu adeegsanayo sii joogitaanka xukunka, halkii si dhab ah loo dabar-goyn lahaa.

Gebagebadii, inkastoo aysan jirin caddeyn rasmi ah oo si buuxda u muujinaysa in Farmaajo iyo dowladdiisu si toos ah ula shaqeeyeen Al-Shabaab, haddana ficillada la arkay, fursadaha la dayacay, iyo siyaasadeynta amniga waxay abuureen sawir ah in ay jirtay wada shaqayn dadban, iska indha-tiris ula kac ah, ama ugu yaraan dan wadaag ku saleysan xukun sii hayn. Dowladda Farmaajo waxay ku fashilantay inay jebiso awoodda Al-Shabaab, waxayna shacabka Soomaaliyeed ka dhaxashay kalsooni darro, amni xumo, iyo tuhun ah in cadowga dalka uusan mar walba bannaanka joogin, balse mararka qaar ku dhex jiro madaxtooyada lafteeda.
