Aabbaha Halganka Koofurta Soomaaliya.

Halgamaa Sheekh Xasan Sheekh Nuur Sheekh Axmed (Sheekh Xasan Barsane).

Sheekh Xasan Sheekh Nuur Sheekh Axmed oo si weyn loogu yaqaano magaca Sheekh Xasan Barsane, waa mid ka mid ah halgamayaasha ugu miisaanka culus sooyaalka halganka soomaalida, gaar ahaan Koofurta Soomaaliya. Waxaa uu ahaa waddaad dhagarta shisheeyaha uga gaashaantay wacyigelin, diin, dhaqan, siyaasad iyo halgan hubeysan, kana hor tagay dulaysigii gumeysigii shisheeye iyo damacyadii isballaarinta ee caddowga Itoobiya.

Dhalashadiisi, Barbaarintiisi iyo Waxbarashadiisi Hore.

Sheekh Xasan Barsane wuxuu gug'ii 1853-dii ku dhashay tuulada Ubaadi oo hoos timaadda magaalada Jowhar, xarunta Gobolka Shabeellaha Dhexe. Wuxuu ka soo jeeday qoys diinta Islaamka ku suntanaa, hooyadii waxaa la oran jiray Xaliimo Hilowle Sheekh Xasan, halka aabbihii Sheekh Nuur Sheekh Axmed uu ahaa caalim caan ka dhex ahaa waddaadii Dariiqada Raxmaaniyada, isla markaana hoggaamiye u ahaa jamaacad diimeed oo firfircoonayd.

Sheekh Xasan Barsane Qur’aanka Kariimka wuxuu ku dhammeystay tuuladii uu ku dhashay isagoo da’ yar, wuxuuna durba bilaabay barashada culuumta kale ee diinta Islaamka isagoo aan weli gaarin da'da tobbanaad. Waxaa wax baray culimo ay saaxiibo ahaayeen aabbihii, kuwaasi oo ku hoggaamiyay wadada cilmiga.

Socdaalkiisi Raadinta Cilmiga.

Markii uu gaaray da’da labaatanaad, Sheekh Xasan Barsane wuxuu go’aansaday inuu u kicitimo raadinta cilmi, meel kasta oo laga heli karo. Gudaha dalka, wuxuu cilmiga ka doontay Afgooye iyo Muqdisho, halka dibadda uu u safaray magaalada barakaysan ee Makka, halkaas oo uu ku gutay waajibaadka Xajka, kuna bartay culuum kala duwan oo diinta Islaamka la xiriira. Muddo saddex gu' ah oo uu Makka ku sugnaa, wuxuu sidoo kale kula kulmay Sheekh Maxamed Saalax, aasaasihii Dariiqada Saalixiyada, taas oo saamayn weyn ku yeelatay fikirkiisi halgan iyo isbeddel bulsho.

Dib-u-noqoshadiisi Soomaaliya iyo Baraarujintii Halganka.

Markii uu dib ugu soo laabtay Soomaaliya, Sheekh Xasan Barsane wuxuu wajahay xaqiiqo qaraar: gumeysi shisheeye, dhaqan burburin, iyo isballaarinta caddowga Itoobiya oo si qoto dheer ugu fidaysay dhulka Soomaalida. Isaga oo aan ka aamusin, wuxuu si cad u diiday in dadka Soomaaliyeed ku hoos noolaadaan gumeysi iyo dulli, wuxuuna si cod dheer ugu baaqay jihaad, iska-caabin iyo difaac qaran iyo mid diimeed.

Abaabulkii Ciidan iyo Halgankiisi Hubeysan.

Qeylodhaantiisa waxaa ka soo jawaabay dadweyne u diyaarsanaa halgan. Wuxuu abaabulay ciidan gaaraya labaatan kun oo dagaalyahan, kuwaas oo uu siiyay wacyigelin, waano diimeed iyo tababar militari. Kadib, wuxuu ku amray inay la dagaallamaan gumeysigii shisheeye.

Istiraatiijiyaddiisi iyo Dagaalladiisi Taariikhiga ahaa.

Sheekh Xasan Barsane wuxuu dagaalka u maamulay istiraatiijiyad gurguurid iyo dhufo-ka-dhaqaaq ah, taas oo si weyn u dhaawacday awooddii gumeysigii Talyaaniga iyo dabadhilifyadiisii. Dagaalladii uu guulaha waaweyn ka gaaray waxaa ka mid ahaa:

Dagaalkii Buulo-Burde (1922).

Dagaalladii Ceel-Dheere (1922–1923).

Dagaalkii Hiilweyne (1923).

Dagaalkii Jiliyaale (1924).

Dagaalkii Hareeriile (1924).

Dagaalkii Lafoole (1924).

Ka-hortaggiisi Isballaarinta Caddowga Itoobiya.

Sidoo kale, Sheekh Xasan Barsane wuxuu si gaar ah u wajahay ugana hortagay damacyadii isballaarinta ee caddowga Itoobiya, isaga oo Koofurta Soomaaliya kula galay dagaallo culus oo loogu quus gooyay damacoodi fooshaxumaa. Iska-caabbintaasi adag wuxuu cadowga ku gaarsiiyay guuldarrooyin waaweyn oo si dhab ah u dabarka ugu saaray, una burburiyay hammigoodii, kuna reebay jab, quus iyo ka-noqosho cad oo damacoodi ah.

Qabashadii, Xabsigii iyo Shahaadadiisi.

Bishii Abriil 1924-kii, gumeysigii Talyaaniga iyo dabadhilifyadoodii ayaa weerar qorsheysan ku qaaday saldhiggii Jiliyaale, xilli inta badan ciidankiisu ku maqnaayeen dagaallo ka socday Gobolka Hiiraan. Halkaas ayay ku qabteen Sheekha.

Waxaa lagu xiray xabsi loo yaqaanay Gaalshiro, waxaana maxkamaddii gumeysigu ku xukuntay soddon gu' oo xarig ah oo ay wehelisay jirdil. Gu'gii 1927-kii dabayaaqadiisi, gumeysigii Talyaaniga wuxuu go’aansaday in uu si qarsoodi ah u dilo, iyagoo ku xiray god ciriiri ah, kuna buufiyay sun. Ugu dambayn, Sheekha wuxuu shahiiday 28-kii Janaayo 1928-kii. Meydkiisi markii hore waxaa lagu aasay Qabuuraha Sheekh Cali Suufi ee ku dhow Madaxtooyada Soomaaliya amar ka yimid guumaysigii Talyaaniga, balse mar dambe waxaa dib loogu aasay Jiliyaale, sidii uu dardaarankiisu ahaa.

Dhaxalka Taariikheed.

Sheekh Xasan Barsane ma ahayn oo keliya halgamaa hub sitay, wuxuu ahaa caalim, wacyigeliye, hoggaamiye qaran, iyo astaan iska-caabin Soomaaliyeed. Taariikhdiisu waa xusuus mudan in la akhriyo, la keydiyo, lana gudbiyo jiilasha dambe.

Madaxweynaha Jamhuuriyadda Somaliland Cabdiraxmaan Maxamed Cabdillaahi Cirro muddada sannadka ah ee uu caynaanka u hayo Somaliland waxa uu ka qayb galay kulamo Caalami ah sida , Kulankii Wakiilada Adduunka ee Nairobi 2025, shirkii Waddamada Adduunka ee Dubai ka dhacay 2025, shirka dhaqaalaha adduunka ee Davos ka dhacay 2026, shirka waddamada adduunka ee ka dhacay Dubai 2026. Sidoo kale waxa uu waraysi siiyey Warbaahinta Caalamiga ah sida Sky news Arabic, Reuters iyo The Guardain, isaga oo laftiisuna maqaallo ayuu ku daabacay Warbaahin ay ka mid tahay The Wall Street Journal.

Dhammaanba shirarka, kulamada iyo saxaafadda uu la hadlay ama uu wax ku qoray madaxweyne Cirro waxa uu iska ilaaliyey in uu ka hadlo saddex arrimod.

1: Baahida Somaliland ka jirta iyo in uu dadka waxwaydiisto.

Madaxweyne Cirro mar kasta oo uu la kulmayo wefti caalami ah ama uu ka qayb galayo shir Caalami ah, waxa uu carrabkiisa ka ilaaliyaa in uu ka hadlo baahi Somaliland ka jirta ama in uu sheegto duruuf nololeed oo dadkiisa haysta. Waxa uu hadalkiisa xoogga ku saaraa in uu sheego fursadaha maal gashi ee Somaliland ka jira sida Macdanta, Kalluumaysiga, dekedaha, marinka Berbera iyo Khayraadka kale ee dabiiciga ah. Waxa uu si cad wakiiladii beesha Caalamka ee Nairobi uu kula kulmay uu u sheegay in aanu ugu iman baryo iyo in uu gacanta hoos dhigto si wax loo siiyo balse uu u yimid waxwadaqabsi

Shirarkii u dambeeyey ee Davos iyo Dubia waxa uu labada madaxweynuhu ku cel celiyey fursadaha dalkiisa ka jira iyo maal gashiga waddankiisa ka bannaan.

2: Is beddelka Cimilada.

Qodobka is beddelka cimiladu waxa uu muddooyinkii dambe ahaa qodob ay la soo shir tagaan madaxda reer Afrika kuwaas oo hoggaamiyeyaasha iyo Haayaddaha Caalamiga ah waydiista in laga caawiyo is beddelka Cimilada. Tusaale ahaan madaxweynaha Soomaaliya oo sannadkii hore ka qayb galay shirka loo dhan yahay Qaramada Midoobay waxa uu bulshada Caalamka waydiistay in laga caawiyo abaaraha oo uu ku tilmaamay in ay tahay natiijada is beddelka Cimilada.

Madaxweyne Cirro inkasta oo uu hoggaamiyo  Somaliland oo ay abaaro ka jiraan haddana waxa uu meesha ka saaray in uu dunida kala hadlo is beddelka cimilada iyo in lagu caawiyo waxa ay kaga hor tagaan cimilada sii xumaanaysa. Waxana madaxweyne Cirro u muuqdaa in uu dusha kala socdo diidmada madaxweyne Trump ee barmaamijan maadaama oo Trump uu joojiyey maal gelintii la siin jirey arrimaha is beddelka Cimilada adduunka isla markaana uu ka baxay madashii Paris.

3: In laga soo bilaabo taariikhda Somaliland 1991.

Muddo aad u dheer marka Somaliland laga sheekaynayo waxa taariikhdeeda laga soo bilaabi jirey 18 May 1991, markaas oo ahayd maalintii Burco lagaga dhawaaqay in ay Somaliland dib u soo ceshatay madax bannaanideedii 1960.

Madaxweyne Cirro,waraysigii ugu dambeeyey ee uu siiyey Warbaahinta Sky news Carabi iyo kuwii ka horreeyeyba waxa uu soo bandhigay in Somaliland leedahay taariikh fac weyn oo ka horraysay 1991. Waxa uu xoogga saaray in uu ka hadlo taariikhdii Somaliland ee ka horraysay 1960-kii. Si gaar ah waa uu Cirro diiradda u saaray midnimada Soomaaliyeed in aanay ahayn Muqdisho iyo Hargeysa balse ay tahay shantii Soomaaliyeed oo isku dhan.

Inqilaabkii fashilmay ee 1961 ay sameeyeen saraakiil u dhalatay Somaliland waxa uu madaxweyne Cirro ku fasiray  in ay ahayd doonista Somaliland maanta jirta oo xilligaas la baadi goobayey dib u soo celinteeda.

Dunida waxa uu tusay in Somaliland tahay dal la mid ah Afrikadii kale ee xornimada heshay 1960, iyo in xataa Somaliland ka taariikh horraysay Soomaaliya

Mogadishu, Somalia, 9 February 2026

The Federation of Somali Trade Unions - FESTU is participating in the opening session of a three-day training workshop on Green Climate Fund (GCF) frameworks, being held in Mogadishu.

The training is organised by the National Designated Authority (NDA) Office under the National Climate Fund (NCF) of Somalia, in collaboration with the Global Water Partnership (GWP).

The workshop brings together a broad range of stakeholders, including representatives from government institutions, civil society organisations, the private sector, trade unions, banking associations and academia. Its objective is to strengthen national capacity on GCF programming, and to promote an inclusive national approach to accessing climate finance.

The activity places strong emphasis on the meaningful engagement of all key stakeholders in strengthening climate finance frameworks, building climate resilience and supporting Somalia’s sustainable socio-economic development. 

FESTU championing the importance of fully integrating labour and employment considerations into climate finance processes, in line with the progress made by Somalia in advancing just transition principles in law and policy.

In ay ku hor yimaadaan Maxkamadda Muddo Soddon (30) maalmood gudahood ah oo ka bilaabanaysa maalinta Isniinta ah oo ay taariikhdu tahay Tr: 09/02/2026 kuna eg Tr. 11/03/2026, oo ah maalin Arbaco ah. saacaduna tahay 10:00 Barqanimo, si aad iskaga difaacdaan eedda uu idinku soo eedeeyay Xafiiska Xeer-ilaaliyaha Guud ee Qaranka.
Inaa ilayhu wa inaa ilayhu raajicuun waxa Alle ha  unaxriisto edo Caasha cali saayaq waxaan ilaahay uga baryayaa inuu Ilaahay u naxariisto kitaabkeedana midigta ka siiyo  aamiin aamiin Amiin

Dhismiha iyo adkaynta nidaam dowladeed oo xooggan, kaalinta ay haweenku ku leeyihiin waa mid aad u sarreysa. Gudaha Dalkeena haweenku waxay door muuqda ka qaataan bixinta naf-hurid, adkaynta isbeddellada dalka ka socda ee dhunaca horumarka iyo ka qaybgalka Arrimaha Bulshada.

Xisbiga Barwaaqo, isagoo si buuxda u garwaaqsan doorka muhiimka ah ee haweenku ku leeyihiin dhismaha qaranka, wuxuu si joogto ah ugu hawlan yahay hubinta ka-qaybgalka iyo ka-faa’iidaysiga haweenka ee dhammaan dhinacyada horumarka. 

Dowladda Wadajirku waxay sidoo kale dadaal ballaaran ku bixisay in haweenka loo abuuro fursado ay kaga mid noqdaan hoggaaminta dalka, gaar ahaan meelaha go’aan-qaadashada, si ay u helaan saamayn u dhiganta kaalintooda dhabta ah.

Haweenku waxay si isa soo taraysa uga qayb qaadanayaan dhinacyada siyaasadda, dhaqaalaha iyo arrimaha bulshada, iyagoo xaqiijinaya ka-faa’iidaysigooda iyo awood-siintooda.

Si arrintani u sii xoogaysato, waxaa si joogto ah loo fulinayaa barnaamijyo waaweyn oo dhiirrigelinaya ka-qaybgalka haweenka ee siyaasadda, isku-filnaanshahooda dhaqaale iyo horumarinta nolosha bulshada.

Iyadoo taasi laga duulayo, maanta waxaa Goboladda Deegaanka lagu soo gabo’gabeeyay kulan maalmihii lasoo dhaafay kasocday dhamaan dagmooyinka iyo qabaleeyada deegaanka taas oo diiradda lagu saarayay doorka haweenka ee geeddi-socodka isbeddelka, ka-qaybgalka iyo ka-faa’iidaysigooda, iyo jihada mustaqbalka.

Kulankan ayaa waxaa halku dhig u ahaaa “waxaan ku Xaqiijinayna Barwaaqada iyo Xasiloonida Dalkeena ka qaybgalka Haweenka”

Kulamadan oo ka dhacay gobaladda Deeganka ayaa hagayay Hoggaminta garabka haweenka ee Heer deegan heer gobol iyo heer maamul magaalo ee garabka Haweenka Xisbiga Barwaaqo laanta DDS.

Madaxa Garabka Haweenka Xisbiga Barwaaqo ee Laanta DDS, Marwo Samira Khadar, oo ka warbixisay doorka muhiimka ah ee haweenku ku leeyihiin hirgelinta isbeddelka dalka,ayaa carrabka ku adkaysay in haweenku ay door hormuud ah ka qaadanayaan dhammaan waaxaha dhaqaalaha, isla markaana la abuuray fursado iyo tallaabooyin isbeddel ah oo lagu xaqiijinayo ka-qaybgalka iyo ka-faa’iidaysiga haweenka. Sidoo kale, waxay xustay in kulankani uu ka socdo heer gobol ilaa heer heer tuulo.

Sida dayax 14 jooga muuqiisa loo wada arko ayaa loo wada arkaa natiijada wanaagsan ee ka dhalatay isbadelkii degaanka ka dhacay 2018. Dood magalin karo wanaaga iyo horumarka ka jira degaanka oo waa marag ma doon laakiin dulucda qormadani waa dib u xasuusin dambiilihii shalay si bulshadu u daalacato.

Falsafada iyo tiir dhexaadka afkaareed ee aragtida wadajir ee xisbiga barwaaqo waa adkaynta horumarkii hore u jiray, sixida qaladaadkii hore u dhacay iyo abuurida hal abuur cusub. Iyadoo ay jirto fursado badan oo la dayacay xiligii ka horeeyay isbadelka hadana la isuma diidana shaqooyinka kooban oo laga qabtay kabaayasha dhaqaalaha, xarumaha adeeg bixinta, iyo goobaha danta guud.

Ka sokow curinta hal abuuro cusub oo indhaha caalamka si weyn usoo jiitay oo laga hirgaliyay degaanka somalida hadana mudadii isbadelku jiray waxaa la tayeeyay oo wax badan laga qabtay xarumihii adeeg bixinta ee hore usii jiray iyadoo lagu sameeyay balaadhin, tayayn, casriyayn taas oo la gaadhsiiyay heer ay la jaanqaadi karaan dunida casriga ah.

Waxaaa laga soo gudbay siyaasad ku dhisnayd is liidid, ku liilsanaan shisheeye. Waxaa hore u jiray in dhaawac weyn loo geystay taariikhdii umada soomaaliyeed lahayd, isbadelka ka hor waxaa hoos loo dhigay meeqaamkii halyeeyadii somaliyeed ee muunada u ahaa shacabka badalkeeda waxaa loo sad buriyay oo la boqray saraakiil iyo shakhsiyaad dhibaato ba'an u geystay shacabka somaliyeed. Hogaamintii xiligaa jiray waxaa ku dhacay cudurka (sweden syndrome) oo ah xanuun jeclaysiinayay cadawga dhibaataynayay shacabkooda.  Tusaale waxaa inoogu filan shakhsigii loogu magacdaray dhakhtarka dhakhtar weyn ee sheekh xasan yabare, taariikhdii KALI tabin la rabay in lagu abuuro taariikh lid ku ah shacabka soomaaliyeed.

Waxaa laga soo gudbay dhaqaalihii weecsanaa ee u xidhnaa kooxaha gaarka ah ee ka macaashayay nolosha dadka. Kootada biyaha, raashinka, shiidka, saliida iyo wax kasta oo nolosha daruuri ah waxaa loo xidhay saraakiil lagaga doorsatay sidii idam looga heli lahaa lagu dhibaateeyo shacabka soomaaliyeed. Taas badalkeeda Isbadelka kadib waxaa abuurnay furfurnaan ganacsi, sinaaan dhaqaale, ka qeybgalka dhaqaale oo loo siman yahay.

Isbadelkii curtay sanadkii 2018 waxaa lasoo afjaray lana soo xidhay taariikh mugdi oo ku tilmaaman tacadi bulsho, xasuuq wadareed, bahdil iyo ihaano lagu sameeyo mus danbeedka iyo haldoorka bulshada, xukun xabsi oo si wadaag ama jumlo ah loo qeybsado, jeelal loogu magacdaray cadaabkii ifka, masaafurinta haldoorka ama qofka kasta o ka aragti duwanaa nidaamkii markaa jiray.

Isbadelka kadib waxaa lagu guulaysatay dhisida haayado dastuuri ah oo ku salaysan saraynta sharciga, adeegsiinta bulshada, iyo ilaalinta qiyamka, sharafta iyo karaamada bulshada. Waxaa meesha laga saaray dhaqankii kobcinta kali taliska iahaa in mizaaniyadii bulshada laga dhigay deeq ka timid shaqsi bulshada loogu mano sheegto.

Degaanka somalida maanta waxaa jira amni buuxa, degaan siyaasadeed, cabirka afkaaraha siyaasadeed oo xor ah. 

Waxaa hubaal ah Wiilashii ama walaalihii shalay is dili jiray maanta way istaageersadaan, gabdhihii shalay la bahdili jiray maanta waa la sharfaa, gadhcasaagi la dulmin jiray maanta waa la daaweeyay, bulshadii shalay la bahdili jiray maanta waa la boqraa. 

Baholyowga iyo hilawga dambiilayaashii shalay ay u qabaan dib u furida kawaankii dadka waa garasho jaan iyo maan guracan.

Sooyaal mugweyn barigan Ceelgabta Xawadle dariska ka ahayn.

🚨 Tax Fraud Awareness🚨

Let me say this loud and clear it pays to do good work. 

Why risk your freedom, your business, or your license doing bad business and putting a client in jeopardy?

This client went to someone who did her taxes wrong just to make the refund bigger. And now? The IRS came back and adjusted the return.

Refunds were reversed.
Penalties were added.
Interest kept growing.

I’ve seen refunds turn into tens of thousands owed. 

This is what tax fraud looks like:
❌ Inflating or making up medical expenses
❌ Claiming fuel tax credits you don’t qualify for
❌ Filing credits just to get a bigger refund

Let me be clear no tax preparer can guarantee you the max or biggest refund. 
The only thing guaranteed is what you rightfully qualify for. 

And yes signing your tax return matters. 

Before we file, clients must sign:
✔️ Consent to use
✔️ Consent to disclose
✔️ A form confirming you reviewed and agree with your return

Your signature means you reviewed the return and you stand behind what’s being filed.

This is part of IRS Circular 230 due diligence. 
We are required to ask questions, verify information, and protect both the client and ourselves.

Cutting corners isn’t helping the client it’s setting them up.

Good work protects your clients.
Good work protects your business.
Good work protects your freedom.

If you received an IRS notice or something doesn’t feel right about your return, don’t ignore it. Get it reviewed the right way.

Five more arrested, including former state employees, in $1.7M fraud scheme

TALLAHASSEE, Fla. (WCTV) - Five more people are charged in connection to a million dollar fraud scheme, Florida Chief Financial Officer Blaise Ingoglia announced.

Briana McCarthy if facing a litany of charges after allegedly defrauding state agencies out of $1.7 million by approving fraudulent property damage claims while she was working as a Risk Management Program Specialist for the Florida Department of Financial Services.

Now, five more people are facing fraud charges.

Brianna Hannan, a former employee of the Department of Business and Professional Regulation, is charged with Grand Theft, according to Ingoglia’s press release.

Arrest papers say Hannan was a subject of one of the fraudulent claims, resulting in her cashing a check for over $7,000.

Those documents said Hannan told investigators she knew a relative of McCarthy, but was not approached by anyone about the scheme. She also said, when shown a copy of the check she cashed, that she did not recognize it.

Carlotta Hawkins, also a former Department of Business and Professional Regulation employee, is charged with Grand Theft and Cash Deposit Bank Item with Intent to Defraud.

Arrest documents show Hawkins submitted a claim to the Department of Transportation and McCarthy asked her for documents related to claim, including a car VIN number and estimates of damage repair.

The VIN number provided did belong to Hawkins, but had not been involved in any crashes since 2021, according to arrest documents. The other documents were never provided, but McCarthy approved the claim, resulting in a check of over $7,000.

Arrest papers show Hawkins knew a relative of McCarthy’s who told her about the scheme.

Kearia Walker and Kavon Reese are also charged with Grand Theft.

Whitney Branch is charged with Grand Theft and Cash Deposit Bank Item with Intent to Defraud.

The three all allegedly cashed checks for over $7,000, according to arrest documents.

Additional arrests are expected to be made, according to the CFO press release.

Iyadoo cadaadis gudaha ah iyo hanjabaado dibadeed ay sii kordhayaan oo ka dhan ah Iiraan, weerar Maraykanku ku qaado dawladda Iiraan waxa uu sababi karaa burbur ku yimaadda nidaamka. Arrintaasina waxay u furi kartaa waddo dhowr gobol oo muddo dheer lahaa damac gooni-isu-taag ah. Kuwa ugu waaweyn ee la filan karo inay ku dhawaaqaan goosasho waa kuwaan:
1- Kurdistaan (Iiraan)
Kurdiintu waxay ku dadaalayaan inay helaan madax-bannaani, iyagoo taageero ka helaya xisbiyo hubeysan iyo taariikh dheer oo kacdoon ah, waxayna rabaan inay ku daydaan khibradda Maamul-Goboleedka Kurdistaan ee Ciraaq.
2- Al-Axwaaz / Arabistaan
Waa gobol hodan ku ah shidaalka oo ay deggan yihiin Carab. Dadka deegaanka waxay dalbanayaan gooni-isu-taag sababo la xiriira takoor, dayacaad iyo wasakhowga deegaanka. Waxa kale oo ka jira dhaqdhaqaaqyo hubeysan oo ku baaqaya soo celinta Dawladdii Arabistaan ee jirtay qiyaastii 100 sano ka hor.

Waxa deggan dad Azeri ah oo Turki ah. Dareenka qaranimo ayaa sii kordhaya, waxaana jira baaqyo ku aaddan midowga Jamhuuriyadda Azerbayjaan ama ka go’itaanka Iiraan, gaar ahaan iyadoo xiisadaha gobolka ay sii kacayaan.
4- Baluujistaan
Waa gobol ay ku badan yihiin Baluujiyiinta Sunniyiinta ah, kana mid ah meelaha ugu saboolsan Iiraan. Waxa ka hawlgala kooxo hubeysan sida “Jaish al-Adl” oo weerarro joogto ah ku qaada Ilaalada Kacaanka Iiraan.

COLOMBO (News 1st); Sri Lanka has recorded a notable improvement in its global standing on the Corruption Perceptions Index (CPI) 2025 by Transparency International, marking one of the country’s most significant jumps in recent years.

According to the latest CPI release, Sri Lanka has risen from Rank 121 in 2024 to Rank 107 in 2025, reflecting a 14‑position climb.

The Corruption Perceptions Index (CPI) is the most widely used global corruption ranking in the world. It measures how corrupt each country’s public sector is perceived to be.

In 2024, Sri Lanka hit its worst-ever CPI rank of 121, placing it among the most corrupt third of the 180 countries reviewed.

The CPI ranks 182 countries and territories by their perceived levels of public sector corruption on a scale of zero (highly corrupt) to 100 (very clean).

The global average score stands at 42 out of 100, its lowest level in more than a decade, pointing to a concerning downward trend that will need to be monitored over time.

The vast majority of countries are failing to keep corruption under control: more than two-thirds – 122 out of 180 – score under 50.

For the eighth year in a row, Denmark obtains the highest score on the index (89) and is closely followed by Finland (88) and Singapore (84).

Countries with the lowest scores overwhelmingly have severely repressed civil societies and high levels instability like South Sudan (9), Somalia (9) and Venezuela (10).

Transparency International says that corruption is worsening globally, with even established democracies experiencing rising corruption amid a decline in leadership.

The annual index shows that the number of countries scoring above 80 has shrunk from 12 a decade ago to just five this year.

TI data show that democracies, typically stronger on anti-corruption than autocracies or flawed democracies, are experiencing a worrying decline in performance.

Nigerian 🇳🇬 National Shot Dead at Filling Station in Johannesburg

A Nigerian man, identified as Emeka Uzor, has been shot dead at a filling station in Johannesburg, South Africa 🇿🇦, in a tragic incident that has sparked outrage within the Nigerian community.

The shooting reportedly occurred on Sunday afternoon at a petrol station in Windsor East, Randburg, while the victim was inside his vehicle. Details surrounding the motive and the identity of the shooter remain unclear as investigations continue.

Nigerian community groups in South Africa, including NUSA and NICASA, have strongly condemned the killing, describing it as deeply disturbing and part of a growing concern over the safety of Nigerian nationals in the country.

There are also reports of possible protests as the community demands justice.

South African authorities have confirmed that a murder case has been opened, though no arrests have been announced so far.

WAR-MURTIYEED / BAY’AAN RASMI AH

Ka soo baxay: Xafiiska Madaxweynaha, Dawlad-goboleedka Jubaland
Ku socota: Beesha Caalamka (Qaramada Midoobay, Midowga Afrika, IGAD, iyo Saaxiibada Caalamiga ah)
Mowduuca: Baaq Degdeg ah oo ku Saabsan Dabaqida Mas’uuliyadda Ilaalinta (R2P) ee Jubaland

Madaxweynaha Dawlad-goboleedka Jubaland, Marwo Suuban Mahad Dirir, waxa ay mar labaad si rasmi ah ugu baaqaysaa Beesha Caalamka in si degdeg ah Jubaland loogu dabaqo mabda’a Mas’uuliyadda Ilaalinta (Responsibility to Protect – R2P). Dowladda Federaalka Soomaaliya (DFS) si cad ayaa ugu fashilantay waajibaadkeedii dastuuriga ahaa ee ilaalinta nolosha, amniga, iyo xuquuqda aasaasiga ah ee shacabka Jubaland.

Muddo afar (4) sano ah oo uu Madaxweyne Xasan Sheekh Maxamuud xilka hayay, shacabka Jubaland waxa si nidaamsan loogu soo rogay xayiraado siyaasadeed, amni, iyo dhaqaale. Tallaabooyinkan ayaa sababay burbur maamul, dhibaato dhaqaale oo culus oo si gaar ah u saameeyey rayidka, xasuuq shacab, iyo barakac baahsan—gaar ahaan magaalada Baladxaawo. Natiijada ka dhalatay ayaa keentay firaaq amni oo kooxaha argagixisada si toos ah uga faa’iideysteen, taasoo xoojisay khatarta bini’aadantinimo.

Madaxweynaha Jubaland waxa ay caddeyneysaa in dalka uu wajahayo laba xaaladood oo halis ah: abaar daran iyo kala-guur sharciyeed. Dibu-dhiska hay’adaha Dawladda Soomaaliya wuxuu marayaa marxalad nugul oo halis ah, iyadoo nidaamkii dastuuriga ahaa la jebiyey, awooddii dawladnimadana lagu beddelay xoog, hub, iyo caburin siyaasadeed. Dhaqankii hoggaamiye-kooxeedyada (warlordism) ayaa si cad u soo laabtay, halkaas oo awood lagu kasbado hub iyo dhaqaale halkii ay ka ahaan lahayd sharciyad ka dhalata rabitaanka shacabka.

Madaxweynihii hore ee Jubaland, Axmed Maxamed Islaam (Ahmed Madobe), waxa uu doonayaa in hubka iyo dhaqaalaha loogu talagalay dib-u-dhiska maamulka—kuwaas oo Beesha Caalamku ku bixisay magaca shacabka Jubaland—uu si xoog ah ugu sii hayo laba (2) degmo oo ka tirsan Jubada Hoose, isaga oo ku duudsiinaya shacabka Jubaland xaqooda masiir-go’aamin, inkasta oo muddadii xilkiisu si rasmi ah u dhammaatay. Tallaabooyinkan waxay si cad u hor istaagayaan mustaqbalka siyaasadeed iyo maamulka Jubaland.

Sidoo kale, Madaxweyne Xasan Sheekh Maxamuud waxa uu adeegsaday awoodda DFS si uu talada dalka xoog ugu sii hayo, isaga oo baabi’iyey heshiiskii dastuuriga ahaa, laalay nidaamkii wada-ogolaanshaha, isla markaana ku takri-falay dhaqaalihii Beesha Caalamka loogu talagalay dib-u-dhiska dawladnimada, iyo dhulalka dawladda ee danta guud, gaar ahaan Gobolka Banaadir.

Madaxweynaha Jubaland waxa ay caddeyneysaa in aysan dalka ka jirin hannaan wax-ku-ool ah oo isla-xisaabtan sharciyeed, maadaama uusan jirin Maxkamad Dastuuri ah, isla markaana Labada Aqal ee Baarlamaanka Federaalka ay ku dhaqmayaan hab-dhaqan ka baxsan xeerarkii dawladnimada. Iyadoo lagu jiro marxalad kala-guur ah, Jubaland waxa ay ku qasbanaatay in si ku-meel-gaar ah uga baxdo nidaamka DFS ilaa laga helayo xal sharci ah oo loo dhan yahay, kana tarjumaya rabitaanka shacabka.

Iyada oo ay jirto xaaladahan, Madaxweynaha Dawlad-goboleedka Jubaland waxa ay si cad, mas’uuliyad leh, kuna saleysan waajibaad sharci iyo anshax uga codsanaysaa Beesha Caalamka in:

1. Lagu dabaqo mabda’a Mas’uuliyadda Ilaalinta (R2P) ee Jubaland;

2. Loo sugo ilaalinta shacab iyo bixinta gargaar bini’aadantinimo oo degdeg ah;

3. Loo taageero dhismaha maamul daahfuran oo loo dhan yahay, kuna saleysan wada-hadal, dib-u-heshiisiin, iyo ka-qaybgal ballaaran oo shacabka ah;

4. Loo hortago in kooxaha argagixisadu ka faa’iideystaan firaaqa maamul iyo burburka sharci;

Tallaabo degdeg ah oo ka timaada Beesha Caalamka ayaa muhiim u ah badbaadinta nolosha iyo amniga shacabka Jubaland, iyo ka hortagga sii xumaanta xaaladaha bini’aadantinimo iyo siyaasadeed ee hadda ka jira.

Kabo qaadnimo weliga iska dhaaf hadii kale meel cidla ayaad ku soo dhaceee yaab unukaa argney shaleyna caaac Laftagareen amaan hababac ayuu ku hayay leef leef dhibkan ayuu leyahay meshaadii horey ku laabo hhhh hhh 🤣😅🤣🤣🤣🤣🤣🤣🤣🤣🤣🤣🤣🤣🤣

Caasimada Jigjiga waxaa ka jirta Mashruuc la dhaho "MASHRUUCA LA DAGAALANKA AFKA SOOMALIYEED"   
  
Meheradaha iyo Aqoonsiga Lumaya Caasimada Jigjiga waxaa si aamusan uga socda mashruuc aan waraaqo iyo miisaaniyad toona lahayn, balse leh saameyn ka khatar badan mashruuc kasta oo muuqda. Waa mashruuc lagu wiiqayo, laguna tirtirayo afka, aqoonsiga iyo is-aqoonsiga Soomaalinimada mana aha mid ay wadaan dad shisheeye, ee waa mid ay gacmaheena ku wadaan dadkeennii.

Marka aad dhex marto waddooyinka Jigjiga, indhahaaga waxa ku hor imanaya magacyo qalaad: kuwo Ingiriis ah, Talyaani ah, xataa magacyo magaalooyin reer galbeed ah. Dukaan kasta, hudheel kasta, maqaaxi kasta, timo-jare kasta hal magac oo Soomaali ah kuma qorna. Waxaad is weydiinaysaa: meeshan ma Jigjiga baa mise waa magaalo kale oo aynu ku marti nahay?

Waxaa ka sii yaab badan in boqolkiiba sagaashan (90%) iyo wax ka badan ganacsatadaas ay yihiin Soomaali asal ah, kana mid ah dadka ugu horreeya ee ku faani lahaa afkooda, dhaqankooda iyo taariikhdooda haddana marka ay timaaddo magaca meheradooda, waxa ay doortaan magac aysan garanayn macnihiisa, kana tarjumin wax iyaga quseeya.

Waa su’aal feker u baahan:
Maxaa ku kalifaya qofka somaaliga ee deeganka u dhahay ee Ganacsadaha ah in uu meheraddiisa u bixiyo “ISTARLIIN, BARLIN, KING, TOP, CLASSIC.. Iwom” halkii uu ku qori lahaa “Qoraxay, Faafan, Nogob, Sayid, Garaad, Ugaas.. Iwom”? Maxaa u diidaya in uu doorto magac halgamaa Soomaaliyeed, abwaan, magaalo soomaaliyeed, ama eray qurux badan oo afkeenna hooyo ah? Ma magaca ayaa ganacsiga burburinaya, mise innaga ayaa aaminsan in afkeenna aanu qiimo lahayn.?

Dhibku ma aha magac keliya ee waa maskax la gumaystay. Waa fikrad na dhex gashay oo leh: “Haddii uu magacu qalaad yahay, waa horumar; haddii uu Soomaali yahay, waa dib u socod.” Fikraddaas waa tan ugu halista badan ee ummad geli karta, maxaa yeelay marka aad afkaaga hoos u dhigto, waxaad hoos u dhigtay jiritaankaaga oo dhan.

Afku waa taariikh, waa dhaqan, waa sharaf, waa jiritaan. Ummad aan afkeeda ku qorin meheradeeda, Ganacsigeeda, maalin bay iman doontaa aan ku hadlin afkeeda, dabadeedna aan ku fakarin afkeeda halkaasna waa dhammaadka mashruuca.

Haddaan maanta ka aamusan nahay magacyada Meharadaha Soomaalida ku qoran, berri caruurteenna ayaa na weydiin doona: “Aabbayaal, hooyooyin, afkan Soomaaliyeed xaggee baad ku waysay?” Jawaabtaasna ma fududa.

Sidaas awgeed, dib ha loo milicsado, dib ha loo fekero. Ganacsigu wuu kori karaa magac kasta, balse afku haddii uu dhaco, ganacsi, sharaf iyo qaranimo toona lama hayo.

Shacabka Somaliland ayaa weli wajahaya caqabado culus oo ka dhashay hirgelinta nidaamka e-Visa-ha Dowladda Federaalka Soomaaliya, kaas oo si toos ah u saameeyay isu-socodka muwaadiniinta Somaliland, gaar ahaan kuwa u safra dalalka dibadda ama ka soo dega garoomada caalamiga ah ee Soomaaliya.
Dhibaatooyinkan ayaa ka dhashay iyadoo nidaamka e-Visa-ha lagu saleeyay aqoonsi iyo dukumeenti aysan Somaliland aqoonsanayn, taas oo sababtay in muwaadiniin badan loo diido fiisooyin, loo hakiyo safarro, ama lagu qasbo habraacyo sharci darro ah oo ka baxsan nidaamkooda dawladnimo.

Dhanka kale, Wasaaradda Duulista iyo Hawada Somaliland ayaa lagu eedeeyay inay ku fashilantay qaadista tallaabooyin wax ku ool ah oo lagu difaacayo xuquuqda muwaadiniinta, isla markaana ay ku guul-darraysatay la-xisaabtanka hay’adaha caalamiga ah ee duulista iyo shirkadaha diyaaradaha ee qaata nidaamka e-Visa-ha Soomaaliya.

Muddo dheer ayaa laga sugayay Wasaaraddu inay keento:
Istaraatijiyad cad oo lagu maareeyo saamaynta e-Visa-ha

SHIRKA WADAHADALKA SIYAASADDA (POLICY DIALOGUE) 9-10 FEBRAAYO, MUQDISHO.

Hay’adda Iskalaaji Cultural and Awareness Agency ICAA ayaa si rasmi ah uga qaybgashay Shirweynaha Qaran ee Policy Dialogue oo lagu qabtay magaalada Muqdisho 9 kii iyo 10-kii Febraayo 2026, kaas oo ay soo qabanqaabisay Somalia Non State Actors.
 
Shirkan muhiimka ah ayaa isu keenay ururrada bulshada rayidka ah, hay’adaha dowladda, aqoonyahanno, odayaasha dhaqanka iyo saaxiibada horumarinta, si loo xoojiyo wada hadalka ku saabsan dowlad-wanaagga, xasilloonida, nabadda, iyo horumarka waara ee 
dalka. 

Ujeeddada & Diiradda Shirweynaha 

Shirku wuxuu si gaar ah diiradda u saaray mowduuca: 

“Casharrada laga bartay deegaannada la xoreeyay iyo sidii loo gaari lahaa xasillooni waarta.” 

Ujeeddadu waxay ahayd in la falanqeeyo: 
- Saameynta xagjirnimada 
- Caqabadaha xasillinta 
- Doorka bulshada iyo dowladda 
- Xalka waara ee nabadda iyo maamul-dhisidda 

Waxaa sidoo kale lagu adkeeyay muhiimadda iskaashi dhab ah, isku-duwid, iyo ka-qaybgal ballaaran. 

Furitaanka & Khudbadaha Muhiimka ah 
Guddoomiyaha Somalia Non State Actors, Mudane Osman Moallim Shatah, ayaa furitaanka shirka ka jeediyay khudbad dhiirrigelin leh, isagoo adkeeyay doorka khubarada, aqoonyahannada, iyo ka-qaybgalayaasha, kuna boorriyay in si firfircoon loo galo doodaha si loo helo talooyin wax ku ool ah. 

Sidoo kale, shirka waxaa si rasmi ah u daahfurtay Senator Seynab Ismail Mohamed, taas oo si qoto dheer uga hadashay: 

• Muhiimadda isla-xisaabtanka 
• Doorka Bulshada Rayidka 
• Nidaamka hubinta iyo is-miisaamidda 
• Horumarka amniga Muqdisho 

Waxay xustay in iskaashiga hay’adaha dowladda uu horseeday horumar muuqda oo dhinaca amniga ah. 

Doodaha & Panel-yada Shirweynaha 
Panel-ka Koowaad 

Panel-kan ayaa diiradda saaray aragtiyada bulshada ee deegaannada la xoreeyay, gaar ahaan: 

• Amniga iyo baahiyaha degdegga ah 
• Ka-qaybgalka go’aan-qaadashada 
• Doorka haweenka, dhallinyarada, iyo kooxaha nugul 
Doodahaasi waxay muujinayeen muhiimadda maamul loo dhan yahay si loo gaaro nabad waarta. 

Intii ay dooddu socotay, Marwo Duniya Mohamed Ali ayaa carrabka ku adkaysay baahida loo qabo in si dhab ah loo wajaho xaqiiqada ka jirta deegaannada dowladda ka maqan tahay, iyadoo xustay: 
Joogitaanka dowladda Isku-duwidda hay’adaha Buuxinta farqiga adeegyada. Sidoo kale, Xildhibaanad Caddar Cali Maxamed ayaa iftiimisay doorka Baarlamaanka ee xasillinta iyo dowlad-dhiska, iyadoo adkaysay muhiimadda isla-xisaabtanka, wada shaqeynta hay’adaha, iyo gaarsiinta adeegyada dowladda. 

Panel-ka Labaad 
Panel-kan waxaa lagu falanqeeyay casharrada laga bartay barnaamijyada xasillinta, waxaana si gaar ah uga hadlay Mudane Osman Moallim Shatah, oo xusay: 

• Saameynta khilaafaadka qabiilka 
• Ilaalinta rayidka 
• Ka-qaybgalka bulshada 
• Farqiga u dhexeeya qorsheynta iyo hirgelinta dhabta ah 

Waxaa si cad loo muujiyay in xasillinta guuleysata ay ku xirnaan karto faham dhab ah, wada tashi, iyo fulin hufan. 

Doorka & Ka-Qaybgalka ICAA 
Intii uu shirku socday, ICAA waxay si firfircoon uga qaybqaadatay doodaha iyo wadahadallada, iyadoo la wadaagtay waayo-aragnimadeeda ku saabsan: 
      - Wacyigelinta bulshada 
       - Nabadda iyo is-dhexgalka 
       - Doorka farshaxanka iyo dhaqanka 
       - Ka-qaybgalka dhalinyarada 

Sidoo kale, ICAA waxay jeedisay hadal wax ku ool ah oo lagu adkeeyay in dhaqanka, farshaxanka, suugaanta, iyo hal-abuurka loo adeegsado xoojinta dowlad-dhiska iyo midnimada ummadda. 

Gunaanad 

Ka-qaybgalka Shirweynaha Policy Dialogue wuxuu mar kale muujiyay: 

In ICAA ay tahay hay’ad kamid ah Hay’adaha Ururada Bulshada Rayidka islamarkaana ka go’an tahay inay doowr muhiim ah ka ciyaarto dowlad dhiska Soomaaliya.

ICAA waxay xaqiijinaysaa: 
 - In wada-hadal furan uu yahay furaha horumarka 
 - In iskaashi dhab ah uu keeno xalal waara 
 - In codka bulshada rayidka uu yahay tiirka dowlad-wanaagga 

ICAA waxay sii wadi doontaa dadaalladeeda ku aaddan: 
 -  Nabadda 
 -  Wacyigelinta 
 -  Xasilloonida 
 -  Midnimada 
 -  Horumarka waara 

Ayadoo kaashanaysa  adeegsanaysa dhaqan, hal abuur, farshaxan, aqoon, iyo wada-shaqeyn, 

“waxaan inaga go’an in aan door muuqda ka qaadanno dhismaha mustaqbal ifaya oo ay wada leeyihiin dhammaan shacabka Soomaaliyeed.”

Transparency International has released its annual Corruption Perception Index (CPI) for 182 countries, revealing a global drop in public sector integrity. The worldwide average score fell to 42 out of 100, marking its lowest point in over ten years.
The top-performing nations, considered least corrupt, include Denmark (89), Finland (88), Singapore (84), New Zealand (81), and Norway (81). Conversely, South Sudan (9), Somalia (9), Venezuela (10), Libya (13), and Yemen (13) were ranked at the bottom.

The United States (64) slipped to 29th place, its lowest rank and score since changes to the CPI methodology in 2012. Previously, the U.S. peaked with a score of 76 in 2015. Transparency International pointed to concerns over recent government actions that have weakened key oversight bodies, especially the Department of Justice.

There are further worries about the politicization of prosecutorial decisions and attempts to use governmental power against political opponents, along with acts that potentially undermine judicial independence—a crucial safeguard against corruption.
Moreover, the "temporary freeze" and diminished enforcement of the Foreign Corrupt Practices Act (FCPA), which prohibits U.S. entities from bribing foreign officials, suggest a growing tolerance for corrupt conduct. Actions targeting NGOs, journalists, and other independent voices have also reduced public accountability and transparency. Cuts to U.S. aid for overseas civil societies have weakened broader international anti-corruption efforts.

The report highlights that the decline in the U.S. score reflects a broader pattern among established democracies, where risks of corruption are rising due to polarization and increasing private money influence in politics. Experts caution that this negative trend may persist without decisive leadership to restore standards and enforcement.

post_author_name_pi: Ambassade de la République de  Djibouti au Royaume du Maroc
post_text_pi:
La Coupe d’Afrique des Nations (CAN) 2025 avec un format de 24 équipes réparties en groupes, organisée par le Royaume du Maroc du 21 décembre 2025 au 18 janvier 2026, a constitué un événement sportif continental majeur, offrant une vitrine significative des capacités organisationnelles, infrastructurelles et sécuritaires du pays hôte, tout en contribuant au rayonnement du football africain 
Le Royaume du Maroc a assuré l’organisation de la CAN 2025 à travers un dispositif institutionnel coordonné, mobilisant l’ensemble des administrations concernées, en étroite collaboration avec la Confédération Africaine de Football (CAF).
Les rencontres se sont déroulées dans plusieurs villes hôtes dotées de stades modernisés ou rénovés conformément aux standards internationaux. Le Maroc a exploité neuf stades modernes répartis dans six villes (Rabat, Casablanca, Tangier, Marrakech, Agadir et Fez), tous aux normes internationales en termes de sécurité, confort et capacités d’accueil. 
Les installations incluent :
- Stades rénovés ou modernisés avec zones médias et logistique adaptées.
- Fan zones et espaces publics aménagés pour les supporters, dotés d’écrans géants et services annexes. 
- Aéroports et transports améliorés pour fluidifier les flux de visiteurs et délégations. 
L’accueil a aussi bénéficié d’un plan de transport spécifique impliquant notamment la compagnie nationale pour transporter des centaines de milliers de supporters vers le Royaume. 
Un dispositif sécuritaire global, intégré et préventif a été mis en place, reposant sur une coordination étroite entre les forces de sécurité, les autorités locales et les services de gestion des événements. La sécurisation des stades, des fan zones, des axes de transport et des sites sensibles a permis d’assurer le bon déroulement de la compétition.  
La CAN 2025 a suscité une forte mobilisation populaire, tant au niveau national que continental.
La présence massive de supporters africains, conjuguée à l’organisation de fan zones et d’activités culturelles, a contribué à instaurer un climat festif et inclusif, renforçant le sentiment d’unité et de solidarité autour du football africain. La compétition a bénéficié d’une large couverture médiatique régionale et internationale.
Plus de 1,1 million de spectateurs enregistrés dans les stades après les quarts de finale, selon les chiffres officiels. 66526 spectateurs ont été enregistrés au stade Prince Moulay Abdellah de Rabat lors de la finale qui a opposé le Maroc contre le Sénégal et 3,37 millions de téléspectateurs sur la chaine M6.
De plus, le Maroc a enregistré un record touristique pour l'année 2025 avec près de 20 millions de visiteurs, dont une part significative est liée à l'événement sportif, avec une affluence exceptionnelle dans les villes hôtes.
• Participation de Djibouti à la CAN 2025 
Djibouti a été représentée à la Coupe d’Afrique des Nations 2025 par plusieurs responsables et officiels appelés à exercer des fonctions techniques, administratives et arbitrales au sein de la Confédération Africaine de Football (CAF). 
Cette représentation de haut niveau s’est notamment illustrée par la présence et l’implication de M. Souleiman Hassan Waberi, Président de la Fédération Djiboutienne de Football et vice-président de La CAF, Membre du conseil de la FIFA, de Mr Yacin Robleh Responsable du département Juridique et discipline de la CAF, de Mr Liban Djama Toukhaleh, Responsable Logistique CAF, de Mr Mohamed Robleh Djama, membre du département juridique, de Mr Mohamed Houssein Ali, Fitness Coatch des arbitres élites CAF, de Mr Mohamed Moumin Ali, Commissaire de match et
M. Liban Abdoulrazack, désigné meilleur arbitre assistant CAF 2025 (Djibouti). 
Tous ont apporté une contribution significative au bon déroulement de la compétition, en veillant au respect des standards organisationnels et réglementaires de la CAF, ainsi qu’à la promotion des valeurs d’équité, de transparence et de professionnalisme. Cette participation témoigne de l’implication active de la Fédération Djiboutienne de Football et de la reconnaissance de ses compétences au sein des instances continentales du football africain.
• Victoire historique du Sénégal en finale de la CAN 2025
Le Sénégal a remporté la Coupe d'Afrique des Nations (CAN) 2025. Les Lions de la Teranga se sont imposés 1-0 face au Maroc, pays hôte, lors de la finale disputée le dimanche 18 janvier 2026, grâce à un but de Pape Gueye inscrit durant la prolongation. Cette victoire marque le deuxième titre de champion d'Afrique de l'histoire du Sénégal. Le match pour la troisième place a été remporté par le Nigeria, qui s'est imposé face à l'Égypte aux tirs au but.
• Organisation exemplaire du Maroc à la CAN 2025
Le Royaume du Maroc mérite d’être chaleureusement félicité pour la qualité de l’organisation de la Coupe d’Afrique des Nations 2025 laquelle a pleinement démontré la capacité du pays à accueillir et à conduire avec succès des événements sportifs continentaux de grande envergure. Cette réussite consacre le Maroc comme un acteur incontournable du sport africain. Le succès logistique, infrastructurel et médiatique de cette compétition témoigne d’une expertise confirmée et d’un engagement constant en faveur du développement et de la promotion du sport africain. 
Bravo au Royaume du Maroc et à l’équipe nationale des Lions de l’Atlas pour leur parcours remarquable lors de la Coupe d’Afrique des Nations 2025. Malgré une défaite en finale face au Sénégal, les joueurs marocains ont fait preuve, tout au long de la compétition, d’une combativité exemplaire, d’un talent confirmé et d’une détermination sans faille, parvenant à atteindre la finale devant leur public. Cette performance de haut niveau a suscité une immense fierté au sein de toute la nation.
Bravo au champion de l’Afrique, aux Lions de la Teranga. La République du Sénégal et son équipe nationale ont réalisé un parcours exceptionnel lors de la Coupe d’Afrique des Nations 2025, faisant preuve d’un talent remarquable, d’une détermination sans faille et d’un esprit sportif exemplaire. Chaque match a été l’occasion pour les joueurs sénégalais de démontrer leur cohésion, leur discipline tactique et leur engagement envers leur public.
A l’issue de la Coupe d'Afrique des Nations (CAN) 2025, les responsables djiboutiens ont rendu visite à l’Ambassade de la République de Djibouti à Rabat, où ils ont été accueillis par Son Excellence M. l’Ambassadeur Mohamed Douhour Hersi et le personnel diplomatique.

2025 CORRUPTION PERCEPTIONS INDEX (CPI) REPORT RELEASED 🌍

According to the 2025 Corruption Perceptions Index (CPI) released by Transparency International, South Sudan and Somalia rank as the most corrupt countries globally this year.

Other African nations listed among the global top five most corrupt countries include Libya, Eritrea, and Sudan.

On a more encouraging note, Seychelles leads Africa as the least corrupt nation, followed by Cape Verde, Botswana, and Rwanda, reflecting stronger governance efforts and institutional reforms in those countries.

Transparency International cautioned that corruption remains a serious global threat, fueled by weak political will, weakening democratic institutions, and governance challenges. The 2025 CPI assessed 182 countries worldwide, and notably, no African country ranked among the global top 10 least corrupt nations a list largely dominated by European states.

This report serves as both a warning and a call to action. Corruption affects development, weakens trust in institutions, and limits opportunities for citizens. At the same time, progress in some African countries shows that reform and accountability are possible.

Pictured are girls from Central Hagadera Primary and Junior School in Dadaab Refugee Camp, eagerly taking turns to observe a specimen under the microscope. To the untrained eye, it may look like an ordinary school activity, but in reality, it represents the promise of future scientists in the making.

Despite their passion and potential, many refugee girls continue to face significant barriers in accessing quality education. Through UNICEF PROSPECTS 2.0, LWF is promoting STEM education in the camps by providing the essential learning materials and tools needed to make hands-on science learning possible.

This initiative is currently underway in both Kakuma and Dadaab. And on this #InternationalDayofWomenandGirlsinScience, we join the world in celebrating the brilliance, resilience, and limitless potential of girls everywhere, ensuring that no future scientist is left behind. 

w/UNICEF Kenya, UNHCR KENYA, The Lutheran World Federation

Haddii beelaha Hawiye ay heleen laba xildhibaan oo keliya, su’aal sharci iyo mid cadaalad ah ayaa halkaas ka dhalanaysa. Marka la eego tirada iyo miisaanka bulshada, waxaa la isweydiin karaa in matalaaddu ay noqotay mid dheellitiran mise ay jirto sinnaan la’aan muuqata.

Haddii tirada guud ee kuraasta la helay ay gaareyso 23 iyo ka badan, dooddu waxay noqonaysaa in beelaha qaarkood ay heleen matalaad ka badan tan ay xaqa u lahaayeen, halka kuwo kalena ay ka heleen wax ka yar intii ay tiradoodu iyo saamigoodu u oggolaanayeen. Qaar badan ayaa aaminsan in Hawiye ay xaq u lahaayeen ugu yaraan 10 xildhibaan marka la eego miisaankooda bulsho iyo taariikhda doorkooda.

Arrintani waxay u baahan tahay hufnaan, wada-tashi iyo nidaam caddaalad ku dhisan si matalaadda siyaasadeed ay u noqoto mid ku saleysan sinaan iyo wadajir, halkii ay noqon lahayd mid dareen cabasho dhalisa.

Horumarka Degdegga ah ee Caasimadda Waqooyi Bari Soomaaliya – Laascaanood

Laascaanood, oo ah caasimadda Waqooyi Bari Soomaaliya, waxay maanta tusaale cad u tahay dib-u-soo kabasho, horumar iyo isbeddel muuqda. Muddo dheer, qurba-joogta ka soo jeeda gobolka oo ka mid ah dadka ugu dhaqaalaha badan Soomaaliya, waxay ka gaabsadeen inay maalgashi ku sameeyaan deegaankooda sababo la xiriiray xaaladihii amni iyo maamul ee ka jiray xilligii ay gacanta ku hayeen kooxaha gooni-u-goosadka ah.

Bishii Agoosto 2023, kadib sagaal bilood oo dagaal adag socday, kooxihii gooni-u-goosadka ahaa ayaa laga saaray magaalada. Intii uu dagaalku socday waxaa dhacay tacaddiyo ay ka mid ahaayeen dilal loo geystay haween, carruur iyo dad rayid ah, sidoo kalena waxaa ay gooni goosatadu burbur xooggan garsiiyeen kaabayaashii dhaqaalaha iyo adeegyada bulshada.

Maanta, wax ka yar saddex sano gudahood, Laascaanood waxay ku tallaabsatay horumar la taaban karo. Waxaa dib loo dhisay wadooyin, xarumo dowladeed iyo kaabayaal kale oo muhiim ah. Waxaa si xawli ah u soo kordhaya hudheello casri ah, maqaayado tayo leh iyo goobo ganacsi oo muujinaya koboca dhaqaale ee magaalada.

Amniga magaalada ayaa si weyn loo adkeeyay, iyadoo la dhisay adeegyo amni oo lagu kalsoonaan karo. Sidoo kale, adeegyada dowladeed ee heer dowlad goboleed iyo heer federaalba waxay noqdeen kuwo si hufan oo joogto ah u shaqeeya, taas oo kor u qaadday kalsoonida shacabka iyo maalgashadayaasha.

Waxaa muuqata tartan xooggan oo u dhexeeya shirkadaha iyo bixiyeyaasha adeegyada, kuwaas oo doonaya inay ka qayb qaataan dib u dhiska iyo horumarinta magaalada. Shirkadaha dhismaha ayaa si gaar ah u soo bandhigaya xirfadooda, iyagoo dhisaya guryo casri ah, dhismayaal ganacsi iyo xarumo adeegyo kala duwan leh. Tani waxay astaan u tahay kalsoonida sii kordheysa ee lagu qabo mustaqbalka Laascaanood iyo guud ahaan degaanada Waqooyi Bari Somalia.

Guud ahaan, Laascaanood maanta waxay ka gudubtay marxalad adag, waxayna u jihaysatay mustaqbal ifaya oo ku dhisan nabad, midnimo iyo horumar waara. Horumarka degdegga ah ee ka socda magaalada wuxuu dhiirrigelin u yahay dhammaan bulshada Soomaaliyeed, gaar ahaan qurba joogta oo hadda si firfircoon uga qayb qaadanaya dhismaha iyo kobcinta caasimaddooda.

Dhibaatada dhismaha qaran ma aha mid ku kooban dhaqaale yari ama juqraafi adag; waa dhibaato ka timaadda wacyi siyaasadeed iyo akhlaaqeed oo liita.  
Dalalku ma burburaan oo keliya marka ay dagaallo ama faqri wajahaan, balse waxay burburaan marka  fikradda “qaran” laga dhigo hanti gaar ah oo ay qaybsadaan qabiillo iyo kooxo dano gaar ah leh.

Bulshooyinka aan weli ka gudbin heerka qabiilka, dowladdu badanaa waa magac uun. Dastuur baa yaalla, hay’ado baa jira, balse go’aanka dhabta ah waxa lagu gaaraa meel ka baxsan nidaamkaas.

Marka qabiilku galo siyaasadda, ma dhiso dowladnimo; wuxuu abuuraa qaybsasho kursi iyo awood ku salaysan tiro iyo tol. Ma keeno xasillooni waarta; wuxuu abuuraa cabsi isu dheellitir ku meel gaar ah.

Maamul kasta oo ku dhisan qabiil wuu ka baqaa mustaqbalka, maxaa yeelay ma ku tiirsana heshiis bulsho oo caddaalad ku dhisan, balse wuxuu ku tiirsan yahay isbahaysiyo jilicsan oo ku burburi kara muran kasta oo ku saabsan “qaybsiga”.

#CABASHO : BILAA WAX-QABAD, XIDHITAANKA DUGSIYADA, IYO MUSUQMAASUQ KA JIRTA WASAARADDA WAXBARASHADA GOBOLKA SANAAG

Waxaan si cad ugu cabanaynaa xaaladda liidata, dayacaadda joogtada ah, iyo bilaa wax-qabadka ka jira xafiiska Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ee Gobolka Sanaag, taas oo si toos ah u saameysay tayada waxbarashada iyo mustaqbalka ardayda gobolka.

Waxaa si gaar ah loo dareemayaa xidhitaanka dugsiyo badan oo hoos yimaada magaalooyinka Ceelafweyn, Garadag, iyo ,xiis,dayaxa,gudmo biyo cas ,Ceerigaabo, kuwaas oo sabab u noqday in boqolaal arday ah ay ka hakadaan waxbarashadooda.
Arrinta ugu walaaca badan ayaa ah in qaar ka mid ah dugsiyadaas xidhan ay weli mushahar iyo bajad ka qaataan Wasaaradda Waxbarashada Gobolka Sanaag, inkasta oo aysan shaqayn, taas oo muujinaysa musuqmaasuq, maamul xumo, iyo khasaare hanti dadweyne.
Dhibaatooyinka muuqda waxaa ka mid ah:
Dugsiyo xidhan oo weli mushahar iyo bajad ku qaata

Khasaare hanti qaran iyo maamul xumo
Kormeer la’aan iyo dayacaad joogto ah oo dugsiyada ah
Taageero la’aan macallimiinta iyo ardayda
Qorshe la’aan ku saabsan horumarinta waxbarashada gobolka
Isla xisaabtan la’aan iyo masuuliyad darro
Arrimahani waxay si toos ah u halis gelinayaan mustaqbalka jiilka soo koraya, waxayna u baahan yihiin baaritaan degdeg ah, isla xisaabtan dhab ah, iyo tallaabo sharci ah.
Waxaan ugu baaqaynaa:
Wasaaradda Waxbarashada Somaliland
Maamulka Gobolka Sanaag
Hay’adaha la-dagaallama musuqmaasuqa
Warbaahinta madaxa-bannaan
In ay si degdeg ah u baaraan dugsiyada xidhan ee weli bajad qaata, la xisaabtamaan masuuliyiinta ku lugta leh, isla markaana dib u furaan dugsiyada si ardaydu u helaan waxbarasho joogto ah.
Waxbarashadu waa xuquuq, ma aha meel lagu lunsado hanti dadweyne. Mustaqbalka carruurta Gobolka Sanaag lama dayici karo.

WARBIXIN DHAB KA HADAL AH

Koonfurta Soomaaliya waxay la daalaa-dhacaysaa xaalad siyaasadeed oo adag, halkaas oo dood joogto ah, khilaaf siyaasadeed, iyo siyaasad xumo ay ka curyaamiyeen dadaalladii dowlad-dhis.

Qabyaalad muddo dheer raagtay, kalsooni darro bulsho, iyo siyaasiyiin dano gaar ah ka hormariya danta guud ayaa sabab u noqday in horumar waara la gaari waayo.

Burburkii dowladdii dhexe ee Soomaaliya, dagaalladii sokeeye, faragelinta shisheeye, iyo dib-u-heshiisiin la’aanta ayaa sii adkeeyay xaaladda, iyadoo bulshada badankeedu ay ku nool yihiin jahwareer iyo niyad-jab.

Dadka intooda badan waxay ka doorbideen in ay nolol ka sameystaan dibadda, halka dalkooda uu weli ku jiro fowdo, dagaal, iyo dib-u-dhac horumarineed.

Inta aan la helin is-cafis bulsho, hoggaan masuul ah, iyo danta qaran oo la wada hormariyo, doodda, dagaalka, iyo fowdadu way sii jiri doonaan.

Siyaasiyiinta Koonfurta Soomaaliya ayaa inta badan dano gaar ah ka hormariya danta guud, taasoo keentay in hannaan dowladnimo oo waara uu weli ku adkaado.

Barri waxaad arki doontaa dood iyo fowdo, maalinta xigta dagaal iyo siyaasad xumo, mar kasta siyaasad weji badan iyo maamulo cusub oo kala aragti duwan iyo shirar aan dhamaad laheyn oo la isku mashquuliyo.

Koonfurta Soomaaliya waxay u muuqataa halka uu dib-u-dhaca iyo jihada toosan ee horumarka uu ka hor istaagay.

Taariikhdu waxay muujinaysaa in xal waara oo dowladnimo iyo nabad ku wada noolaasho uu u baahan yahay cafis bulsho, dib-u-heshiisiin qaran, iyo ujeeddo mideysan oo bulshada oo dhan ay wada qaadato.

Rajo-beelka iyo ciilka siyaasadeed ayaa weli curyaaminaya horumarka, laakiin jiilalka cusub ayaa laga rajeynayaa inay dalka dib u dhisaan, nabad iyo horumar ku soo kordhiyaan, isla markaana ay ku noolaadaan sharaf iyo karaamo.

Qorshaha ay la socdaan nidaamka iyo maaliyadda lagu dhaqaajinayo, ayaa qurxiya hoggaaminta xafiisyada dawladda. Xukuumadda, wali kama hayno arrintaas. Waxa se aad loo dareemayaa dhaqdhaqaaqa suuqa oo illaa xad hoosudhac weyni ku yimid. Tan oo caddaynaysa in aanu jirin dhaqaale lagu hirgeliyo ajandayaal dawli ah oo ay dawladdu ka hawlgashay sannad iyo dheeraadka ay talada dalka joogto. Waxse la inagu dawakhiyay warbaahin ammaan iyo buunbuunin xadkabaxa subcinaysa oo qiyaastii la kiraystay damiirkoodii.

Busaaradda dalka ka jirta, sicirbararka, abaaraha deegaanada miyiga dad, xoolo iyo beeraba cidhibtirka ku hayaa, marka ay isku biiraan, bulshada waxay gaadhsiinayaan dhaawac aan la qiyaasi karin oo dhaqan, mid dhaqaale iyo mid nololeedba. 

Saraakiisha dawladda, sida wasiirrada iyo hoggaanka haayadaha madaxa banaan, damiir ahaan uma banaanayn in ay kolba hudheel xaflad ay ku qabtaan iyaga oo ina leh "waxanu abaalmarin siinaynaa shaqaalihii ugu shaqada fiicnaa" 

Sheekadani waa sheekada NGO-yada. Ma aha caqli laga sugaayay dad leh habfeker dawladeed. Dawladda, sarkaalka keena guulo waaweyn oo bulshadiisu ay helaan, waa khasab in la bogaadiyo. Balse taariikhda ayaa abaalmarisa. Abaalmarintani waa ciyaalnimo, fahan la'aan dawladeed iyo lunsi la lunsanayo hantida umadda.

Kharashaadka badan ee lagu luminayo kiraysiga hoolalka hudheelada, daabacaadda boodhadhka faanka iyo baqbaqda miidhana, iibsiga raashinka hudheelada qaaliga ah, iibsiga tigidhada lagu galayo, khasaarinta shidaalka, kirada kamaradaha muuqaalka iyo kuwa sawirka iyo waxyaalahaas la midka ah ee kaadooyada la isugu soo xidhxidhayo sidii ubad yar yar oo afartan baxaya. 

Waa damiir la'aan iyo masuuliyaddaro aan laga sugayn saraakiil xafiisyo dawladeed hoggaamiya oo reer miyigoodii ay abaarro u baaba'een, reer magaalkoodiina shaqo la'aan, busaarad, sicirbarar iyo dhaqaalaxumo. Waxay ahayd ugu yaraan kharashaadka afartan baxyadan lagu luminayo, in reer miyiga loogu dhaamiyo booyado gurmad ah (haddii aydaan qorshe lagu dabargooyo abaaraha oo deegaanka lagu ilaalinayo lahayn).

Jamhuuriyaddii Somaliland, way ololaysaa. Dab ayaa haysta. Dabkaasi waa mid dhaqan, mid dhaqaale, mid siyaasadeed iyo mid bulsheed.

17-kaa dowladoow intooda badan waxaa ay xornimada qaateen wixii ka dambeeyey 1960-kii. Intii u dhaxaysay 1960 iyo 2007. Kiisaska ugu badan ayaa ka dhacay Afrikada Saxaraha ka hooseeya, oo ay ku lug leeyihiin fallaagada hubaysan ee waddamo ay ku jirto Chad.
1963-dii, ayaa Ingiriisku ku wareejiyey dhulka Soomaaliyeed ee NFD  dowladda gacan ku rimiska ah ee Kiiniya isla markaana siyaasad ahaan uu u gumeysto wali. NFD waxay laba jeer ka weyn tahay dhulka Ingriiska sida taariikhda ku qoran. Ingiriisku intii uusan ka guurin NFD ee hore loo yiqiin Woqooyi Barri,  waxaa uu u qaybiyey  sida  Garissa, Wajir, Mandera, Isiolo, and Marsabit!!
Sida taariikhda ku qoran, NFD waxay ka mid ahayd meelaha ugu saboolsan ee uu gumeysto Ingiriiska. NFD, wali sidii bey ugu liidataa Kiiniya inteeda kale isla markaana waxaa ku socda.

Gaarisa waxaa lagu sheegey 663,399.
Wajeer waxaa lagu sheegey 150,116.
Isiolo waxaa lagu sheegey    268,002.
2025, Mandera waxaa lagu sheegey 114,718.  Marka aad eegto qaabka khariidada iyo tirada dadka lagu sheegayo, waxaad halkaas ka garaneysaa in ay jirto marin habaabin aad u weyn. Waayo, dadka Soomaaliyeed ee ku nool deegaanadaasi, intooda badan ma hellaan sharci ku sheega uu sheegey War moogaha Kiiniya. Waayo, haddii sida hadda lagu dhawaaqay ay hore ugu helli lahaayeen, waxaa marag ma doonto ah in tirada dadka Soomaaliyeed ee ku nool NFD ka badan tahay intaas.

Labadan in aad mid la safato waa garaad yari iyo dadnimo xumo. Xaqiiqada khadhaadhi waa in labaduba yihiin la dirayaal u adeega group ka arrimiya Addis-ababa midba xilligiisii, kuna hawl-gala falkasta oo raalli galin kara kooxdaas kore.

Ina ilay taariikhdaa markhaati ka ah in xilligiisii ahaa kii ugu madoobaa abid ee ay wajahaan ummadda ree soomaali galbeed, waa dadcunkii lumiyay dhammaan sharaftii, dadnimadii, diintii, akhlaaqdii wacnayd iyo qiyamkii bulsho ee ummaddan, waa dhiigyacabka ay dhibbanaha u yihiin agoonta, dumarka gablamay, curyaanka iyo dadka hantigoodii la dhacay. Maxaa yeelay xilligiisii waxay Ethiopia dagaal kula jirtay ururro hubaysan, isna wuxuu ahaa aygii lagu ugaadhsan hayay shacabka hantigooda iyo dhiigoodaba la bannaystay iyadoo loogu dhuuman hayo ku lug-lahaanshaha ururradani.

Ina cagjarna waa mid ku soo aaday xilli Ethioopia isbadal ka dhacay, ururradii hubaysnaa gudaha la keenay hubkiina dhigeen, waa mid aan helin amar ka badan cabudhin iyo xadhig, laakiin waxaa xaqiiq ah in uu jeclaan lahaa helidda fursad uu ku gaysto intii uu falay dadcunkii ka horreeyay.

Haddaba kala taageeridda shaqaalaha gumaysiga madow ee nasaaradu wuxuu daaha ka rogayaa, in ay Ethiopia ku guulaysatay burburinta hankii, qiyamkii, aqoonta iyo wacyigii, dhaqaalaha iyo ka caaganaantii baahida gacantooda, caqligii iyo indheer garadnimadii bulshadan sida liidata u fikiraysa imika.

Haddaba runta khadhaadh aan is taabsiinnee, labada nin midna maydaan dooran, midna dantiinna kuma maqna, waxaad mid ugu qayliso waa dantaa garasho la'aan, hadaad dantaada garan waydana nin dantiisa yaqaan baa ku addoonsan intaad nooshahay.

Qabiilka Soomaalidu waa nidaam ku dhisan **abtirsiinyo** dhanka aabbaha ah (agnatic descent) [1]. Nidaamkani ma aha oo kaliya mid qoys, balse waa laf-dhabarta aqoonsiga qofka, isagoo hagaya xiriirka ka dhexeeya dadka iyo dhinacyada kale ee nolosha [2, 3]. 
Qofka Soomaaliga ah wuxuu inta badan ku tiirsan yahay xubnaha beesha uu ka dhashay si uu u helo aqoonsi, kaalmo, iyo badbaado [4].

#2. Loolanka Qaranimada iyo Qabyaaladda
In kasta oo Soomaaliya lagu tilmaamo dal ay dadkiisu wadaagaan hal luqad, hal diin, iyo hal dhaqan, haddana waxaa ka jira *loolan adag oo u dhexeeya qaranimada iyo qabyaaladda* [5]. 
Caqabadda ugu weyn ee hortaagan dhismaha dawladnimo waa qofka oo ay ku adag tahay inuu kala doorto daacadnimada qaranka iyo tan qabiilka, iyadoo inta badan danta qabiilku ay ka xoog badato tan qaranka [5]. Nidaamka qabiilka waxaa ilaha qaarkood ku tilmaameen mid hortaagan dadaallada lagu dhisayo qaran casri ah oo midaysan [4].

#3. Nidaamka MOD iyo Burburkii Dawladnimada
Maamulkii militariga, in kasta oo uu markii hore mamnuucay qabyaaladda, wuxuu markii dambe u xuub-siibtay isbaahaysi beeleed loo yiqiin *MOD* (*Mareexaan, Ogaadeen, iyo Dhulbahante*) [6, 7]. Hannaankan isbaahaysi wuxuu meesha ka saaray beelihii kale ee waaweynaa, taas oo keentay in ay dhashaan jabhado hubaysan oo ku dhisan qabiil si ay ula dagaallamaan xukuumadda [6, 8]. Loolankan beeleed ee ku dhex milmay siyaasadda wuxuu ugu dambayntii horseeday inuu dunsado nidaamkii dawladnimada Soomaaliya sannadkii 1991-kii [9, 10].

#4. Hannaanka Awood-qaybsiga ee 4.5
Ka dib burburkii dawladda dhexe, Soomaaliya waxay qaadatay nidaamka *4.5* si loo qaybsado kuraasta baarlamaanka iyo xilalka dawladda [11]. Hannaankan wuxuu awoodda si siman u siiyaa afarta beelood ee waaweyn (Darood, Hawiye, Dir, iyo Digil-Mirifle), halka beelaha kale ee loo arko inay ka yaryihiin la siiyo nus saami (0.5) [11]. 
In kasta oo hannaankan loo arko xal ku-meel-gaar ah oo keena xasillooni ("Xaq ma aha ee waa xal"), haddana wuxuu hortaagan yahay horumarka laga gaari lahaa nidaam ku dhisan karti iyo muwaadinnimo siman [11].

#5. Midnimada Qarsoon (Latent Unity)
In kasta oo qabyaaladdu ay kala qaybiso Soomaalida, haddana waxaa jirta *midnimo qarsoon* oo soo baxda marka ay dadku dareemaan halis shisheeye ama mid ka dhan ah waxyaabaha ay muqaddaska u arkaan [12, 13]. 
Marka la taabto hiddaha, diinta, ama madax-bannaanida dhulka, dadku waxay u riseeyaan hal ujeeddo oo ka sarreysa danaha gaarka ah ee beelaha [13, 14]. Tusaale ahaan, sannadkii 1993-kii, dadkii markii hore iska soo horjeeday waxay u midoobeen difaaca sharafta iyo madax-bannaanida dalka [15].

#Gunaanad: Qabiilku waa udub-dhexaadka nolosha bulshada, laakiin marka uu galo siyaasadda wuxuu noqdaa aalad hortaagan dhismaha qaran Soomaaliyeed oo caddaalad iyo karti ku dhisan [4, 9]. Qaranimada Soomaaliya waxay ku xirantahay helidda nidaam siyaasadeed oo ka gudba 4.5 una gudba muwaadinnimo siman [9].

𝐌𝐮𝐪𝐝𝐢𝐬𝐡𝐨, 𝐅𝐞𝐛𝐫𝐚𝐚𝐲𝐨 𝟏𝟒, 𝟐𝟎𝟐𝟔: Maamulka Gobolka Banaadir ayaa Sabtida maanta si rasmi ah u ansixiyay Qorshaha Isbeddelka Muqdisho (2026–2030), kaddib kulan uu shir-guddoomiyay Ku-simaha Guddoomiyaha Gobolka Banaadir ahna Guddoomiye Ku-xigeenka Maamulka iyo Maaliyadda, Mudane Ciise Maxamuud Guure.

Qorshahan afarta sano ee soo socota hagaya horumarinta caasimadda waxa uu ka dhashay hannaan wadatashi oo ballaaran, kaas oo lagu mideeyay aragtiyo iyo talooyin laga ururiyay qaybaha kala duwan ee bulshada. Maamulka Gobolka Banaadir ayaa kulammo isdaba-joog ah la yeeshay bulshada ku dhaqan degmooyinka, si loo hubiyo in qorshuhu ku dhisan yahay baahiyaha dhabta ah ee muwaadiniinta.

Kulanka ansixinta ayaa si gaar ah diiradda loogu saaray wadatashiyo lala yeeshay Bulshada Rayidka, Ganacsatada, iyo wakiillo ka socday jaamacadaha dalka, kuwaas oo soo bandhigay talooyin wax-ku-ool ah oo lagu xoojiyay jihada qorshaha.

Mudane Ciise Maxamuud Guure ayaa sheegay in Qorshaha Isbeddelka Muqdisho uu ka tarjumayo danaha guud iyo maslaxadda shacabka, isla markaana uu yahay mid lagu wajahayo caqabadaha taagan, laguna hirgelinayo aragti horumarineed oo waara.

Qorshahan horumarineed waxa uu qeexayaa mudnaanta istaraatiijiga ah ee caasimadda, caqabadaha u baahan xalal waara, iyo fursadaha la jaanqaadi kara koboca magaalo ee Muqdisho, iyadoo la hubinayo in horumarku noqdo mid loo dhan yahay oo aan cidna laga tegin.

Maamulka Gobolka Banaadir ayaa xaqiijinaya in fulinta qorshahan ay ku salaysnaan doonto isla-xisaabtan, wada-shaqayn iyo ka-qaybgal bulsho, si loo gaaro natiijooyin muuqda oo wax ka beddela nolosha shacabka caasimadda.

Iyadoo ay wali hubanti la’aan xooggan heysato duullaanka Shisheeyaha Afrikaanta ee Soomaaliya magacoodana loosoo gaabiyo AUSSO, ayaa waxa ay markale qeylo-dhaan kasoo yeertay ururka Midowga Afrika.

Ururka ayaa waxa uu si ka adag hadalladii hore u adkeeyay baahida ay uqabaan helitaanka ciidamo iyo dhaqaale joogto ah oo loo helo duullaankooda Soomaaliya, taas oo illaa iyo hadda aan laheyn cid dhabarka uridata, duullaankaanna ka dhigtay mid gabi ka lulanaya oo ay hubanti la’aan hareysay jiritaankiisa.

 • Aqoon maamul ama sharci
 • Khibrad shaqo dowladeed ama bulsho

 • Qabiilada iyo beelaha si siman ula dhaqma
 • Dhalinyarada iyo haweenka la shaqeeya
 • Khilaafaadka si nabad ah u xalliya

Qofka hoggaamiye ah marka uu yahay( qof liita,) waxaa lagu gartaa calaamado dhowr ah. Kuwa ugu waaweyn waa kuwan:
1. Go’aan la’aan
Ma qaato go’aan cad.
Mar walba wuu dib u dhigaa ama wuu ka baqaa mas’uuliyadda.
2. Caddaalad darro
Qof ayuu eexdaa, qof kalena wuu dulmiyaa.
Saaxiibbadiis ayuu ka hormariyaa dadka kale.
3. La’aanta aragti fog (vision)
Ma laha qorshe cad oo mustaqbalka ah.
Kooxda ma tuso jihada ay u socdaan.
4. Isgaarsiin xumo
Si cad uma sharxo waxa uu doonayo.
Ma dhegaysto talooyinka dadka kale.
5. Mas’uuliyad qaad la’aan
Khaladka wuu saaraa dadka kale.
Guusha keliya ayuu isaga sheegtaa.
6. Kalsooni darro
Dadka ma aamino.
Shaqo walba isagaa isku dayaya inuu qabto (ma wakiisho).
7. Xanaaq badan ama kibir
Si fudud ayuu u xanaaqaa.
Wuxuu iska dhiga inuu wax walba ka ogyahay.
8. Dhiirrigelin la’aan
Kooxdiisa ma dhiirrigeliyo.
Ma abaalmariyo dadaalka wanaagsan.
Hoggaamiye wanaagsan wuxuu ka duwan yahay arrimahan: waa cadaalad, go’aan leh, dhegeyste fiican, oo dadka ku hoggaamiya kalsooni iyo tusaale wanaagsan.

Plusieurs arbitres ont été sanctionnés ou écartés pendant et immédiatement après la Coupe d'Afrique des Nations (CAN) 2025 au Maroc, en raison de problèmes de performance et de violations réglementaires. 

Sanctions et Renvois d'Officiels de Match

La Confédération Africaine de Football (CAF) a pris plusieurs mesures disciplinaires pour maintenir le niveau de l'arbitrage : 

• 🇲🇱 🇨🇲 Boubou Traoré (Mali) et Abdou Abdel Mefire (Cameroun) : Les deux arbitres ont été suspendus pour le reste du tournoi à la mi-janvier 2026. Leur renvoi faisait suite à des « performances insatisfaisantes » lors des tours précédents, la CAF cherchant à répondre aux critiques croissantes des fédérations participantes. 

• 🇸🇴 Omar Artan (Somalie) : L'arbitre de l'année 2025 de la CAF a été écarté et « démis » de ses fonctions pour le quart de finale Nigeria contre Algérie. Cette sanction inhabituelle aurait été motivée par le port de chaussures d'une marque non approuvée par le sponsor officiel du tournoi. 

• 🇨🇮 Désiré Noumandiez Doué : Le responsable de l'arbitrage aurait été limogé par la CAF suite aux protestations officielles du Maroc concernant des décisions controversées de la VAR lors de la finale de la CAN féminine (qui s'est déroulée à proximité du tournoi masculin au Maroc). 

• 🇹🇳 Haitham Guirat (Tunisie) : Bien qu'il ait servi comme officiel VAR pendant la CAN 2025, il a été suspendu indéfiniment par la Fédération Tunisienne de Football en février 2026, peu après son retour du tournoi, en raison d'une « erreur d'arbitrage grave » lors d'un match de championnat national. 

État des Lieux après le Tournoi 

• 🇨🇬 Jean-Jacques Ndala (RDC) : Malgré une controverse majeure lors de la finale Sénégal contre Maroc, où le Sénégal a brièvement quitté le terrain pour protester contre sa décision de penalty, Ndala a été blanchi de toute faute par la CAF. La CAF a salué son professionnalisme et il reste candidat pour la Coupe du Monde de la FIFA 2026. 

• 🇬🇭 Daniel Laryea (Ghana) : Il a été la cible d'un harcèlement intense sur les réseaux sociaux après son arbitrage de la demi-finale Nigeria contre Maroc, ce qui l'a conduit à désactiver son compte Instagram, bien qu'aucune sanction formelle de la CAF n'ait été enregistrée pour ce match spécifique. 

En somme, l'édition 2025 de la CAN au Maroc illustre la volonté de fer de la CAF d'élever les standards de l'arbitrage continental. Falaastiin iyo Maalinta Jacaylka: Islaamku muxuu ka yiri?
Dunidu mararka qaar waxay isu labisataa midab casaan ah, ubaxyo iyo qalbiyo warqad ka samaysan. Laakiin qalbiga Muslimka ah ma aha warqad dabayluhu qaadaan. Waa qalbi ku xiran qiyam, diinta iyo midnimo ummadeed.
Arrinta waxa loogu yeero Valentine’s Day oo lagu nisbeeyo wadaadkii la oran jiray Saint Valentine, asalkeedu wuxuu ka yimid dhaqan iyo xaflado Kirishtaan hore. Diinta Islaamku se waxay leedahay laba ciid oo cadcad sida dayax buuxa: Ciidul Fidriga iyo Ciidul Adxaha. Nebigeennu Nabi Muxammad (NNKH) markuu yimid Madiina wuxuu u sheegay dadka in Ilaahay ku beddelay maalmo ka kheyr badan kuwii ay lahaayeen.
Islaamku ma diidin jacaylka. Jacaylku waa neecaw nolosha ka dhigta mid macaan. Laakiin jacaylku waa inuu noqdaa mid xalaal ah, xishood leh, oo ku socda jidka Alle oggolaaday. Ma aha mid ku dhisan ku dayasho indho la’aan ah ama dhaqan aan diinteenna sal ku lahayn.
Waxaa jira qodob muhiim ah: ka fogaanshaha ku dayashada dhaqamada diimeed ee kale. Culimo badan ayaa sheegay in Muslimku ka dheeraado dabaaldegyo asal ahaan diin kale ku dhisan. Quraanka Kariimka ah iyo Sunnaduba waxay dhiirrigeliyaan in qofku yeesho shakhsiyad u gaar ah, sida geed timir ah oo xididkiisu dhulka ku qotomo, aan dabayluhu u ruxmin jihada ay rabaan.
Sidoo kale, haddii qalbiyadeennu ka mashquulaan ubaxyo iyo hadiyado, halka walaalaheenna ku nool Falastiin ay la ildaran yihiin dhibaato, gumeysi iyo dagaal, waa in aan is weydiinno: kee mudan in aan xusuusanno? Qalbiga Muslimka ahi waa inuu la xanuunsadaa walaalkiis meel kasta oo uu joogo.

Halkan baan kasalaamaya bulshada oo aan kucawaynayno casumada puntland ee #Garowe

Waxaa nasiib darro ah in maanta la arko maamul is sheeganaya iyo kuwo isku magacaabay nabad sugid oo xabsiga ku haya rag aan wax eed ah si cad loogu soo bandhigin. Tani ma aha dowladnimo, mana aha nabad sugid — waa awood sheegasho ku dhisan cabsi iyo dulmi.
Sharci la’aan lagu xiro muwaadin waa dhaawac ku dhaca kalsoonida bulshada. Qof walba oo aamusa maanta, berri isagaa laga yaabaa in si la mid ah loo duudsiyo xorriyaddiisa. Caddaaladdu haddii ay ka baxdo gacanta maamulka, maxaa haraya?
Haddii ay jirto eed, ha la keeno maxkamad hufan. Haddii aysan jirin, xorriyaddooda ha loo soo celiyo si degdeg ah. Xabsi qarsoodi ah oo aan lahayn sharci iyo caddeyn waa dulmi aan la aqbali karin.
Bulshadu waxay mudan tahay maamul ku dhisan cadaalad, isla xisaabtan iyo ilaalinta xuquuqda aasaasiga ah ee muwaadiniinta. Awooddu waa imtixaan, waxaana ku guuleysta kuwa caddaaladda ku dhaqma.

Dulmi ma waaro — xaqiina ma baaba’o.

Puntland waxaa aafeeyay eex, musuqmaasuq, sixir-barar, iyo abaaro is biirsaday. In Siciid Cabdullaahi Deni ku bixiyo lacagtii danyarta iyo dadka ay abaaruhu saameeyeen tiktokers isaga u guul-wadeeya waa arrin yaab leh. Halka dadkii uu mas’uulka ka ahaa ay gaajo iyo harraad ugu dhimanayaan. Ilaa 7 carruur ah ayaa la sheegay inay harraad ugu dhinteen Puntland.

Dadkii wada dhistay Puntland 1998 waxay ku kala tageen caddaalad-darro iyo in maamulka ay dad gaar ahi ku shaqaystaan. Nin ku fashilmay maamul-goboleed in uu hoggaamiyo sidee ayuu qaran ka  Somalia u hoggaamin karaa?

Sidoo kale, Deni waxuu la safantay arrimo lidi ku ah madax-bannaanida iyo wadajirka Somalia, sida Ethiopia oo damac ka lahayd badda Somalia, United Arab Emirates oo la shaqaynta say gooni-goosadka gobollada Waqooyi, iyo Israel oo sheegay inay aqoonsi sameysay.

Magacaygu waa Faysal, kana soo jeedo xaafada Waberi ee magaalada Garissa, Kenya.
Waxaan hiigsanayaa inaan ku biiro siyaasadda marka aan dhammeeyo socdaal kayga qaaradaha Afrika iyo Yurub.
Intii aan safarradayda ku jiray, waxaan la kulmay dhaqammo kala duwan, waxaan arkay hannaano hoggaamineed oo kala geddisan, waxaanan la sheekeystay dad kala duwan oo aragti fog leh. Khibradahaasi waxay ballaariyeen aragtidayda, waxayna xoojiyeen fahamkayga ku saabsan maamul wanaagsan iyo horumar.

Hase yeeshee, mar kasta oo aan ka fikiro xaaladda deegaankayga, waxaan la kulmaa xaqiiqo adag. Badanaa, siyaasadda waxay ku xiran tahay dano qabiil halkii ay ka ahaan lahayd mid ku dhisan aragti iyo midnimo.

Aragtidaydu waxay ku salaysan tahay dhisidda hoggaan iyo aqoonsi Soomaaliyeed oo ballaaran oo xooggan, kuna dhisan iskaashi, karaamo, iyo ujeeddo wadajir ah, isla markaana la jaanqaadaysa himilada Bariga Afrika iyo Geeska Afrika oo isdhexgal leh.
Inkastoo tani ay tahay hawl ballaaran oo adag, haddana isbeddel dhab ah mar walba meel buu ka bilaabmaa.

Horumar, wanaag, iyo nolol tayo leh waa in laga shaqeeyaa jago kasta oo la joogo. Ha noqoto maamule, oday, ama guddoomiye. Hoggaamintu kuma koobna xil ama magac, balse waxay ku jirtaa go’aan adag oo ah adeeg, hagaajinta nolosha dadka, iyo dhisidda mustaqbal wanaagsan.

Ka hor inta aanan shaacin hamigeyga, waxaan is weydiiyaa su’aalo muhiim ah:
Dadkaygu ma qiimeeyaan aragti fog, midnimo, iyo horumar waara?

Ma dhegeystaan fikradaha kala duwan, ma falanqeeyaan, oo go’aan madax-bannaan maka gaari karaan fikirkooda siyaasadeed?

Mise doorashooyinka waxaa saameeya arrimo aan mar walba la jaanqaadin danta guud? Sida aragtida qabiilka iyo laaluush?

My name is Faysal, proudly from Waberi Ward in Garissa, Kenya. I aspire to join politics after completing my lifelong dream of traveling across Africa and Europe by motorcycle — a journey defined by discovery, learning, and personal growth.
Through my travels, I have experienced different cultures, observed various models of leadership, and engaged with forward-thinking, visionary individuals. These encounters have broadened my perspective and strengthened my understanding of governance, development, and the responsibility that comes with leadership.
Yet whenever I reflect on the situation in my hometown, I am confronted with a challenging reality. Too often, politics appears driven by clan interests rather than guided by long-term vision, unity, and sustainable progress.
My vision lies in fostering broader, stronger Somali leadership and identity, grounded in cooperation, dignity, and shared purpose, alongside the aspiration for a more stable and prosperous East Africa and a more integrated Horn of Africa. Though this is undoubtedly a vast and complex undertaking, meaningful change must always begin somewhere.
Progress, goodness, and a better quality of life can and should be pursued from whatever position one holds — whether as an administrator, a chief, or a governor. Leadership is not defined solely by title, but by the commitment to serve, improve lives, and build a better future.
Before I step forward on this path, I find myself reflecting on essential questions:
Do my people value vision, unity, and long-term progress?
Do they listen, evaluate, and make independent, informed decisions?
Or are choices shaped by influences that may not always align with the collective good? Such as clanism and corruption?

Madaxweyne Donald J. Trump ayaa saxiixay sharci dib-u-habayn ballaaran oo uu soo bandhigay John Kennedy, taasoo soo afjartay mid ka mid ah xadgudubyada ugu dheeraa ee Washington: lacagaha federaalka ee loo diro shakhsiyaadka dhintay. Farriintu waa mid cad oo aan la garan karin - jooji bixinta dadka dhintay oo bilow ilaalinta kuwa nool.

Tobanaan sano, hay'adaha federaalku waxay sii wadeen inay jeegag u soo saaraan dadka dhintay ee Mareykanka, mararka qaarkood sannado ka dib dhimashada. Tani ma ahayn qalad xisaabeed oo yar. Waxay ahayd fashil nidaamsan, oo ay suurtagelisay xog-ururin la'aan, danayn la'aan xafiiseed, iyo isla xisaabtan la'aan eber ah. Natiijadu waxay ahayd balaayiin doolar oo canshuur-bixiyeyaal ah oo la khasaariyay halka dadka Mareykanka ee nool ay ku dhibtoonayeen inay helaan taageero aasaasi ah.

Xisaabaadka dowladdu waxay muujiyeen baaxadda dhibaatada. Intii u dhaxaysay 2004 iyo 2019 oo keliya, in ka badan $1.4 bilyan ayaa la siiyay shaqsiyaad dhintay. Intii lagu jiray xilligii COVID, jeegag kicin ah oo qiimahoodu ka badan yahay $1.4 bilyan ayaa loo diray in ka badan hal milyan oo qof oo dhintay.  Khaa'innada ayaa ka faa'iidaystay aqoonsiga marxuumka si ay u soo gudbiyaan lacag celin canshuur been abuur ah, halka hay'aduhuna ay u eegeen dhinaca kale.

Habkaas hadda waa la xiray.

Sharciga cusub wuxuu ku qasbayaa hay'adaha federaalka inay la jaanqaadaan Faylka Dhimashada ee Amniga Bulshada nidaamka Maaliyadda ee "Ha Bixin". Lacag kasta oo lagu xiro lambarka Bulshada ee qofka dhintay si toos ah ayaa loo xannibaa. Sharcigu wuxuu sidoo kale dejiyaa habab fulin joogto ah si looga hortago isticmaalka khaldan ee aqoonsiga iyo in la raaco jebinta.

Waa xal fudud oo Washington ay ka fogaanaysay sannado badan. Waxay ansixisay sababtoo ah Trump ayaa taageeray oo saxiixay isagoon ka labalabeyn.

Ninkii hudheelka lahaa oo si degan u dhoola caddaynaya ayaa yidhi: "Iska daa hadda hadhow ayaynu kawada hadli doonnaaye."

Sidii caadada u ahayd ninkii waxa uu dhamaystay quraacdii uu cunaayey kadibna inta uu hareeraha iska eegay ayuu si degan uga dhex baxay dadkii faraha badanaa ee macmiisha ahaa ee ku suggan gudaha hudheelka. Markii uu baxay ayuu ninkii macmiisha ahaa isaga oo yaaban waydiiyay ninkii hudheelka lahaa isaga oo ku leh: 
"oo Maxaad ugu ogolatay in uu la baxo lacagta?!" Ninkii hudheelka lahaa ayaa ugu jawaabey. "Ma tihid kii ugu horewyey ee ninkan arka, mana tihid ka keliya ee arinkiisa igu baraarujiyey. Adiga hortaa qaar badan oo kale ayaa igala hadlay arinkiisa iyo in uu ka baxo hudheelka isaga oo aan xisaabin." Ninkani waxa uu fadhiista hudheelka dibadiisa, marka uu arko dadka macaamiisha ah oo ku soo batay gudaha hudheelka ayuu isaguna soo galaa si uu wax u cuno, waana arin aan arkaayey muddo dheer laakiin aan si badheedh ah indhaha uga qarsanaayey. Uma diidin, mana fadeexadyan, mana waydiin aniga oo dhowraaya karaamadiisa. 

Maxaa yeelay, waxa aan aaminsanahay in laga yaabo in dadkan badan ee macamiisha ah ay sabab u tahay barakada ducadiisu.

Waxa uu soo fadhiistaa banaanka hudheelka isaga oo Ilaahay ka baryaaya in dadku ku soo bataan hudheelka si uu u galo oo wax uga cuno kadibna iska baxo.

Maxaynu ka ognahay? Waxaa laga yaabaa in la inagu arsaaqayo barakada kuwa aynu u malaynayno in ay iyagu inoo baahan yihiin.

SOOMLIYA HOGGAAMIYE NOOCEE AH AYEY U BAAHANTAHAY MAXAASE MUDNAAN U LEH?

Soomaaliya waxay u baahan tahay hoggaan aragti dheer, hoggaan dalka mideeya, oo mabda’ leh, hoggaan ka sarreeya qabiil iyo dano gaar ah, kana shaqeeya xasillooni qaran, dib-u-habayn amni iyo doorasho qof iyo cod ah, oo ugu danbayn dalka la gaarsiiyo. 

Mudnaanta horutabinta leh:

1. Hoggaan Aragti iyo Midnimo Leh: Aragtida qaran waa inay ku dhisnaataa madaxbannaani, karaamo iyo isku-filnaansho, kana gudubtaa siyaasadda qabiilka.

2. Amni iyo Xasillooni: Dib-u-habayn dhab ah oo lagu sameeyo hay’adaha amniga, la-dagaallanka argagixisada, iyo maareyn siyaasadeed oo xasilloon oo heer federaal iyo maamul goboleed ah.

3. Maamul Loo Dhan Yahay oo Isla-xisaabtan Leh: Dhisidda kalsoonida shacabka iyo beesha caalamka iyadoo la xaqiijinayo hufnaan, cadaalad doorasho iyo qaybsiga khayraadka dalka iyo deeqaha caalamiga ah. 

4. Dhismaha Hay’adaha iyo Horumarinta Bulshada: Maalgashi waxbarasho, caafimaad iyo kobcinta dhaqaalaha (kalluumaysi iyo beeraha) si loo hagaajiyo tayada nolosha.

5. Kobcinta Doorka Haweenka: Ka-qaybgal buuxa oo haweenku ku yeeshaan siyaasadda, nabadda iyo amniga si loo gaaro horumar waara.

Yoolka ugu dambeeya waa in dalka laga raro marxalad ku tiirsan badbaado ku-meel-gaar ah loona gudbo mustaqbal xasilloon oo iskiis isu maamula, iyadoo la adkaynayo nidaamka dastuuriga ah iyo hannaan dimuqraadi ah oo shaqaynaya.

Hadaba akhristow maxaad ku dari lahayd astaamaha looga baahan yahay hoggaan dalku yeesho, yaase ugu dhow oo astaamahaan leh ragga maanta saaxadda siyaasadda ku jira?
