This image depicts a significant geopolitical shift: the reported discovery of massive crude oil reserves in Somalia, aided by Turkish exploration. The claim of 20 billion barrels would place Somalia among the world’s top oil-rich nations, potentially transforming one of the poorest countries on Earth into a major energy player.

The Turkey-Somalia Partnership
In recent years, Turkey has become a key strategic ally for Somalia, providing everything from military training to infrastructure development. In 2024, the two nations signed a landmark defense and economic deal that allows Turkey to explore and drill for oil and gas in Somali waters. This partnership is a prime example of "soft power" diplomacy, where Turkey gains access to resources and a strategic foothold in the Horn of Africa, while Somalia receives the technical expertise and security needed to tap into its natural wealth.

Risks and Rewards
The discovery is a double-edged sword. On one hand, oil revenue could build schools, hospitals, and roads, lifting millions out of poverty. On the other hand, many nations have fallen victim to the "Resource Curse," where sudden wealth leads to increased corruption, environmental damage, and internal conflict. For the global community, this development is being watched closely, as it could stabilize the region’s economy or create new tensions in the already volatile Red Sea corridor.

Warbaahin badani waxay iswaydiinaysaa "sababta Erdugan ugu wacan in uu sidan qaawan ula dagaalamo JSL" waxa dhawaan kulan ka diiday Mohamed Bin Sayedka Cimaaraadka. 

Si uu bahdilkaas fagaaraha siyaasadda dunida kaga dhacay isaga maydho ayuu Itoobiya orod ku yimid Erdugan. Waxa ka codsaday isusoodhawayn ay Cimaaraad iyo Israaiil dhexdhexaadinayeen oo Somaliland iyo Itoobiya la isku soo dhawanayay. 

Erdugan wuxu u digay Aby Ahmed, oo uu u sheegay "haddii uu Somaliland aqoonsado in uu waayi doono Turkey iyo Sucuudi" waxa kale oo uu sheegay diyaaradda aan duuliyaha lahayn ee yar yar ee uu Turkigu sameeyo, oo Itoobiya ay dagaalada Tigreega ku gashay, uu ka joojin doono, isla markaana uu soo bandhigi doono "in intii qawaaniinta caalamku ay oggol yihiin uu ka badsaday oo foolxumo badan uu keeni doono banaanka"

Aby wuxu ku dooday "in Itoobiya ay rabto marin badeed" kaas oo ayna ka maarmi karahayn. Waana isla intii uu ka yidhi shirkii Afrika ee shalay soo xidhmay. Waxa se hadalkiisa ka maqan "baddii casayd/Red Sea" ee hore hadalkiisa uga buuxi jirtay. Kaliya "marin badeed/Sea Access" ayuu yidhi, baddu midda ay doonto ha ahaatee.

Marka halkaa la joogo, waxa jira xogo sheegaya "In Soomaaliya ay Turki kala hadashay in Itoobiya ay ka soo dhaadhiciyaan, marin badeed in Soomaaliya ay ku siin doonto shardi la'aan, waliba Qaramada Midoobay hortiisa ku soo sexeexi doonto, oo waliba uu Xasan Sheekh horgayn doono baarlamaankiisa, sidaasna si xalaala oo sharci ah oo bilaa hawl ah ay ku heli doonto Itoobiya bad iyo dhul isbarkan oo ay Itoobiya leedahay"

Turkigu, sababta uu caynkan u yeelayaa waa dhawr qodob:

• Kow, shidaalka ama tamarta Soomaaliya oo dhan ayaa la siiyay boqolkiiba shan iyo sagaashan (95%). Taas oo aan dunida laga heli karin in shidaalkiisa qaydhiin aad iska gurato adiga oo ayna xataa jirin haayad ku korjoogtayn karta oo xataa awood u leh in maalinta ay dayntaadu dhammaatay garan kara, iyaga oo qiyaasaya xaddiga shidaalka aad qaadatay in uu gaadhay heerkii daynta lagugu lahaa.

• Laba, Turki, marinada istaraatiijiga ah ee uu rabay oo ah midkan uu ganacsiga dunidu maro ee Gacanka Cadmeed iyo afaafka Baddacas ay raacayaan Somaliland. Isaga oo rabay in reer Xamarku ay u sexeexaan wax kasta isna uu iska jaqo nimcooyinkaas.

• Saddex, khayraadka badda Soomaaliya (blue economy) oo isaga la iska wada siiyay. Taas oo aan loo kala soocin loona xaddidin.

• Afar, isbitaalka Xamar u weynaa ee Digfeer la odhan jiray oo Erdugan loo bixiyay, isaga ayaa maamula, faaiidada hela, dhakhatiirtiisa keena xataa kuwa tababarka sida uu doonana ka yeela.

• Shan, dekadda Xamar isaga ayaa maamula oo cashuuraha qaata.

• Lix, saldhig weyn oo Shabeelle meesha la yidhaa uu ka wado ayaa jira sida dayaxgacmeedada laga arkay. Waxanu ku tijaaninayaa gantaalp riddo dheer oo uu wado.

Arrimahan oo ay sii dheer tahay waxsoosaarkiisa sida agabka qurxinta guryaha, dawooyinka, dharka iyo waxyaalaha kale ee uu soo saaro, in warshadihiisu ay u iibkeenaan dhulkaas uu gumaysiga cusub geliyay ee Soomaaliya.

Itoobiya, codsiyadan miyay ka aqbali doontaa Turkiga? Waa suaal adag, balse Itoobiya waa dawlad qaangaadh ah xagga goaanada siyaasadda arrimaha dibadda. Dib ayay u dhigi kartaa, balse Itoobiya marnaba Turki ku abqali mayso dhawr sababood awgood:

• Kow, Itoobiya way og tahay in Turki uu yahay dalka taageerada ugu badan siiya Masar oo ay aad isku hayaan. 

• Laba, haddii dagaalka Eriteria iyo Itoobiya uu bilaabmo, wuxu u baahan doonaa kharashaad xadkabaxa, taas wuxu ka heli karaa Cimaaraad. Markaa, diyaaradaha yar yar wuu iibsan karaa balse lacagaha lagu iibsanayo ama kharashaadka dagaalka kama heli karo Turki.

• Saddex, biyaxidheenka Itoobiya ee dhismihiisa ay Masar ay isku khilaafeen, waxa ilaaliya oo xataa nidaamka ilaalada hawada ee hubka culus lagu burburiyo ugu xidhay una maamula waa Israaiil.

• Afar, Aby wuxu waydiiyay Erdugan "ballanqaadkii hore ee dekadda ahaa ee markii Isfahanka Somaliland iyo Itoobiya uu u hakiyay, muxu u fuli waayay?" Taas oo Erdugan ku adkaatay.

• Shan, dalalka Suudaan, Eriteria, Jabbuuti iyo Soomaaliya oo Itoobiya ku hareeraysan, intuba waxay saldhigyo siiyeen Masar. Turkina wuu kula socdaa Masar. Waxayna Masar diyaar u tahay in Itoobiya ay jiho kasta colaad kaga furto, illaa gudaha la isla galo oo la qarxiyo ama burburiyo Biyaxidheenka Itoobiya. Somaliland oo Itoobiya ay isku khilaafeen isfahankii dhexmarayna, wali si qaangaadhnimo ah ayay u dhaqmaysaa oo uma ay oggolaan in dawlad jaar la ah ay ku dhisto jabhado (walow aanan qof ahaan ku raacsanayn, waayo Geeska waxad kula noolaan kartaa kaliya middi middi ku taag).

Arrimahan marka intaa lagaga tago. Xagga gudaheena. Suaashu waxay tahay "haddii Turki, Jabbuuti iyo Soomaaliya ayna midkoodna kuu tudhahayn, maxay Somaliland ugu tudhaysaa?" Maxay Somaliland xidhiidh ula bilaabi la'dahay Giriig, Japan, Hindiya, Eriteriyada ay Jabbuuti aad uga baqato ee dhulka ka haysta ama dabcan ay Canfarta u siin la'dahay saldhig xuduudka Jabbuuti ku yaalla?

Somaliland, habayacsanaan ayaa ka muuqata. Dagaalka innagu socdaa ma aha mid sahlan. Xasan Sheekh iyo Geelle oo ayna faraha waxba ugu jirin ayaa inagu dhex hubaynaya ama ka shaqaynaya iska horkeenka bulshada reer Somaliland, Turki oo maalgelinaya arrinta caynkanina, wuxu weli adeegsanayaa xarrumaha uga furan dalka dhexdiisii. Heshiis kasta oo lagu kala kaco oo colaadaha ka dhex socda qabaailka sii hurinaya, waxa burburka heshiiska wadi kara Turki oo qayb ka mida odayaasha dhinacyada lacag ku kala furfuraya isaga oo xarrumihiisa dalka uga furan dhexmaraya!

Galbeedka waxa ka socda waxa laga arki karaa ugu yaraan in madaxweynaha iyo kuxigeenku ayna isku uur banaanayn. Arrintaasi, waa arrin wadashaqayntooda laga arki karo. Haddii sidan ay wax u sii socdaan, waxa suuragal ah in kalsoonida bulshada iyo dawladnimada u dhexeysaa ay meesha ka baxdo ama ugu yaraan ay aad u daciifto.

Wasiirrada Somaliland, midkoodna shaqo naf leh oo uu qabtay sannad iyo badhkaa ay xukuumaddu joogtay, ma jiraan. Suaashu se waxay tahay "madaxweynaha miyaa la amaani karaa iyada oo wasiirradiisu ay yihiin qaar aan tayo lahayn? Ma shacabka ayaa magacaabay miyaanu madaxweynuhu magacaabin, isla markaana miyaanu madaxweynuhu beddeli karin? Madaxweynuhu haddii uu doonayo in ay wax hagaagaan, dadkii hagaajin lahaa ha keensado, haddii kale oo uu rabo in sidan wax iska sii ahaadaanna, kuwani ha magacownaadaan ama qaar la mida ha la keeno.

Werwer weyn ayaa ka dhalanaya fursadaha ina horyaalla, khalkhalka nidaamka dunida ku yimid, dagaalada siyaasiga ah ee heshiiskii Israaiil inoo keenay iyo daciifnimada fahanka habshaqeedka dawladnimadii Somaliland haysta ama hoggaanka dalka ee jaahwareerku haysto.

#Cuba: Dunidu si ku filan ugama hadasho, balse Cuba waxay hadda wajahaysaa mid ka mid ah cadaadisyada iyo gardarrada ugu fadeexadda badan abid ee kaga imaanaya Mareykanka. Iyadoo warbaahinta caalamku diiradda saarayso loollanka u dhexeeya Iiraan iyo Washington, musiibada Cuba waxay ku socotaa aamusnaan culus.
Cunaqabateynta uu Mareykanku saaray, oo lagu sii adkeeyay joogitaanka maraakiib dagaal oo Mareykan ah kuwaas oo cabsi gelinaya ama ka hortagaya in shidaal iyo badeecooyin daruuri ah la geeyo, ayaa si dhab ah u neef qabatinaysa jasiiradda.
Xarumaha korontada ayaa istaagay, taas oo malaayiin qof ku ridday mugdi. Qashinka ayaa ku ururaya waddooyinka, maadaama uusan jirin shidaal ku filan adeegyada dawlada hoose ama degmooyinka. Duulimaadyo badan waa la joojiyay, dhaqaalihii wuu istaagay, isbitaalladuna waxay bilaabeen inay waayaan ogsajiin iyo qalab caafimaad oo lama huraan u ah.
Arrintani ma aha oo keliya khilaaf siyaasadeed: waa cadaadis sharci-darro ah oo lagu hayo dad dhan. Dal madax-bannaan ayaa la ceejinayaa sababtoo ah nidaamkiisa siyaasadeed ma waafaqsana waxa Washington ay rabto.
Waxa ugu walaaca badan waa aamusnaanta guud. Quwadaha waaweyn indhaha aya ay ka laabanayaan, warbaahinta caalamkuna waxay arrintan ka dhigaysaa mid labaad, dalalka Latin America waxay sameeyaan cambaareyn daciif ah oo aan go’aan qaadasho lahayn, halka Qaramada Midoobay – oo la rabay inay matasho codka quruumaha iyo ilaalinta sharciga caalamiga ah – ay u muuqato mid curyaansan. Mexico oo isku dayday inay caawiso Havana ayaa la kulantay hanjabaad faragelin milatari ah oo uu samayn doono Donald Trump.
Marka dad dhan lagu rido mugdi, laga jaro shidaal, ogsajiin iyo agab nololeed oo daruuri ah, arrintu ma aha dood fikradeed oo keliya: waa su’aal ku saabsan karaamada aadanaha iyo madaxbannaanida. Taariikhdu waxay xukumi doontaa kuwa doortay inay aamusaan.

It may be called the 'African Union,' but does it represent a united Africa?  Not yet.  One of many reasons why our continent must get its act together and form a united superpower is to avoid - in the words of South Africa's president Cyril Ramaphosa - a 'new colonialism.'  He warned of this at the recently wrapped-up African Union get-together in Addis Ababa, and at the forefront of his mind seemed to be the current race for rare earths.  At the last G20, his country signed a deal with the EU on critical minerals that brings the more lucrative value-addition part of the supply chain home to South Africa.  Commendable, perhaps - but did that bring Africa any closer to presenting a united front to the world, enabling us to leverage the true clout of our mineral might?

“’Restore Minnesota’ Rally Draws Hundreds to State Capitol in Call for Accountability and Relief”

ST. PAUL, Minn. — Feb. 18, 2026 — Hundreds of activists, faith leaders, and community members rallied Wednesday inside the Minnesota State Capitol rotunda to demand state action and relief for communities they say have been harmed by an ongoing federal immigration enforcement surge across the state.

The event, titled Protect Our Neighbors, Restore MN rally, was organized by a broad coalition of advocacy groups, including Indivisible Twin Cities, ISAIAH, and Faith In Minnesota, along with allied community partners.

Participants called on Minnesota’s legislative leadership and Republican lawmakers to confront what demonstrators described as a “federal occupation” of communities under the Trump administration’s immigration enforcement operation, Operation Metro Surge. That operation has drawn intense public scrutiny, sparked mass protests and legislative debate, and become a defining issue in the opening weeks of the 2026 legislative session.

Speakers at the rotunda emphasized the human cost of the enforcement actions, urging elected officials to enact tangible support for workers, renters, families, and small business owners impacted by aggressive immigration tactics that have disrupted daily life, employment and schooling in many neighborhoods.

After opening remarks, the crowd flowed out of the Capitol and marched across the complex to the Minnesota Judicial Branch building, where organizers halted briefly to lead a mass call-in to Representative Lisa Demuth — urging her to back measures aimed at community restoration and oversight.

From there, demonstrators continued their march to the Minnesota Senate building, where organizers encouraged attendees to contact their own local elected officials. Protesters underscored their demand for legislative accountability and policy solutions that address the broad effects of federal immigration enforcement, including relief funding and protections for affected families and workers.

Supporters and speakers described the day’s actions as part of a larger movement aimed at ensuring Minnesota’s legislative leaders respond to community needs, restore stability to neighborhoods, and uphold civil liberties amid ongoing debates over federal immigration policy.

Gabiley waxay leedahay boqolaal arday oo ka qalin jebiyey jaamacadaha dalka iyo dibadda. Waa meel uu cilmigu si weyn u biyo dhigey, laga helo dhakhaatiir, injineerro, qareenno, macallimiin iyo aqoonyahanno kale.

Is indho buuxin la,aantu waxay dhalisay in nin Walbaa Ku Tiirsado Cid kale oo gobol kale ka soo jeeda Si uu Tuhun u galiyo Reer Gabileyga Kale .aqoonyahankii lagu tabcay  Intuu tiisa ku meelmari lahaa Waxuu tabartiisa galiyaa tayaynta tusmada Nin kale

Tu kale ayaa iyana jirtoo reer gabiley waxay ku ekaadaan  dood locol ah oo ah u  doodista gobolnimo  aan geedkaa gaadhsiisnayn oo sida gondaalka loogu maalo  garaadkan aqoonta badan leh ee aragtida gaaban.balse kuma jirto  siyaasi ismoodka reer gabiley aragti siyaasadeed oo Heer Qarran ahi,Siyaasadda dalku waa shax weyn oo waxba kama gooyo  ruux wata fikir hal gobol ku kooban oo  waxay u baahan tahay  aragti guud iyo istaraatijiyad ballaadhan.  “Haddii dadka wanaagsan ka fogaadaan siyaasadda, waxaa hubaal ah in dadka xun ay maamulaan bulshada.”

1. Isku-taga  Reer Gabileyow

Aqoonyahannada, ganacsatada, haldoorka bulshada, dhalinyarada, iyo haweenka reer Gabiley waa inay yeeshaan gole feker iyo aragti leh oo aan ujeedkiisu ahayn keliya mucaarad ama taageero, balse dhisa  istaraatijiyad siyaasadeed.

Reer Gabiley waa inay dhiirrigeliyaan dhalinyarada waxbaratay si ay ugu dhiirradaan inay galaan siyaasadda, oo ayna noqon kuwo keliya shaqo raadinaya . Waa in la baraa khibrad siyaasadeed, khudbeyn, dood, hoggaamin, iyo xirfado cod kasbasho.

4. Waa in La Abuuro Xarumo Cilmiyeed iyo Aragti siyaasadeed

Sidaas darteed, waxay go'aansadeen inay ku daraan taabasho bini'aadamnimo oo fudud oo leh dabeecad kaftan ah.
​Waxay qolalka dhigeen (Batoo) yar oo caag ah oo ay ku qoran tahay in macmiilku qaadan karo haddii uu ka helo si uu u siiyo carruurtiisa marka uu laabto, iyadoo ay jirto ikhtiyaar kale oo aad u qosol badan oo ah in Batooga lagu diro sanduuq alwaax ah meel kasta oo adduunka ah!
​Natiijadu waxay ahayd mid la yaab leh; Batoocii ayaa bilaabay inuu adduunka ku safro. Mid baa u diray carruurtiisa, mid kale saaxiib hore, mid kalena wuxuu u haystay xusuus ahaan. Qof kastaa wuxuu u sameeyay taas si kaftan ah isagoon dareemin inuu ka qayb qaadanayo olole suuqgeyn.
​Dhaqdhaqaaqan fudud wuxuu beddelay muuqaalkii "Radisson" oo ka dhigay hudheel rasmi ah mid saaxiibtinimo leh oo leh ruux, iyada oo aan la lumin booskiisa ama raaxadiisa. ​Waxa aad ka baran karto (Batooga Radisson) waa in kaftanka marka si caqli ah loo isticmaalo, uu yareeyo adkaanta farriinta oo uu abuuro niyad wanaag dadka ka dhigaya inay u dhawaadaan summada (brand-ka), iyada oo shardi ah inuu u adeego muuqaalka alaabta oo aanu beddelin ama aanu u xumeyn si kasta.

Maqaalka ka soo baxay Middle East Monitor (february 19, 2026) oo cinwaankiisu yahay "Report links Somaliland recognition to rising Cairo–Tel Aviv tensions" waxa uu ka hadlayaa xiisad sii kordheysa oo u dhaxaysa Masar iyo Israa’iil ee Geeska Afrika, gaar ahaan Soomaaliya, taas oo la xidhiidha aqoonsiga Israa’iil u siisay Somaliland.

Waraysi uu daabacay barxeedka wararka ee Israa’iil ee luqadda Cibraaniga ah ee Natsiv Net ayaa ka digaya in xiisad u dhaxaysa Masar iyo Israa’iil ay sii kordheyso Geeska Afrika, taas oo keeni karta iska hor imaad milatari oo toos ah ama dadban oo ka dhaca dhulka Soomaaliya.

Wararka ayaa sheegaya in horumarrada ilaa Febraayo 2026 ay muujinayaan in loolanka u dhexeeya Qaahira iyo Tel Aviv uu sii xoogaysanayo, gaar ahaan ka qaybgalka sii kordhaya ee labada dal ee Soomaaliya.

Go’aanka Israa’iil ee ah in ay aqoonsato Somaliland oo ah dal madax-bannaan ayaa loo arkaa in uu yahay isbeddel muhiim ah. Bishii Diseembar 26, 2025, Israa’iil ayaa noqotay waddankii ugu horreeyay ee si rasmi ah u aqoonsada gobolkan ka go’ay, tallaabadaas oo ay si adag u diideen labada Masar iyo dawladda federaalka Soomaaliya.

Masar ayaa u aragtay aqoonsiga in uu yahay ku xad-gudub madaxbannaanida Soomaaliya iyo isku dayga Israa’iil ee ah in ay saldhig istiraatiiji ah ka samaysato Badda Cas iyo Gacanka Cadmeed.

Jawaab ahaan, warbixintu waxay sheegaysaa in Masar ay dardar gelisay dirista ciidamada Soomaaliya. Waxa lagu qiyaasaa in ku dhawaad 10,000 oo askari oo Masaar ah la geeyay, qaar ka mid ah oo qayb ka ah howlgalka Midowga Afrika iyo kuwa kale oo hoos yimaada heshiis difaac oo lala galay Muqdisho.

Febraayo 11, 2026, Masar ayaa dhigtay dhoolatus milatari oo ka dhacay Qaahira oo uu goob joog ka ahaa Madaxweynaha Soomaaliya Xasan Sheekh Maxamuud, taas oo loo arkaa fariin digniin ah oo loo dirayo Israa’iil iyo Itoobiya.

Masar ayaa si rasmi ah u diiday aqoonsiga Israa’iil ee Somaliland, iyada oo ku tilmaantay in ay khatar ku tahay amnigeeda qaranka iyo marin-u-helkeeda istiraatiijiga ah ee Badda Cas.

Ma jiro mas’uul ka tirsan Masar ama Israa’iil oo si cad u sheegay in ay isu diyaarinayaan iska hor imaad milatari, laakiin warbixintu waxay ka tarjumaysaa xasaasiyadda sii kordheysa ee gobolka ee saamaynta Geeska Afrika.

Maqaalka ayaa sidoo kale xusay in warbixinnada kale ay muujinayaan in tallaabadan ay keentay falcelin xooggan oo ka timid Midowga Afrika iyo dalal kale oo diiddan aqoonsiga Somaliland.

Aniga ka nabil ahaan aragtidayada warbahantan carabta iska leh warbixinada qar waxay ka soo qateen Warbixinta Natsiv Net (Israa’iil) warbixinada Qaarna boronbogando ku dareen ciidamada Masar gaynayso somalia waa runtood sidaa u fahan shacabka reer Somaliland 

Ramadan wanagsan

Nick Shirley’s Investigation into Alleged Voter Fraud in California

In a recent push to scrutinize election integrity, independent journalist and YouTuber Nick Shirley has turned his attention to California’s voter rolls, alleging widespread inconsistencies and potential fraud. 

Shirley, known for his viral exposé on alleged daycare fraud in Minnesota, traveled to California alongside a whistleblower to investigate public voting records from the state’s Secretary of State. 

His latest video, released just days ago, documents visits to addresses listed in the voter database, revealing anomalies such as 30 individuals registered at a single UPS store and voters listed as 125 years old. ￼ ￼
Shirley’s journey to California builds on his growing reputation as a conservative-leaning influencer who uses on-the-ground reporting to highlight government oversight issues. 

The 23-year-old content creator first gained national prominence in late December 2025 with a 43-minute video claiming to uncover over $100 million in fraud at Somali-run daycare centers in Minnesota, which prompted congressional hearings and even influenced Governor Tim Walz’s decision not to seek reelection. ￼ ￼ ￼ 

Encouraged by these developments, Shirley expanded his investigations westward, framing California as a “breeding ground for voter fraud” due to policies like no-ID voting and extended election processes. ￼

During a House Judiciary Committee hearing in January 2026, Shirley testified that fraud in California could be even more severe than in Minnesota, citing examples like billions in missing funds for homelessness programs and irregularities in social services. ￼ ￼ 

He has collaborated with local figures, including conservative activist Amy Reichert in San Diego, to probe similar issues in daycare facilities there, inspired by his Minnesota work. ￼ 

Shirley’s methods involve door-to-door checks and public records analysis, often shared via social media and YouTube, where he has amassed a significant following.

Critics argue that Shirley’s videos, while attention-grabbing, rely on unverified claims and may amplify partisan narratives without full context. 

For instance, some anomalies in voter rolls could stem from administrative errors rather than intentional fraud, and California officials have defended their systems as secure. ￼ 

Nonetheless, his work has sparked broader discussions on election transparency, with fellow influencers like Benny Johnson announcing plans for their own California fraud probes. ￼

As Shirley continues his travels—recently venturing into Baltimore for unrelated investigations—his efforts underscore the polarized debate over fraud allegations in Democratic-led states. ￼ 

Whether these claims lead to reforms remains uncertain, but they highlight the role of independent media in holding systems accountable. 

With midterm elections approaching, such exposés could influence public trust in democratic processes.

Warbixintu sidoo kale waxay ku eedeysay in wakaalado qorista dadka oo aan sharciyeysneyn ay la shaqeynayeen shaqaale musuqmaasuq ku lug leh oo ka tirsan garoonka diyaaradaha. FADEEXAD: Musuqmaasuq Baahsan oo Hareeyay Hay’adda Dhowrista Xogta (DPA)

Waxaa soo ifbaxay maamul-xumo baahsan oo ka jirta gudaha Hay’adda Dhowrista Xogta (DPA). Maareeyaha Guud ee hay’adda, Mohamed Nur Ali Olow, ayaa lagu eedeeyay inuu xafiiskii hay’adda u beddelay meel looga adeego danta shakhsiga ah, isagoo ku takri-falaya awoodda maamul iyo dhaqaalihii loogu talagalay horumarinta hay’adda.

Maareeyaha ayaa si khaldan u maareeyay lacag gaaraysa $1.9 Milyan oo uu Bangiga Adduunka (World Bank) ugu deeqay hay’adda si loo hormariyo kaabayaasha hay’adda. Sidoo kale, xilligan waxaa gacanta lagu hayaa lacag dhan $1 Milyan oo qayb ka ah mashruuca EA-RDIP, taas oo loo adeegsanayo qaab baal-marsan sharciga maaliyadda dalka. 

Qodobbada ugu waaweyn ee Fadeexaddan

Dhammaan hawlihii hay’adda waxaa si dadban loogu wareejiyay xafiis gaar ah (STS Office) oo ku yaalla Taleex. Shaqadii hay’adda waxaa loo gacan-geliyay shakhsiyaad aan ka tirsanayn shaqaalaha diiwaangashan ee DPA, halka xafiiskii rasmiga ahaa ee hay’addu uu noqday mid aanay wax shaqo ah ka socon.

2. Waxaa la musuqmaasuqay qalabkii tignoolajiyadda (Computers) ee uu maalgeliyay Bangiga Adduunka, kaas oo lagu qiimeeyay $170,000. Qalabkan oo loogu talagalay casriyeynta adeegyada xafiisyada hay’adda ayaa la lunsaday. 

3. Mashruuca nidaamka diiwaangelinta (Registration System) ayaa si eex iyo qaraabo-kiil ah loogu xiray shirkadda STS oo qayb ka ah dalladda "One Group". Shirkaddan oo ay wada leeyihiin Maareeye Olow, Axmed, iyo Xoghaynta Maareeyaha, ayaa lagu qaatay lacag dhan $260,000, halka qiimaha dhabta ah ee nidaamkaas lagu dhisi karo uu yahay $30,000 oo keliya.

4. Maareeyaha ayaa la-taliyayaasha hay’adda ka dalbaday lacago baad ah, isagoo shuruud uga dhigay in haddii ay bixin waayaan aan loo cusboonaysiin doonin qandaraasyadooda shaqo.

President Trump's push for serial numbers on every election ballot is common-sense reform that would finally bring transparency and accountability to our voting system. Dollar bills already carry unique serial numbers to track counterfeiting and fraud. Applying the same basic principle to ballots would make it far harder to stuff boxes, duplicate votes, or manipulate counts without leaving a clear trail. No more excuses about "voter suppression" when the goal is simply preventing cheating.

Current paper ballots in many states lack any unique identifiers, creating opportunities for widespread abuse that erodes trust in every election. Serial numbers would allow audits to verify chain of custody, detect duplicates instantly, and prove integrity without invading privacy or disenfranchising legitimate voters. It's a low-tech, high-impact fix that protects the sanctity of the vote.

This is the kind of straightforward leadership America needs to restore confidence in our elections. Implementing unique identifiers on ballots isn't radical; it's responsible. Every citizen who values fair, secure voting should demand this change now. Secure elections mean secure democracy—Trump is right to make it happen.

📘 New Research on Somalia’s Public Financial Reforms

Somalia has made major progress in rebuilding its public financial management system after decades of conflict.

Since 2013, the country has:

• Introduced a new Public Financial Management Act
• Implemented digital treasury systems
• Published audited government accounts
• Increased domestic revenue significantly
• Achieved historic debt relief of $4.5 billion

Our new report explains how these reforms are strengthening fiscal discipline, improving transparency, and supporting economic resilience in a post-conflict state.

At the same time, important work remains — especially in revenue mobilization, fiscal federalism, and improving service delivery.

This publication offers practical recommendations for policymakers, development partners, and researchers.

📖 Read the full report here:
https://ipf.so/reports/transforming-somalias-public-financial-management-reforms-federalism-and-economic-resilience/

Dagaalka sokeeye ee Sudan haddii aan si degdeg ah loo joojin, wuxuu khatar ku yahay xasiloonida gobolka wuxuuna u oggolaanayaa kooxaha argagixisada inay koraan.

Ya’juuj iyo Ma’juuj waa laba qoom oo ka tirsan bani Aadamka, maaha Jin, mana aha xayawaano kale ee waa dad ka mid ah basharka.Waxay kasoo farcameen duriyadii Nabi Aadam iyo Xaawa (N.N.K.H). Sidoo kale waxa weeye duriyadii Nabi Nuux (N.N.K.H) maadaama Eebe (SW) ka aqbalay ducadii Nabi Nuux inuu halaago dhamaan gaalada, sidaa awgeed dadku dhamaantood waxay kasoo jeedaan Faracii  Nabi Nuux (N.N.K.H).
Nabi Nuux waxa uu dhalay sadex wiil oo kala ah Saam ibnu Nuux oo ah aabaha Carabta, Xaam ibnu Nuux oo ah aabaha dadka Madaw iyo Yaafith oo ah aabaha Turkida. Ya’juuj iyo Ma’juuj waa qoomiyado ka soo jeeda Yaafith ibnu Nuux.

Astaamaha Ya’juuj iyo Ma’juuj.

Ya’juuj iyo Ma’juuj waxay shabahaan dadka ay isku jinsiga yihiin ee turkida ama mangooliyiinta, waa dad indho yar, sankooduna kamas ayuu leeyahay, timahooduna waa Huruud  Casaan ku jiro ah, waji balaadhan leh . waxa la sheegaa inay yihiin dad aad u dhaadheer ama dad aad u gaagaaban oo dhago dhaahdheer leh, midkood intaanu dhimanina waxa uu ka tagaa duriyadiisa oo gaadhay kun qof, hase ahaatee sifooyinkaasi maaha kuwa sugan ama saxiixa. Sida xaqiiqada u dhawna waxa weeye inay yihiin dad shabaha basharka maadama ay sugantahay inay yihiin ibnu Aadam. Waxay riwaayadaha saxiixa ah tilmaamayaan in ay yihiin qoom xoog waa  wayn, oo aan la hor istaagi karin oo aan layska Celin  karayn. Ya’juuj iyo Ma’juuj waa dad aad u  badan, waxaana u daliila inay aad u badan yihiin sidoo kalena ku abtirsadaan duriyada Nabi Aadam (N.N.K.H) xadiiska kusoo arooray Bukhaari iyo Muslim.
Waxa uu yidhi Rasuulkii Ilaahay (N.N.K.H); Allah waxa uu odhanaya maalinta Qayaame: {Aadamoow kac oo soo saar cida duriyadaada galaysa Naarta, waxaanu odhan: Eeboow waakuwama cida galaysa Naarta? waxa uu odhan: Kun kii kastaba kasoo saar sagaal boqol sagaashan iyo sagaal, mid kaliyana Janada ayuu gali, markaasbaa Ilmaha yar ciroobayaa, tu kasta oo uur lehna dhicinaysaa, waxaanad arkaysaa dadka oo waalan, mana aha kuwo dhab u waalan ee cadaabka Eebaa daran. Waxay yidhaahdeen Rasuulkii Ilaahayoow oo yaa noqonaya midkaas? waxa uu yidhi rasuulkii Ilaahay (N.N.K.H): Bushaaraysta midku idnka weeye, Ya’juuj iyo Ma’juujna waa kunka}

 

Ya’juuj iyo Ma’juuj waa dad dhulka fasahaadinaya sidaa awgeed ayaa ninkii dhulka kusoo Wareegay  waa Dul-Qarnayne (N.N.K.H) uu la kulmay qoom ay ku adagtahay hadalku, qoomkaas oo ka cabanaya Ya’juuj iyo Ma’juuj waxayna ku yidhaaheen. (waxaan ku siinaynaa Lacag  ama mushahar ee Ya’juuj iyo Ma’juuj nooga samee Gidaar ama Dayr nakala xidha waayo dhulka ayey fasahaadinayaan) markaasuu Dul-Qarnayn ka aqbalay cabashadoodii oo waxa uu usameeyey (Dayr wayn) oo gidaar ah, kaas oo u dhaxeeya laba buurood dhexdood, waxa uu Dul-Qarnayn dalbaday birta Xadiida iyo Naxaasta si ugu sameyo Gidaar aad u Adag oo aanay kasoo Bixi karayn . markuu dhamaystiray Gidaar adag oo ayna  awoodin Ya’juuj iyo Ma’juuj inay kasoo baxaan, waxaanu yidhi Eebe ayaa mahad iska leh, markay gaadho maalintii ilaahay ugu talo galayna in ay burburtana way burburi.

Xadiis kale waxa ku sugan in Dayrkii iyo Gidaarkii adkaa ee uu Dulqarnayn ku Daboolay Ya’juuj iyo Ma’juuj furmay; sida laga warinayo Saynab bintu Jaxshi (I.R.H.K) maalin ayaa rasuulkii Ilaahay (N.N.K.H) usoo galay isagoo warwarsan waxaanu yidhi {Ilaahay mooye Ilaah kale ma jiro, hoog waxa ugu sugan carab shar soo dhowaday, waxa la furay
maanta dalool sadkii Ya’juuj iyo Ma’juuj, sidaas oo kale (waxa uu isku qabtay suulka iyo farta murdisada) Saynab bintu Jaxshi waxay tidhi: Rasuulkii Ilaahayow! Ma waxaan halaagsamaynaa ayadoo dad wanaagsan nagu jiraan? waxa uu yidhi: Haa, hadii xumaantu badato}
Ya’juuj iyo Ma’juuj waxay qodaan gidaarkan iyo Dayrka  ah maalin kasta balse ma awoodaan inay dhamaystiraan. Sida uu Abuhurayra (I.R.H.K) ka warinayo Rasuulkii Ilaahay (N.N.K.H). waxa uu yidhi: {Ya’juuj iyo Ma’juuj way qodaan Gidaarka maalin kasta, ilamaayo ay ku dhowaadaan inay arkaan ilayska qoraxda, markaasaa lagu Yidhaa: Noqda bari ayaan dhamaystiraynaa, waxayna kusoo noqdaan iyagoo ka adag sidii hore, ilaa laga gaadhayo mudadooda oo Eebe doono inuu dadka kusii daayo way qodayaan ilamaayo ay ka arkaan iftiinka Cad ceeda waxayna odhan: noqda waxaad qodaysaan bari inshallah way joojiyaan Qodista  Hadana sidii ay ahayd ayay kusoo noqotaa sidii ay shalay kaga tageen, way qodayaan waxayna kusoo baxayaan dadka..} Imaam Axmed.

Ya’juuj iyo Ma’juuj waxay soo baxayaan marka calaamadaha qayaamaha qaar badan la arko sida soo bixista Dajaal, Mahdiga iyo soo dagista Nabi Ciise (N.N.K.H). Sidaan ognahay Nabi Ciise waxa uu dilayaa Dajaal cawar, muslimiintuna way ka guulaysanayaan Yahuudii taageeray Dajaal. Xilliyadaas ayey soo baxayaan Ya’juuj iyo Ma’juuj ayagoo Buur dheer  kasoo degaya, waxayna soo marayaan badda la yidhaa (Dabariya) wayna Cabayaan oo Dhamaynayaan Dhamaan  biyaheeda, ilaa midkood odhanayo meeshan bari ayey bad ahaan jirtay. Dadku waxay galayaan dhufaysyo waxayna laynayaan cidii ka soo horbaxda ee beer dad iyo xoolaba. Nabi Ciise iyo inta la socotana waxay fuulayaan buur waxay baryayaan ilaahay inuu ka koryeelo qoomkan aan waxba reebayn. Kadibna Ya’juuj iyo Ma’juuj waxay cirka ku tuurayaan leebab waxayna leebabkii soo noqonayaan ayagoo dhiig leh, markaasay odhanayaan  waan ka adkaanay dadkii dhulka joogay iyo cidii cirkaba joogtay. Markaasaa Ilaahay usoo diraya mid ka mid ah ciidankiisa (sangaale) wax yar yar   oo sanka iyo dhagaha ka gala geela, dabadeedna mar kaliya ayey wada dhimanayaan.
Nabi Ciise (N.N.K.H) ayaa amraya mid kamid ah saxaabadiisa inuu soo eego waxa ku dhacay Ya’juuj iyo Ma’juuj. Nin baa Tagaya oo soo eegaya, waxaanu arkayaa dhulkii oo maydkoodii buuxiyey, dabadeedna Nabi Ciise iyo saxaabadiisu way soo baxayaan waxayna Eebe ka baryayaan in maydkooda laga kaxeeyo dhulka.
waxa Eebe (SW) soo dirayaa Shinbiro qoorta awrta leh markaasbay jiidayaan maydkooda kuna darayaan badda. Kadibna roob ayaa da’aya oo Eebe ku nadiifinyaa dhulka.

Ya’juuj iyo Ma’juuj waxay kusoo arooreen Quraanka Kariimka ah iyo Axaadiista Rasuulka, waxayna ka mid yihiin Qaybka. Sida runta ahna lama garanayo meesha ay ku nool yihiin,Sida ay soo Wariyeen Saynisyo Muslina oo Soo Helay Goobta ay ku Daboolan yihiin oo leh Saansaanta laga soo wariyay Dul qarnayn waxayna soo baxayaan xilligii Ilaahay ugu talo galay. Cidii dafirta xaqiiqada Ya’juuj iyo Ma’juuj garo waa la sitaaye. Qisooyinkooda Allah ayaa ka waramay, qofka muslimka ahna Ilaahay iyo Rasuulkiisa ayuu rumaysanyahay.

Eebe waxa uu leeyahay, Suurada 21 aad ee Al-anbiya’, Aayada 96.

There is little evidence to suggest that the meeting between President Hassan Sheikh Mohamud and the Council of Somalia’s Future will yield a genuine or sustainable political settlement. Given the documented history of political manipulation of president Hassan, the current engagement appears less like a pursuit of a genuine agreement and more like a tactical exercise to gain advantage for term extension.

The skepticism regarding this process is rooted in four critical observations:

• A Deficit of Urgency: There is a glaring lack of moral seriousness regarding the gravity of Somalia’s crises. Insecurity, economic fragility, and institutional decay are being treated as routine political matters rather than existential threats. When a leadership treats a national crisis as a manageable status quo, the prospect of proactive actions becomes increasingly distant.

• The Looming Constitutional Deadline: There is no enforceable consensus on the Constitution or a framework for free and fair elections to prevent a power vacuum after May 15, 2026. Time is a constitutional mandate, not a negotiable issue. The absence of a binding electoral roadmap suggests a deliberate drift toward instability.

• The Crisis of Legitimacy: Corruption and internal fragmentation of the federal system with three federal member states operating without legitimate mandates for years, the foundation for a national consensus has crumbled. A fragmented state cannot deliver reconciliation, let alone credible elections.

• Monopolization of the Process: There is a clear effort by the Presidency to monopolize control over the electoral model and its administration. A process dictated by the incumbent inherently lacks the neutrality required for public trust. Without that trust, no political agreement—and no state—can endure.

President Hassan’s tenure has been characterized by the weakening of fragile institutions and the erosion of a constitutional culture. By prioritizing power-centered politics over rule-based governance, the administration has increased Somalia’s dependency on external mediation and deepened structural fragility.

Somalia currently risks sliding into prolonged institutional paralysis rather than achieving negotiated stability. In this environment, it becomes the responsibility of the citizenry to assert their constitutional sovereignty peacefully and demand a return to principle over personal calculation. The cycle of prioritizing short-term political survival over national stewardship must end if Somalia is to truly reclaim its sovereignty and independence.

Barnaamijka "Le monde qui bouge" ee ka baxa ee ka baxa TV-ga afka faransiiska ku hadla ee L'Économiste, wariyaha Annalisa Cappellini bishan February, 18 Arbacadii waxay waraysi muhiim ah kula yeelatay 𝗡𝗶𝗮𝗴𝗮𝗹𝗲' 𝗕𝗮𝗴𝗮𝘆𝗼𝗸𝗼 oo ah khabiir ku takhasustay cilmiga siyaasadda, macallinna ka ah jaamacadda Sciences Po. Waxay ka wadahadleen Somaliland, oo ah jamhuuriyad iskeed ugu dhawaaqday madax-bannaani taas oo ka go'day Soomaaliya sannadkii 1991-kii, iyo falcelinnada ka dhashay aqoonsiga ay ka heshay Israa'iil.
Waraysigani wuxuu diiradda saarayaa dhacdo weyn oo dhanka dublamaasiyadda ah: 𝗔𝗾𝗼𝗼𝗻𝘀𝗶𝗴𝗮 𝗮𝘆 𝗜𝘀𝗿𝗮'𝗶𝗶𝗹 𝘂 𝗮𝗾𝗼𝗼𝗻𝘀𝗮𝘁𝗮𝘆 𝗦𝗼𝗺𝗮𝗹𝗶𝗹𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗶𝗻𝗮𝘆 𝘁𝗮𝗵𝗮𝘆 𝗗𝗮𝘄𝗹𝗮𝗱 𝗠𝗮𝗱𝗮𝘅-𝗯𝗮𝗻𝗻𝗮𝗮𝗻.
Dulucda barnaamijku waxay daah-rogtay in tallaabadani ay tahay mid istiraatiiji ah oo salka ku haysa loolanka "Pétromarchies" (𝗾𝘂𝘄𝗮𝗱𝗮𝗵𝗮 𝘀𝗵𝗶𝗱𝗮𝗮𝗹𝗸𝗮 𝗲𝗲 𝗞𝗵𝗮𝗹𝗶𝗶𝗷𝗸𝗮) ee ka socda 𝗕𝗮𝗱𝗱𝗮 𝗖𝗮𝘀, gaar ahaan xakamaynta marinka 𝗕𝗮𝗯 𝗮𝗹-𝗠𝗮𝗻𝗱𝗲𝗯 iyo loolanka u dhexeeya isbahaysiga 𝗜𝗺𝗮𝗿𝗮𝗮𝘁𝗸𝗮/𝗜𝘀𝗿𝗮'𝗶𝗶𝗹 𝗶𝘆𝗼 𝗦𝗮𝗰𝘂𝘂𝗱𝗶𝗴𝗮/𝗧𝘂𝗿𝗸𝗶𝗴𝗮. Khabiiraddu waxay hoosta ka xariiqday in xilli ay Soomaaliya ragaadiyeen kooxo hubeysan, Somaliland ay u muuqato "Havre de paix" (𝗵𝗮𝗿𝗼 𝗻𝗮𝗯𝗮𝗱 𝗮𝗵) oo adeegsanaysa xiriirka 𝗧𝗮𝗶𝘄𝗮𝗻 iyo 𝗜𝘀𝗿𝗮'𝗶𝗶𝗹 si ay u xaqiijiso himiladeeda aqoonsi-raadinta caalamiga ah.
Waraysigan oo baxay Arbacadan, 18-ka February, Waraysigan wuxuu daarnaa xaaladda murugsan ee ka dhalatay aqoonsigii Israa’iil u fidisay Somaliland.

𝟭. Wareysiga iyo Xaaladda Guud
𝗔𝗻𝗻𝗮𝗹𝗶𝘀𝗮 ayaa ku bilaawday in saaka diiradda la saarayo Somaliland, oo ah goob ay ku loolamayaan quwadaha Khaliijku. Waxay sheegtay inay jiraan laba xisbi: Sacuudiga oo dhinac ah iyo Imaaraadka oo ay Israa’iil weheliso oo dhinaca kale ah.
𝗡𝗶𝗮𝗴𝗮𝗹𝗲' 𝗕𝗮𝗴𝗮𝘆𝗼𝗸𝗼 ayaa caddeysay in Somaliland ay tahay "dawlad aan jirin" marka loo eego sharciga caalamiga ah, balse ay tahay jamhuuriyad 1991-kii ka go’day Soomaaliya ka dib dagaal dhiig badani ku daatay. Waxay xustay in markii hore ay Itoobiya isku dayday inay aqoonsato laba sano ka hor si ay bad u hesho, balse uu Turkiga (oo saldhig badeed ku leh Soomaaliya) fashiliyay isku-daygaas, isagoo Itoobiya ku qanciyay heshiis ganacsi oo keliya.

𝟮. 𝗪𝗮𝗮 𝗺𝗮𝘅𝗮𝘆 𝗱𝗮𝗻𝘁𝗮 𝗜𝘀𝗿𝗮'𝗶𝗶𝗹?
𝗦𝘂'𝗮𝗮𝗹 - 𝗔𝗻𝗻𝗮𝗹𝗶𝘀𝗮 𝗖𝗮𝗽𝗽𝗲𝗹𝗹𝗶𝗻𝗶: "Maxay Israa’iil u aqoonsanaysaa Somaliland hadda?"
𝗝𝗮𝘄𝗮𝗮𝗯 - 𝗡𝗶𝗮𝗴𝗮𝗹𝗲' 𝗕𝗮𝗴𝗮𝘆𝗼𝗸𝗼: Waxay sheegtay inay jiraan saddex sababood oo waaweyn:
❁ 𝗔𝗺𝗻𝗶𝗴𝗮 𝗕𝗮𝗱𝗱𝗮: Somaliland waxay ku taal meel ka soo horjeedda Yemen, halkaas oo ay Xuutiyiintu ka weeraraan maraakiibta Israa’iil tan iyo 2023. Israa’iil waxay u baahan tahay joogitaan halkaas ah.
❁ 𝗦𝗮𝗹𝗱𝗵𝗶𝗴 𝗠𝗶𝗹𝗮𝘁𝗮𝗿𝗶: Israa’iil waxay doonaysaa inay hesho meel ay saldhig ciidan ka dhisato si ay ula tartanto saamaynta Soomaaliya iyo Turkiga.
❁ 𝗔𝗿𝗿𝗶𝗺𝗮𝗵𝗮 𝗙𝗮𝗹𝗮𝘀𝘁𝗶𝗶𝗻𝗶𝘆𝗶𝗶𝗻𝘁𝗮: Waxaa jira hadal-hayn (inkasta oo Somaliland ay beenisay) oo ku saabsan in dad Falastiiniyiin ah loo soo raro dhulkan.

𝟯. 𝗟𝗼𝗼𝗹𝗮𝗻𝗸𝗮 𝗞𝗵𝗮𝗹𝗶𝗶𝗷𝗸𝗮 𝗶𝘆𝗼 𝗗𝗲𝗸𝗲𝗱𝗱𝗮 𝗕𝗲𝗿𝗯𝗲𝗿𝗮
𝗦𝘂'𝗮𝗮𝗹 - 𝗔𝗻𝗻𝗮𝗹𝗶𝘀𝗮 𝗖𝗮𝗽𝗽𝗲𝗹𝗹𝗶𝗻𝗶: "Waxaan aragnaa aagag saameyn ah oo la kala jiidanayo; Somaliland waxay u dhowaanaysaa Israa’iil, halka Soomaaliya ay u dhowaanayso Sacuudiga. Ma laba xisbi oo is hor fadhiya baa?"
𝗝𝗮𝘄𝗮𝗮𝗯 - 𝗡𝗶𝗮𝗴𝗮𝗹𝗲' 𝗕𝗮𝗴𝗮𝘆𝗼𝗸𝗼: Waxay xaqiijisay in Geeska Afrika uu noqday goobta ugu loolanka badan adduunka. Waxay sheegtay in Imaaraadku uu ka go’ay waddadii ay wadaagi jireen Sacuudiga. Imaaraadku wuxuu Somaliland u rabaa laba shay:
❁ Inuu u dhowaado Suudaan, maadaama uu taageero ciidanka RSF si uu u helo dahabka Suudaan.
❁ Inuu adeegsado Dekedda Berbera oo ah beddelka keliya ee Jabuuti, maadaama ay tahay deked biyo madow leh oo muhiim u ah dhaqaalaha.

𝟰. 𝗙𝗮𝗿𝗾𝗶𝗴𝗮 𝘂 𝗗𝗵𝗮𝘅𝗲𝗲𝘆𝗮 𝗦𝗼𝗺𝗮𝗹𝗶𝗹𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗶𝘆𝗼 𝗦𝗼𝗺𝗮𝗮𝗹𝗶𝘆𝗮
𝗦𝘂'𝗮𝗮𝗹 - 𝗔𝗻𝗻𝗮𝗹𝗶𝘀𝗮 𝗖𝗮𝗽𝗽𝗲𝗹𝗹𝗶𝗻𝗶: "Immisa qof baa ku nool Somaliland, maxayse ku nool yihiin? Waxaad sheegtay inay leeyihiin lacag iyo ciidan u gaar ah."
𝗝𝗮𝘄𝗮𝗮𝗯 - 𝗡𝗶𝗮𝗴𝗮𝗹𝗲' 𝗕𝗮𝗴𝗮𝘆𝗼𝗸𝗼: Waxay sharraxday in Somaliland ay tahay "𝗛𝗮𝗿𝗼 𝗡𝗮𝗯𝗮𝗱 𝗮𝗵" (Haven of Peace) marka loo eego Soomaaliya.
❁ 𝗦𝗼𝗺𝗮𝗹𝗶𝗹𝗮𝗻𝗱: Waxay leedahay 6.5 milyan oo qof (qiyaas la mid ah Tuniisiya). Waa nidaam dimuqraadi ah oo isku dhex qasay qabiilka iyo baarlamaanka casriga ah.
❁ 𝗦𝗼𝗺𝗮𝗮𝗹𝗶𝘆𝗮: Waxay ku tilmaantay waddan uu ragaadiyay dagaal tan iyo 1991-kii, laguna dhex jiro loolan lagula jiro kooxo xiriir la leh Al-Qaacida iyo Daacish.

𝟱. 𝗔𝗾𝗼𝗼𝗻𝘀𝗶𝗴𝗮 𝗶𝘆𝗼 𝗠𝘂𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗾𝗯𝗮𝗹𝗸𝗮
𝗦𝘂'𝗮𝗮𝗹 - 𝗔𝗻𝗻𝗮𝗹𝗶𝘀𝗮 𝗖𝗮𝗽𝗽𝗲𝗹𝗹𝗶𝗻𝗶: "Haddaba maxay u baahan yihiin? Ma inay raadiyaan dawlado kale oo aqoonsada baa?"
𝗝𝗮𝘄𝗮𝗮𝗯 - 𝗡𝗶𝗮𝗴𝗮𝗹𝗲' 𝗕𝗮𝗴𝗮𝘆𝗼𝗸𝗼: Waxay xustay in Somaliland ay hadda si firfircoon u raadinayso aqoonsi. Aqoonsiga Israa’iil waa bilow, waxayna horey xiriir ula lahaayeen 
❁ 𝗧𝗮𝗶𝘄𝗮𝗻. Waxay kaloo xustay in taariikhdu ay kala qaybisay; Somaliland waxay ahayd mustacmarad Ingiriis, halka Soomaaliya ay ahayd Talayaani, taasna ay weli qayb ka tahay kala fogaanshaha maanta.
𝗚𝘂𝗻𝗻𝗮𝗮𝗻𝗮𝗱: Waraysigu wuxuu ku soo xirmay mahadnaq ay Annalisa u dirtay Niagalé, iyadoo xustay in macluumaadkani uu muhiim u yahay fahamka khariidadda cusub ee Geeska Afrika.

Israa’iil ayaa digniin degdeg ah u dirtay Turkiga oo ku saabsan aqoonsiga suurtagalka ah ee Somaliland, taas oo kor u qaadday walaaca laga qabo isbeddelka xulafooyinka iyo xasilloonida gobolka. Fiidiyowgu wuxuu sharraxayaa saameynta istiraatiijiyadeed, xiisadaha diblomaasiyadeed, iyo saameynta suurtagalka ah ee Geeska Afrika. Falanqeeyayaasha ayaa baaraya sida horumarkani uu dib u qaabayn karo siyaasadda gobolka uuna u sii qoto dheerayn karo khilaafka u dhexeeya Israa’iil iyo Turkiga.
Iyadoo laga duulayo dhacdooyinka diblomaasiyadeed ee dhacay dabayaaqadii 2025 iyo bilowga 2026, xiriirka ka dhexeeya Israa'iil iyo Turkiga wuxuu galay wajigii ugu xumaa abid sababo la xiriira aqoonsiga Somaliland.

Waa kuwan qodobbada ugu muhiimsan ee ay 𝗜𝘀𝗿𝗮'𝗶𝗶𝗹 ku tidhi ama ugu jawaabtay Turkiga:
𝟭. 𝗗𝗶𝗳𝗮𝗮𝗰𝗮 𝗠𝗮𝗱𝗮𝘅-𝗯𝗮𝗻𝗻𝗮𝗮𝗻𝗶𝗱𝗮 𝗦𝗼𝗺𝗮𝗹𝗶𝗹𝗮𝗻𝗱
Israa'iil waxay ku doodday in aqoonsigeeda Somaliland uu ku dhisanyahay xaqiiqada ka jirta dhulka. Masuuliyiinta Israa'iil waxay sheegeen in Somaliland ay buuxisay dhammaan shuruudihii dawladnimo (xuduud, dad, iyo maamul shaqaynaya), ayna xaq u leedahay in loo aqoonsado sidii ay u aqoonsadeen dawladaha kale ee ku yimid 𝗛𝗲𝘀𝗵𝗶𝗶𝘀𝘆𝗮𝗱𝗮 𝗜𝗯𝗿𝗮𝗵𝗶𝗺𝗶𝘆𝗮 (𝗔𝗯𝗿𝗮𝗵𝗮𝗺 𝗔𝗰𝗰𝗼𝗿𝗱𝘀).

𝟮. 𝗜𝘀𝗸𝗮-𝗶𝗻𝗱𝗵𝗼-𝘁𝗶𝗿𝗸𝗮 𝗗𝗵𝗮𝗹𝗲𝗲𝗰𝗮𝘆𝗻𝘁𝗮 𝗧𝘂𝗿𝗸𝗶𝗴𝗮
Markii uu Madaxweyne Erdogan ku tilmaamay aqoonsiga mid "sharci-darro ah" oo "xasillooni darro abuura," Israa'iil waxay u jawaabtay si dadban iyadoo sheegtay in tallaabadani ay tahay mid istiraatiijiyadeed oo loogu talagalay sugidda amniga marinnada caalamiga ah ee Badda Cas. Waxay u arkaan mucaaradadda Turkiga mid ku dhisnaan "danayste" iyo inuu Turkigu doonayo inuu Geeska Afrika u xirnaado isaga kaliya.

𝟯. 𝗗𝗶𝗴𝗻𝗶𝗶𝗻𝘁𝗮 𝗸𝘂 𝗦𝗮𝗮𝗯𝘀𝗮𝗻 𝗙𝗮𝗿𝗮𝗴𝗲𝗹𝗶𝗻𝘁𝗮 𝗚𝗼𝗯𝗼𝗹𝗸𝗮
Sida lagu sheegay warbixinnada falanqaynta amniga (sida kuwa 𝗙𝗗𝗗), Israa'iil waxay fariin digniin ah u dirtay Turkiga iyo saaxiibbadiis (sida Iiraan), iyadoo u sheegtay in Israa'iil ay hadda xulafo ku leedahay bariga Afrika, ayna diyaar u tahay inay ilaaliso danaha iskaashi ee ay la leedahay Somaliland. Tani waxay ka dhigan tahay in Israa'iil aysan Turkiga ka oggolaan doonin inuu keligiis maamulo siyaasadda iyo amniga marin-biyoodka muhiimka ah.

𝟰. "𝗟𝗮𝗯𝗮-𝗶𝘀-𝗸𝗮-𝗵𝗼𝗿-𝗶𝗺𝗮𝗮𝗱𝗸𝗮" 𝗧𝘂𝗿𝗸𝗶𝗴𝗮
Dhinaca Somaliland, oo ay taageerayso Israa'iil, ayaa Turkiga xasuusiyay inuu isagu ahaa waddankii ugu horreeyay ee Islaam ah oo aqoonsada Israa'iil sannadkii 𝟭𝟵𝟰𝟵, sidaas darteedna aysan habboonayn inuu maanta diido xiriirka Israa'iil iyo Somaliland dhex maraya.

𝗚𝘂𝗻𝗻𝗮𝗮𝗻𝗮𝗱
Gunaanad ahaan, qadiyaddan ku saabsan aqoonsiga Israa’iil ee Somaliland iyo digniinta ka dhalatay waxay calaamad u tahay isbeddel weyn oo ku yimid siyaasadda adduunka, gaar ahaan Geeska Afrika. Halkan waxaa ku qoran qodobbada ugu dambeeya ee lagu soo koobi karo xaaladda:
𒊹 𝗜𝘀-𝗯𝗲𝘅𝗱𝗲𝗹𝗸𝗮 𝗫𝘂𝗹𝗮𝗳𝗼𝗼𝘆𝗶𝗻𝗸𝗮: Geeska Afrika ma aha oo kaliya gobol ay ku loolamaan quwadaha maxalliga ah, balse wuxuu noqday fagaare ay ku loolamayaan quwadaha caalamiga ah sida Israa’iil iyo Turkiga. Tani waxay muujinaysaa in saamaynta diblomaasiyadeed ay hadda la xiriirto marinnada badda (Badda Cas) iyo kheyraadka dabiiciga ah.
𒊹 𝗟𝗼𝗼𝗹𝗮𝗻𝗸𝗮 𝗧𝘂𝗿𝗸𝗶𝗴𝗮 𝗶𝘆𝗼 𝗜𝘀𝗿𝗮'𝗶𝗶𝗹: Digniinta Israa’iil waxay muujinaysaa inay ka go'an tahay inay difaacdo danahooda cusub ee Somaliland, halka Turkigu uu isku arko inuu yahay ilaaliyaha midnimada Soomaaliya iyo quwad dhex-dhexaad ka ah gobolka. Labadan waddan waxay hadda ku tartamayaan cidda hoggaanka u qabanaysa isbeddellada Geeska Afrika.
𒊹 𝗠𝘂𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗾𝗯𝗮𝗹𝗸𝗮 𝗦𝗼𝗺𝗮𝗹𝗶𝗹𝗮𝗻𝗱: Inkasta oo aqoonsiga Israa’iil uu Somaliland u furay albaab weyn oo diblomaasiyadeed, haddana wuxuu geliyay xaalad adag oo caalami ah maadaama ay wajihayso mucaaradad kaga timid dalalka Muslimka ah iyo Midowga Afrika.
𒊹 𝗫𝗮𝘀𝗶𝗹𝗹𝗼𝗼𝗻𝗶𝗱𝗮 𝗚𝗼𝗯𝗼𝗹𝗸𝗮: Gunaanadku wuxuu xusayaa in haddii aan la helin is-faham dhab ah, loolankan uu u horseedi karo xiisado militari oo ka dhasha loolanka marinnada biyaha iyo saldhigyada ciidan, sidii laga dhex arkay dhaqdhaqaaqyada Masar iyo Turkiga ee dhinaca Soomaaliya.
𝗠𝗮𝘅𝗮𝘆 𝗧𝗮𝗵𝗮𝘆 𝗧𝗮𝗹𝗹𝗮𝗮𝗯𝗮𝗱𝗮 𝗫𝗶𝗴𝘁𝗮𝗮?
Xaaladdu waxay hadda u muuqataa mid u baahan in lala socdo dhismaha safaaradaha iyo heshiisyada dhaqaale ee dhabta ah ee dhex mari doona Hargeysa iyo Qudus, iyo sidoo kale falcelinta militari ee ka iman karta isbahaysiga Muqdisho iyo Ankara.

Muuqaalkii ugu weynaa ee guushan diblomaasiyadeed wuxuu dhacay markii hoggaamiyeyaasha sarsare ee Israa’iil iyo Somaliland ay saxiixeen bayaanka, iyadoo ay weheliyaan hadallo fagaare ah oo lagu nuuxnuuxsaday ujeeddooyinka lagu qoto-dheereynayo xiriirka iskaashi ee dhinacyada beeraha, tignoolajiyada, caafimaadka, iyo horumarinta dhaqaalaha. Dawladda Somaliland ayaa soo dhaweysay aqoonsiga, iyagoo ku tilmaamay xaqiijin taariikhi ah oo ku aaddan hamigooda mudada dheer ee aqoonsi caalami ah. Waxaa sidoo kale la soo wariyay in wasiirka arrimaha dibadda ee Israa’iil uu booqasho heer sare ah ku tagay Hargeysa, caasimadda Somaliland, horraantii bishii Janaayo 2026, si uu u bilaabo hirgelinta dhinacyada xiriirka laba-geesoodka ah, oo ay ku jiraan wadahadallo hordhac ah oo ku saabsan dhisidda safaarad Israa’iil ay ku yeelato halkaas.

Waxa muhiimka ah ayaa ah in aqoonsiga Israa’iil ee Somaliland uu ka gudbay oo kaliya xaqiijin astaan ah, isagoo u gudbay tillaabooyin dhab ah oo lagu horumarinayo xiriirka laba-geesoodka ah. Booqashooyinka diblomaasiyadeed ee heerka sare ah, qorshayaasha dhisidda safaaradaha, iyo wadahadallada ku saabsan iskaashiga dhaqaalaha iyo farsamada ayaa hoosta ka xariiqaya in labada dhinac ee Qudus iyo Hargeysa ay damacsan yihiin inay aqoonsiga rasmiga ah u beddelaan iskaashi firfircoon. Dawladda Somaliland ayaa muujisay kheyraadka ay leedahay sida macdanta, fursadaha beeraha, kheyraadka tamarta, iyo booska istiraatiijiyadeed inay yihiin waddooyin lagu qoto-dheereynayo iskaashiga Israa’iil, oo ay ku jirto soo jiidashada tignoolajiyada iyo maalgashiga.

Doodda socota waxay sidoo kale iftiiminaysaa sida quwadaha gobolka iyo kuwa caalamiga ah ay dib ugu eegayaan doorkooda arrimaha Afrika. Dhinac, tallaabada Israa’iil waxaa loo arki karaa qayb ka mid ah istiraatiijiyadda iskaashiga diblomaasiyadeed ee firfircoon ee raadinaya saaxiibtinimo ka jirta gobollada istiraatiijiga ah ee xasaasiga ah. Dhanka kale, waddamada sida Turkiga, Masar, iyo kuwa kale waxay u fasirteen iskaashigaas mid faragelin ah oo carqalad ku ridi kara xulafooyinka jira laguna dhiirigelinayo dhaqdhaqaaqyada goosashada ee leh cawaaqib aan la saadaalin karin.

Trovoada reuniu se ontem com o Presidente de Transição, Horta Intá. No final do encontro não houve declarações à imprensa. Mas mais tarde, em comunicado de imprensa, o governo guineense considerou a visita de Trovoada como uma "diplomacia discreta".

Open Arms: A Reunion of Resilience Outside the Whipple Building

MINNEAPOLIS  - On a gray Wednesday afternoon — February 18, 2026 — a set of heavy doors opened at the Whipple Building, and a family’s long nightmare paused, if only for a moment.

A woman stepped into the cold air and into the arms of those who had been waiting for her. Tears came first. Then tight embraces. Then the quiet, disbelieving laughter that sometimes follows trauma. Around them, volunteers in bright orange vests moved gently and deliberately, offering blankets against the February chill, warm food, steady hands, and something less tangible but just as vital: reassurance.

The volunteers were with Haven Watch, a grassroots network that shows up whenever someone is released from immigration detention. Their presence is intentional and immediate — to soften the first shock of freedom, to provide transportation, to connect families with legal and social resources, and to remind those walking out that they are not alone.

Moments before the woman’s release, another man had emerged to a similar scene of relief and disbelief. By day’s end, about eight people had been released, according to one Haven volunteer. Eight reunions. Eight families stepping into a complicated mix of gratitude and grief.

U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement continues its operations in Minnesota, as it does across the country. Families endure sudden separations. Children miss parents. Partners shoulder uncertainty alone. For many, the knock on the door or the traffic stop that leads to detention feels less like a bureaucratic process and more like an abduction — abrupt, disorienting, and shattering.

The woman reunited with her loved ones Wednesday carried more than a small bundle of belongings. She carried the invisible weight of confinement: the anxiety, the unanswered questions, the fear of what might come next. 

Her family, too, bore their own scars — days or weeks defined by frantic phone calls, legal consultations, sleepless nights, and the constant dread of permanent separation.
The reunion, then, was both a celebration and a reckoning.

It should not require volunteers with emergency blankets to mark a family’s embrace. It should not take coordinated rides, donated meals, and rapid-response networks to ensure that someone leaving detention can return home safely. And yet, in this moment, that community response made all the difference.

Haven Watch was created precisely for days like Wednesday. The group mobilizes to meet people at the moment of release from ICE detention centers, providing immediate care, warmth, and logistical support. Volunteers coordinate transportation, connect families to attorneys and community organizations, and offer a steady presence during an intensely vulnerable transition.

Their orange vests have become a symbol — not of protest alone, but of accompaniment.
Outside the Whipple Building, as cameras clicked and relatives wiped their eyes, the woman held her family tightly, as if relearning the shape of them. Around her, strangers-turned-helpers stood witness. In a system that often feels impersonal and immense, the scene was intimate and human.

This reunion should never have been necessary. The trauma that preceded it will not disappear with a single embrace. But for one February afternoon, love outpaced fear. Community met crisis. And when the doors opened, hope stepped through with her.

To learn more about Haven Watch or to support its work assisting individuals released from detention, visit havenwatch.org.

🇪🇹🇪🇷 Dagaal cusub ayaa mar kale ka soo ifbaxaya Geeska Afrika. Jilayaasha ugu waaweyn waa Itoobiya, Tigray iyo Eritrea, balse quwadaha shisheeye qaarkood ayaa iyaguna si heerar kala duwan uga qayb qaadanaya. Halkan waxaa ku qoran taariikh kooban oo ku saabsan Itoobiya si loo fahmo xaaladda hadda taagan.

Itoobiya waxay mar ahayd boqortooyo mideysay qowmiyado kala duwan. Wakhtigaas Eritrea waxay ahayd qayb muhiim ah oo ka tirsan boqortooyadaas.

Eritrea waxay bilowday dagaal ay ku doonaysay madaxbannaani sannadkii 1961.

Sannadkii 1974, boqortooyadii Itoobiya waxaa afgambi ku riday nidaam shuuci ah. Nidaamka cusub ee la oran jiray Derg wuxuu ahaa mid aad u ad-adag oo arxan daran. Sidaas darteed qowmiyadaha kala duwan ee Itoobiya waxay bilaabeen halgan hubaysan oo ka dhan ah Derg.

Nidaamkii Derg wuxuu dhacay 1991. Eritrea waxay heshay madaxbannaanideeda, waxaana aqoonsaday beesha caalamka. Itoobiya markaas waxaa xukumi jiray isbahaysi la oran jiray Ethiopian People’s Revolutionary Democratic Front (EPRDF), oo ka koobnaa kooxihii ka adkaaday Derg. Kooxda ugu weyn waxay ahayd Tigray People’s Liberation Front (TPLF). Inkastoo Tigreegu ay ahaayeen tiro yar marka loo eego guud ahaan shacabka Itoobiya, haddana iyaga ayaa si weyn dalka u maamuli jiray.

Sannadkii 2018, Abiy Ahmed wuxuu noqday guddoomiyaha EPRDF. Wuxuu ku doodayay nabad iyo xorriyadda hadalka. Isla sannadkaas wuxuu soo afjaray dagaalkii Badme ee u dhexeeyay Itoobiya iyo Eritrea (1998–2018, ku dhowaad 100,000 qof ayaa ku dhintay muran ku saabsan tuulo yar). Sannadkii xigay wuxuu helay Abaalmarinta Nabadda ee Nobel.

Sannadkii 2020, cudurka Covid ayaa yimid. Abiy wuxuu dib u dhigay doorashooyinkii. Laakiin TPLF ee gobolka Tigray waxay qabteen doorasho iyaga u gaar ah. Waxa bilowday howlgal lagu sheegay “ilaalinta sharciga iyo kala dambeynta” oo ay fulisay dowladda Itoobiya, balse wuxuu isu beddelay dagaal buuxa.

Intii u dhexeysay 2020 iyo 2022, waxaa la qiyaasaa in u dhexeeya 100,000 ilaa 400,000 qof ay dhinteen, badankoodna rayid ay saameeyeen macluul iyo dhibaatooyin kale. Waxaa lagu tilmaamay musiibadii bani’aadamnimo ee ugu weynayd tobankii sano ee la soo dhaafay, inkastoo warbaahinta caalamka si weyn uga hadlin. Eritrea oo weli colaad ka qabtay TPLF ayaa iyaduna ku biirtay dagaalka ka dhanka ah Tigray. Maanta, xoogagga Tigray weli waxay gacanta ku hayaan inta badan gobolka.

Itoobiya sidoo kale waxay ku hareeraysan tahay laba aag oo dagaal ka socda: Soomaaliya iyo Suudaan. Itoobiya waxay taageertaa RSF ee Suudaan, waxaana lagu tuhmaa inay tababar iyo hub siiso. Dhinaca kale, Itoobiya waxay isku dayday inay hesho marin badeed iyada oo heshiis la gashay Somaliland, balse heshiiskaasi wuu burburay kadib cadaadis caalami ah.

Itoobiya waa dalka ugu weyn dunida ee aan lahayn bad (landlocked). Ganacsigeeda badankiis wuxuu maraa Jabuuti, balse khidmadaha ayaa culays saaraya dhaqaalaha — qiyaastii $2 ilaa $5 bilyan sanadkii. Itoobiya waxay lumisay marin badeed markii Eritrea ka go’day. Abiy Ahmed marar badan ayuu ballan qaaday inuu saxayo “khaladkan taariikhiga ah”.

Dhaqdhaqaaqyada milatari ee dhawaan ka socda waqooyiga dalka waxay muujinayaan in Itoobiya laga yaabo inay tallaabo qaaddo. Iyadoo ay dib u soo cusboonaadeen iska horimaadyada Tigray iyo dagaallo ay wadaan maleeshiyaadka Amxaarada, gobolka uma muuqdo mid si dhow nabad ugu soo laabanaya. Dekedda Assab ee koonfurta Eritrea-na waxay u jirtaa kaliya 60 km…

Barnaamijka XISBIGA TIIR: Midnimo, Dib-u-Heshiisiin iyo Mustaqbalka Soomaaliya

#Hordhac: Waddada Mustaqbalka

Soomaaliya waa dhul hodan ku ah taariikh iyo dhaqan, balse burburkii dagaallada sokeeye iyo kala qaybsanaanta beeleed ayaa dalka ka dhigay meel dhib iyo hami la’aan ka muuqato. Haddaba, su’aashu waxay tahay: Ma ka jawaabi karnaa baaqa qaranka ee midnimo, nabad, iyo horumar?

Xisbiga Xisbiga TIIR wuxuu leeyahay jawaab cad: Haa, haddii dhammaanteen aan qaadno jidka dib-u-heshiisiinta dhab ah, qaranimo, iyo hogaamin daacad ah. Barnaamijkan TIIR ma aha erayo qurux badan oo la isku qurxiyo; waa waddo hufan oo iftiimaysa mustaqbalka dalka, waa qorshe cad oo lagu mideynayo shacabkii kala firdhay, laguna dhisayo Soomaaliya aan cidna ka reeban.

1. #Qaranimo Ka Sarreysa Qabiil

TIIR waxay rumeysan tahay in qarannimada ay tahay laf-dhabarta mideynta dalka. Qabyaaladdu waa cudur bulshada kala gooya; waa wax aan u qalmin dal horumarsan.
 • Waxaa lagama maarmaan ah in xilalka iyo fursadaha lagu saleeyo kartida iyo hufnaanta, ee aan lagu qiimeyn qabiil ama deegaan.
 • Jiilka cusub waa in lagu barbaariyo dareen waddaniyadeed, midnimo iyo rabitaan ah in dalka la hormariyo.

Marka qof kasta dareemo in uu leeyahay xuquuq siman, kalsoonida iyo wadajirka bulsho way soo laabanayaan. Qaran adag ayaa ka sarreeya wax kasta oo kala qeybinaya bulshada.

2. #Dib-u-Heshiisiin Dhab ah: Bogsiinta Dhaawacyadii Taariikhda

Midnimo ma timaado haddii dhaawacyadii hore aan la bogsiin. TIIR waxay ku baaqaysaa dib-u-heshiisiin dhab ah, oo ku dhisan qirasho khaladaadkii dhacay, is-cafin dhab ah, iyo wada-hadal furan.

Fikradda is-cafintu ma aha in la iloobo wixii dhacay, balse waa in laga gudbo carada, aargoosiga, iyo cabsida, si loo dhiso mustaqbal wadajir ah.

Tusaalaha caalamiga ah waa dalka South Africa, oo ka gudbay nidaam midab-takoorka ah iyada oo la adeegsanayo dib-u-heshiisiin iyo cafis uu hormuud u ahaa Nelson Mandela. Inkastoo uu sannado badan xabsi ku jiray, haddana wuxuu doortay waddada nabadda halkii uu ka dooran lahaa aargoosi. Tani waa cashar cad oo muujinaya in geesinimada iyo is-cafintu ay ka sarreeyaan colaadda iyo xumaanta.

3. #owladnimo Hufan iyo Cadaalad: Dhisidda Aasaaska Midnimada

Qaran la’aan cadaalad ah, midnimo ma jirto. TIIR waxay xooga saarayaa dowladnimo hufan oo ku dhisan:
 • Garsoor madax bannaan oo siman, oo sharciga u adeegaya qof kasta.
 • Ka hortagga musuqmaasuqa iyo eexda, si dhammaan muwaadiniintu ay u dareemaan sinnaanta.
 • Gaarsiinta adeegyada bulshada si siman dhammaan gobollada dalka.

Cadaaladdu waa saldhigga nabadda; nabadduna waa saldhigga horumarka. Haddii aan ku noolaano cadaalad la’aan, horumar ma iman doono.

4. #Amni iyo Xasilooni: Laf-dhabarta Midnimada

Midnimo lama gaari karo haddii aan amni jirin. Barnaamijka TIIR wuxuu xooga saarayaa:
 • Dhisidda ciidamo qaran oo mideysan, tababaran, kana madax bannaan saameyn qabiil.
 • Ka hortagga kooxaha burburinaya nabadda iyo fikirrada xagjirka ah.
 • Abuurista fursado waxbarasho iyo shaqo oo dhalinyarada loogu talagalay, si looga hortago tahriib iyo xagjirnimo.

Marka amni iyo fursado la helo, ganacsi wuu kobcaa, maalgelin wuu soo noqdaa, bulshada oo dhanna waxay ku noolaan kartaa nabad iyo wadajir.

5. #Horumar Dhaqaale oo Loo Siman Yahay

TIIR waxay rumeysan tahay in horumar dhaqaale oo loo siman yahay uu yahay laf-dhabarta midnimada. Barnaamijku wuxuu xooga saarayaa:
 • Horumarinta wax-soo-saarka gudaha sida beeraha, xoolaha, kalluumeysiga, iyo ganacsiga yaryar.
 • Maalgelinta kaabeyaasha muhiimka ah sida waddooyinka, dekedaha, iyo korontada.
 • Dhiirrigelinta hal-abuurka dhalinyarada iyo ganacsiga, si loo abuuro shaqo iyo fursado nololeed.

Marka dhaqaalaha kobco, saboolnimadu yaraato, dadkuna waxay dareemaan in ay qayb ka yihiin horumarka qaranka.

#Gabagabo: Wadajir iyo Mustaqbal Ifaya

Barnaamijka Xisbiga TIIR waa jid cad oo loogu talagalay in Soomaaliya dib loogu soo celiyo midnimadeeda, sharafteeda, iyo horumarkeeda. Waxay ku dhisan tahay qaranimo, dib-u-heshiisiin dhab ah, dowladnimo hufan, amni waara, iyo horumar dhaqaale.

Midnimo waa hawl, waa yool, waa geesinimo; waxay u baahan tahay ka-qaybgal bulsho oo dhan, dulqaad, iyo hoggaan daacad ah. Haddaan qaadanno jidkan, Soomaaliya waxay noqon doontaa dal leh nabad waarta, horumar joogto ah, iyo bulsho isku duuban.

Waddada badbaadada iyo horumarka waa halkan. Shacabka Soomaaliyeed, aan midowno! Xisbiga TIIR ayaa hogaaminaya jidkan.

Soomaaliya ha noolaato, nabad iyo horumar ha ku wada jirto! 🇸🇴

BAYAAN RASMI AH

Taariikh: 20 February 2026

Jaaliyadda KoonfurGalbeed Somalia Belgium ee Dalka Belgium waxay si cad u beenineysaa wararka lagu baahiyey baraha bulshada ee sheegaya in Jaaliyaddu ay abaalmarinta Nabadda (Peace Award) gudoonsiisay Madaxweynihii hore ee Koonfur Galbeed, Mudane Sharif Hassan Sheikh Adan, taas oo la sheegay in lagu bixiyey magaalada Muqdisho 19 February 2026.

Jaaliyaddu waxay caddeyneysaa in arrintaasi ay tahay mid been abuur ah oo aan wax sal iyo raad ah lahayn. abaalmarinta lagu soo bandhigay sawirrada la faafiyey ma aha mid ay Jaaliyaddu bixisay, mana jirto wax xiriir ah oo Jaaliyaddu ku leedahay.

Sidoo kale, Jaaliyaddu waxay caddeyneysaa in Mohamed Issack Abdi uusan matalin Jaaliyadda Koonfur Galbeed Soomaaliya, maadaama horey xilkii Guddoomiye Ku-xigeenka looga qaaday sababo la xiriira musuq-maasuq iyo ku-takri-fal hantiyeed oo uu u geystay hantida Jaaliyadda.

Ugu dambeyn, Jaaliyadda Koonfur Galbeed Soomaaliya ee Dalka Belgium waxay mar kale xaqiijineysaa in magaca Jaaliyadda aan lagu bixin ama lagu gudoonsiin wax abaalmarin Nabadeed ah Mudane Sharif Hassan Sheikh Adan. 

Jaaliyaddu waxay ka digeysaa in magaca iyo sumcadda Jaaliyadda si khaldan loo adeegsado, waxayna ka codsaneysaa bulshada in ay ka feejignaadaan wararka aan la hubin.

Wabillaahi Towfiiq.

Jaaliyadda Koonfur Galbeed Soomaaliya
Belgium

Le Président de la République du #Burundi et Président en exercice de l'Union Africaine , Son Excellence Evariste Ndayishimiye , a reçu en audience Dr. Mamadou Tangara, Représentant spécial de l’UA pour le #Mali et la #MiSahel. La corruption est l’abus de pouvoir confié à des fins privées. Elle peut prendre la forme de pots-de-vin, de détournements de fonds, de favoritisme ou de clientélisme. C'est un problème multifacette qui touche tous les pays, mais qui a ses racines dans des facteurs spécifiques.
  𝙙𝙚 𝙡𝙖 𝙘𝙤𝙧𝙧𝙪𝙥𝙩𝙞𝙤n
● Faiblesse des institutions et manque de transparence. 
● Pauvreté et bas salaires qui poussent certains à chercher des revenus illégaux. 
● Concentration excessive du pouvoir sans contre-pouvoirs. 
● Culture de l’impunité : quand les corrompus ne sont jamais sanctionnés. 
  𝙙𝙚 𝙡𝙖 𝙘𝙤𝙧𝙧𝙪𝙥𝙩𝙞𝙤n :
●Économiques : fuite des capitaux, baisse des investissements, ralentissement du développement. 
● Sociales : inégalités accrues, perte de confiance des citoyens envers l’État, la migration etc... 
● Politiques : fragilisation de la démocratie, montée des régimes autoritaires. 
● Environnementales : projets destructeurs validés au détriment de l’intérêt public. 
  𝙛𝙖𝙞𝙧𝙚 𝙥𝙤𝙪𝙧 𝙙𝙞𝙢𝙞𝙣𝙪𝙚𝙧 𝙡𝙖 𝙘𝙤𝙧𝙧𝙪𝙥𝙩𝙞𝙤𝙣 ?
● Renforcer la transparence et la digitalisation des services publics. 
● Protéger les lanceurs d’alerte et les journalistes. 
● Éduquée les citoyens à leurs droits et responsabilités. 
● Exiger des sanctions exemplaires contre les corrompus. 
●  Pays le plus corrompu : Somalie (score le plus bas). 
●  Pays le moins corrompu : Danemark (score le plus élevé). 
● Source : Transparency International, Indice de Perception de la Corruption 2025
La corruption est un phénomène complexe aux causes variées, mais ses conséquences sont claires et néfastes. Combattre la corruption nécessite une action collective : des gouvernements responsables, des citoyens informés et des entreprises éthiques. À tous les niveaux, nous avons le pouvoir de changer les choses.

Sources : Économiste.

Police in Somalia’s North East State Arrest Man Over Bribe Attempt

LAS ANOD- Somalia - Police in #Somalia’s North East State said they arrested a man who tried to bribe officers to release a vehicle allegedly used to transport alcohol. The suspect reportedly offered cash to have the detained vehicle freed but was apprehended on the spot.

Authorities emphasized that corruption and bribery would not be tolerated, describing the arrest as part of a broader effort to enforce the law and maintain discipline within the force.

North East State, Somalia’s newest federal member, was formed after breaking away from the separatist administration of Somaliland. Analysts described the split as the outcome of months of violent conflict, highlighting the fragile and contested political landscape of Somalia’s northern territories.

For the fledgling administration, the arrest was presented as an early test of its commitment to governance and the rule of law — a signal that the new state aims to differentiate itself from entrenched practices in other parts of the country.

#Sheekada Cabdimalik Abshir Yuusuf waa mid qalbiga taabaneysa, mid ka hadlaysa riyo, rafaad iyo rajada aan wali damin xitaa marka nololku kugu adkaado.
Cabdimalik wuxuu ka soo haajiray dalkiisa hooyo, gaar ahaan magaalada Boosaaso, halkaas oo uu ka bilaabay socdaalkiisii tahriibka sanadkii 2022. Wuxuu qalbigiisa ku sitay hal riyo oo keliya inuu gaaro Yurub, si uu u helo nolol ka wanaagsan tan uu kaga soo tagay dalkiisa.

Laakiin safarku ma ahayn mid fudud.
Cabdimalik wuxuu ku dhacay gacanta magafayaal arxan daran. Muddo ayuu ku xirnaa meel cidlo ah, isagoo la kulmay jirdil, gaajo, bahdil iyo xanuun maskaxeed oo aan la qiyaasi karin. Qof kasta oo maqla waxa uu soo maray wuu ogaanayaa in jirkiisa la garaacay, balse qalbigiisa iyo maskaxdiisa ay ka sii dhaawacmeen.

Maanta Cabdimalik wuxuu ku sugan yahay dalka Libya. Wuxuu la nool yahay jugihii iyo xanuunkii uu kala kulmay magafayaasha dhaawac aan weli bogsan, mid jir iyo mid maskaxeedba leh. Mararka qaar xanuunka ayaa ka xoog badan, hadalkiisuna noqdaa mid murugo xambaarsan.

Dhanka kale, qoyskiisa waa reer danyar ah. Waxay bixiyeen wixii yar ee ay haysteen si ay wiilkooda u badbaadiyaan, iyagoo rajeynaya mustaqbal ifaya. Maantana waxay noqdeen kuwo dibad joog ah, qalbigooduna uu ka buuxo walaac iyo quus.
Hooyadiis waxay mar tiri:
“Wiilkayga nolol ama geeri ii keena, xitaa hadduu xanuunsan yahay dalkiisa ha lagu soo celiyo.”

Waa hadal qalbi jab ah oo ka yimid hooyo quusatay, balse wali jacaylka wiilkeeda ka buuxo.
Laakiin Cabdimalik wuu diiday inuu dib ugu laabto Soomaaliya. Inkastoo uu ku jiro xaalad adag oo dhimasho u dhow, haddana wuxuu weli ku adkeysanayaa inuu sii wado safarkiisa nololeed. Rajadiisu wali ma dhiman.

Waxaa jiray waqti la faafiyay war sheegaya inuu dhintay, sawirkiisana lagu baahiyay baraha bulshada. Qoyska iyo asxaabtiisu waxay galeen murugo iyo tiiraanyo aan la qiyaasi karin. Laakiin Alle mahaddii, warkaas wuxuu noqday mid aan sax ahayn Cabdimalik waa noolyahay.
Noloshiisu maanta waa mid u dhaxeysa rajo iyo rafaad. Waa sheeko ka tarjumeysa dhibaatada tahriibka, riyada dhalinyarada Soomaaliyeed, iyo qiimaha ay ku bixiyaan mustaqbal ay u arkaan mid ka roon kan ay ka soo tageen.

Cabdimalik ma aha magac keliya. Waa kumannaan dhalinyaro ah oo riyo ku baxay, qaarna aan la ogeyn meel ay ku dambeeyeen.
Ilaahow u fududee, u gargaar, qalbigiisana nabad geli. 🤲

The WTO Internship Programme provides an opportunity for post-graduate students and recent graduates with a master’s or PhD degree, from WTO member and observer countries to gain valuable experience from working at the WTO.

Eligibility criteria
be a national of a WTO member state or a country or customs territory engaged in accession negotiations
have completed his/her undergraduate studies in a relevant discipline;
either:
be currently enrolled in a master’s degree with at least one year completed; or
have completed a master's degree programme and be enrolled in a higher-level postgraduate programme (including doctoral studies); or
have completed a postgraduate degree (master’s degree or PHD) within the past two years at the time of selection; and
be at least 21 years at the time of the internship.

Wll bal inyar ila soco.. aan dib kuugu celiyo bog ka mid ah boggagii ugu xasaasisanaa taariikhdeena Islaamka..

​Aan wada qiyaasno inaan hadda dhex joogno magaalada Madiina, xilli uu Rasuulku ﷺ si habsami leh u diyaarinayo ciidan aad u weyn, isagoo qorshaynaya inuu ku dhaqaaqo dhanka Makka si uu u furto..

​Si qorshahaas weyn uu u meel-maro, arrintu waxay ahayd mid si heer sare ah u qarsoon. Xitaa Nabiguna ﷺ cidna uma sheegin halka rasmiga ah ee loo socdo, si aanay Qureysh xogtaas u helin oo aysan ugu diyaar garoobin dagaal, dhiigna uusan ugu daadan dhulka barakeysan ee Xaramka..

​Sidaas darteed, sir-qariska ayaa ahaa hubka ugu weyn ee hawlgalkan lagu tiirsanaa.. 

Laakiin.. dhexdaas iyadoo xaaladdu sidaas tahay oo sirta intaas le'eg la qarinayo, ayaa si kedis ah waxaa u dhacay arrin aan marnaba la filayn..

Dhacdadaas lama filaanka ah waxay ahayd, in saxaabi weyn oo ka mid ahaa halyeeyadii Beder, magaciisuna yahay "Xaaddib bin Abii Balcatah", uu qoray farriin sir ah. Wuxuuna u dhiibay haweeney u safreysay dhanka Makka, si ay ugu sheegto Qureysh dhaqdhaqaaqa ciidanka Muslimiinta..

​Si aan loo fahmin, haweeneydii waxay farriintii si taxadar leh ugu dhex qarisay timaheeda, ka dibna way ambabaxday..

​Bal yara istaag halkaan oo ma fahantay xaaladda? Shaacinta sirta ciidan ee caynkan ah waxay halis weyn ku tahay burburinta ciidan dhan.. 

Sidaas darteed, iyadoo khatartaas laga hortagayo, isla markiiba waxyiga ayaa cirka kasoo degay si uu Rasuulka ﷺ ugu sheego wixii dhacay oo dhan..

​Markii uu warkii helay, Nabiga ﷺ wuxuu markiiba diray saddex ka mid ah geesiyaashii Saxaabada, kuwaas oo kala ahaa: Cali bin Abii Daalib, Subeyr bin Cawwaam, iyo Miqdaad bin Camri.. (RC) 

Haddaba ​Si degdeg ah, saddexdoodii waxay ku bexeen xawaarihii ugu dheereeyay ilaa ay haweeneydii kaga soo gaareen meel la yiraahdo "Rawdat Khaakh".
​Markii ay u tageen, waxay si toos ah uga dalbadeen inay soo saarto warqadda, balse aad bay u beenisay inay wax waddo. 

Halkana waxaa kasoo muuqday go'aan adag iyo dhab ka hadal, iyadoo Cali (RC) uu ku yiri isagoo adeegsanaya lahjad aan muran ogoleyn:

​"Wallaahi Rasuulka (SCW) ma been sheegin, ee waa inaad warqadda soo saartaa ama waan kaa baaraynaa." 

Haddaba, markii ay aragtay in arrintu ay dhab tahay oo aan laga laabanayn, ayay warqaddii kasoo bixisay gudaha timaheeda..

​Ugu dambayntiina, warqaddii halista ahayd ayaa si nabad ah dib loogu soo celiyay Madiina. Haddana, sawiro maskaxdaada.. 

Xaaddib wuxuu toos u hortaagan yahay Nabiga (SCW), isagoo sugaya xukunkiisa.. 

​Isla goobtaas, Cumar bin Khaddaab (RC), isagoo leh qiiiradiisii iyo dhiiranaantii diimeed ee lagu yaqaanay, ayaa aad u carooday oo yiri: "Rasuulka Alloow, i daa aan qoorta ka gooyo munaafaqaane"

​Runtii, xaaladdu ma ahayn mid la dhayalsan karo ama dib loo dhigi karo, maxaa yeelay dambigu wuxuu ahaa mid aad u weyn..

Laakiin, yara sug wll.. bal si qoto dheer u eeg siduu xaaladdan xasaasiga ah ula dhaqmay Hoggaamiyihii naxariista badnaa ee Nabiga ﷺ.

​In kasta oo falku sidaas u weynaa, haddana kuma xukumin nifaaq ama munaafaqnimo, mana u degdegin inuu go'aan adag ka qaato.. 

Balse taas bedelkeeda, wuxuu si degan u weydiiyay si uu u fahmo sababta dhabta ah ee falkan ka dambeysa, wuxuuna yiri Nabiga ﷺ: "Maxaa kugu xambaaray waxa aad sameysay Xaaddiboow?".

​Markaas ayaa Xaaddib istaagay, isagoo daacadnimo iyo cabsi Alle ay ka buuxdo qalbigiisa, wuxuuna si dhab ah u sharxay cudurdaarkiisa isagoo leh:

​"Rasuulka Alloow.. arrintan marnaba uma sameyn gaalnimo iyo diin ka bixitaan toona, laakiin waxaan ahaa nin ku dhex nool Qureysh oo aan qabiil ahaan kasoo jeedin.. 

Sidaad la socoto, dhammaan Muhaajiriinta kula joogtana waxay Makka ku leeyihiin qabaa'il awood leh oo difaaca ehelkooda.. Markaas ayaan aniguna doonay inaan u sameeyo abaal ay ku ilaaliyaan ehelkayga aan garabka lahayn ee halkaas jooga."

​Sida ka muuqata hadalkiisa, tani ma ahayn khiyaano diimeed oo uu ku kacay Xaaddib, mana uusan gelin wax shaki ah xitaa hal ilbiriqsi oo ku saabsan in Alle u gargaarayo ciidanka Muslimiinta..

​Balse xaqiiqadu waxay ahayd qalad ka yimid qalbiga aabbe aad u welwelsan, kana baqaya badbaadada qoyskiisa aan difaaca lahayn ee ku sugan cadawga dhexdiisa ee Makka.. 

​Haddaba, markuu maqlay cudurdaarkaas, bal maqal jawaabta cajiibka ah ee Nabiga ﷺ oo runtii mudan in lagu qoro biyaha dahabka. 

Wuxuu ku yiri saxaabada: "Wuu idiin run sheegay."

​Kadibna, ayuu si naxariis leh u jaleecay Cumar oo ku yiri:

​“Maxaad ogtahay, Cumaroow? Bal laga yaabee in Alle (SWT) eegay dadkii ka qayb galay Beder, markaasna uu ku yidhi: Sameeya waxaad doontaan.. waan idiin dhaafay dambiyadiinna.”

​Allaahu Akbar.. Halkaas, Nabiga ﷺ wuxuu dhammaantood xasuusiyay taariikhdiisii hore ee quruxda badneyd, iyo istaaggisii weynaa ee maalintii dagaalkii Beder..

Dabcan, tani macnaheedu maaha in ehelkii Beder ay dambiyo sameynayaan xisaab la'aan ama in la iska deynayo, balse waxay si cad u muujinaysaa inay leeyihiin maqaam weyn, daacadnimo iyo ikhlaas sababay in Ilaahay uga dhaafo qaladkan weyn ee uu dhacay..
​
Intaas kuma ekaan naxariistii Nabiga ﷺ, balse si loo sii xaqiijiyo in falku uu ahaa qalad weyn iyadoo aan haddana la gaalaysiin qofka sameeyay, ayaa waxaa soo degay Aayad Qur'aanka Kariimka ah oo si naxariis leh u canaananaya Xaaddib bilowga Suurada Al-Mumtaxanah:

Diyaarinta agabka diiwaangelinta codbixiyayaasha ee doorashada guud ee 7-aad ayaa socota.

Addis Ababa; Cirir 13/2018 (ENA): Guddiga Doorashooyinka Qaranka ee Itoobiya ayaa kormeer ku sameeyay warbaahinta si loo diyaariyo agabka diiwaangelinta codbixiyayaasha ee doorashada guud ee 7-aad.

Inta uu booqashada ku jiray, Melake Alula, Madaxa Saadka ee Guddiga, ayaa sheegay in kala soocidda agabka goob kasta oo doorasho ah si taxaddar leh loo fulinayo.

Waxa kale oo uu sheegay in shaqada diyaarinta ay ka fiirsanayso 52,720 oo xarumood oo doorasho ah oo dalka oo dhan ka jira.

Waxa kale oo uu ku dhawaaqay in waraaqaha qoraalka, tilmaamaha xallinta cabashooyinka iyo sanduuqyada macluumaadka ee loo diyaarin doono xarun kasta si faahfaahsan loo diyaarinayo.

Waxa uu sheegay in Adeegga Boostada Itoobiya uu wado xakamaynta tayada hawsha.

Waxa uu tilmaamay in agabka doorashada ay ku jiraan qalab tignoolajiyadeed oo looga baahan yahay diiwaangelinta warqadda iyo tan aadanaha oo suurtogalinaysa geeddi-socod diiwaangelin oo tiknoolajiyadu ka caawiso.

President Donald Trump said on Wednesday that the ongoing investigation into alleged voter fraud in Fulton County, Georgia will reveal the “true winner” of the 2020 election in the state. His statement has reignited debate over election integrity and the long-disputed Georgia results.
 Supporters of Trump argue that the investigation could expose irregularities and strengthen claims of fraud, while critics maintain that the 2020 election results have already been certified and upheld through multiple recounts and court challenges. The clash reflects the deep divide over how elections are viewed and trusted in America.
 This latest remark adds fuel to the broader national conversation about democracy, accountability, and public confidence in voting systems. With Georgia at the center of the controversy, the outcome of the Fulton County probe is being closely watched across the country.

The African Union has renewed efforts to revive the process through a proposed roadmap, while fresh mediation under the Tumaini Initiative, backed by Kenya and IGAD seeks to bring hold-out groups into dialogue.

At the same time, the transitional government has established a new leadership body to build national consensus ahead of the planned December 2026 elections.

post_text_pi:
On World Social Justice Day, Federation of Somali Trade Unions - FESTU stands firm in the fight for decent work, workers’ rights and social peace in Somalia.

If our country is to move forward in a meaningful way, social justice must be realised through fair and living wages, safe and dignified workplaces, full freedom of association, an end to exploitation and abuse, equal rights for women and youth and universal social protection.

Without social justice, there can be no real development in Somalia.

House Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries has been vocally critical of recent Republican‑led voting proposals, particularly the federal Safeguard American Voter Eligibility (SAVE) Act and similar efforts to impose nationwide voting requirements. In interviews with national media, Jeffries argued that these types of bills — which would mandate proof of citizenship and photo ID for federal elections — are not genuinely about election integrity but instead amount to “blatant voter suppression.” He claimed that Republican lawmakers are pushing these measures because they believe they cannot win in a free and fair election without making it harder for certain groups of voters to participate.

Jeffries has emphasized that many states already have their own voter ID laws and that efforts to impose federal standards are unnecessary and potentially disenfranchising. He told reporters that Republicans know they would lose if elections were conducted fairly under current state rules, and that’s why he believes they are pursuing federal restrictions. This framing has become a central part of Democratic messaging as the 2026 midterm elections approach, with Jeffries and colleagues saying they will resist what they see as tactics aimed at reducing voter turnout among key Democratic constituencies.

Republican supporters of voter ID and related legislation argue that such rules are vital for protecting election integrity by preventing fraud and ensuring only eligible citizens vote. However, critics like Jeffries counter that these changes disproportionately affect older adults, people of color, young voters, and low‑income citizens who may face challenges obtaining documentation — and that the timing and focus of these efforts suggest a strategic attempt to suppress voter participation rather than secure elections.

UN Secretary-General António Guterres told African leaders bluntly: “This is 2026 — not 1946.” 

Speaking at the 39th African Union Summit in Addis Ababa, Guterres said Africa’s exclusion from permanent seats on the UN Security Council is indefensible. “When decisions about Africa are made, Africa must be at the table,” he said.

He also slammed the global financial system as “totally unjust,” calling for fair access to development finance, real voting power in global institutions, and Africa benefiting first from its natural resources — “no more exploitation, no more plundering.”

The summit elected Burundi’s president as AU chair and reviewed AfCFTA, G20 participation, water security, and climate goals. But critics say the real test isn’t speeches — it’s power, implementation, and results.

Until Africa gets permanent UNSC seats and control over its wealth, it’s still talk over leverage.

Quraanka iyo Ilmaha

Waxaa la sheegaa hooyo dadaal badan gelisay in wiilkeedu xifdiyo Quraanka, balse ilmihii wuu ka cararayay musxafka isagoo ooyaya oo qaylinaya. Suurad kasta oo cusub wuxuu u arkayay “buur” culus oo la saaray laabtiisa, ilaa uu ka gaadhay heer uu nacay saacadaha xifdinta.

Dhibaatadu ma ahayn “xusuusta” ilmaha, balse waxay ahayd “habka loo barayo”. Dhisidda qofku waxay ka bilaabataa dhisidda xiisaha (shagaf) ka hor ku celcelinta (talcinta). Marka Quraanku indhaha ilmaha uga muuqdo “waajib dugsi” oo qalalan oo lagu canaanto, waxaan luminaynaa ujeeddadii uu u soo degay.

Haddaba waa kuwan “khariidad kooban” oo ka dhigaysa xifdinta mid culays ahayn balse noqota farxad:

1. Habka Sheekada (Quraanka oo loo arko “sheeko”)

Ilmuhu waa makhluuq ku nool mala-awaal. Ka hor intaadan ka dalban inuu xifdiyo Suuratul Buruuj, uga sheekee qisada “Ashabul Ukhduud” si xiiso leh oo riwaayad leh. Ka dhig aayadaha “erayo sir ah” oo sharxaya dhacdooyinka sheekada. Marka xifdintu ku xirnaato sawir iyo dhacdo, waxay maskaxda ugu dhegtaa sida qayb ka mid ah sheeko xiiso leh, ee ma aha erayo gooni ah.

2. Fahamka “qiyaasta yar-yar”

Xeerka dhisidda caadooyinka wuxuu dhahaa: “Wax yar oo joogto ah ayaa ka kheyr badan wax badan oo goos-goos ah.” Ka bilow hal aayad maalintii, kuna dabaaldeg guusha yar. Ujeeddadu ma aha “tasmic” kaliya, balse waa in la dhiso xiriir uu ilmuhu la yeesho Kitaabka Alle. Guusha yar waxay dhalisaa kalsooni, kalsooniduna waxay dhalisaa joogteyn.

3. Ku xiridda nolosha iyo macnaha

U sharax ilmaha waxa uu xifdinayo erayo uu fahmi karo. Markuu yiraahdo “Alxamdu lillaahi Rabbil caalamiin,” bar inuu ku arko nimcooyinka Alle cuntadiisa, ciyaartiisa, iyo qoyskiisa. Quraanku wuu sii waarayaa marka la noolaado, balse wuu illaawmaa marka lagu xiro waraaqo oo keliya.

Public Notice: Protest Planned Against ICE in Minneapolis – Saturday, Feb. 21

MINNEAPOLIS — A protest against U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) is scheduled for Saturday, February 21, beginning at 11:00 a.m. at Whittier Park in Minneapolis. Organizers say the march will proceed through parts of the city to highlight ongoing concerns about federal immigration enforcement in Minnesota.

This demonstration is part of a continuing local movement opposing the presence and actions of ICE agents in the Twin Cities. The protests intensified after a series of fatal shootings involving immigration enforcement officers earlier this year, including the deaths of Renée Good and Alex Pretti, which drew widespread public attention and community outrage.

According to the organizers, the purpose of the Saturday march is to:
- Honor lives lost in incidents tied to immigration enforcement actions.
- Protest cooperation between federal agents and local law enforcement.
- Show solidarity with neighbors and community members affected by aggressive immigration sweeps.

ICE has not pulled out of Minnesota, and federal immigration operations continue to be a point of contention in the region. Demonstrators and community groups planning to attend are encouraged to exercise peaceful conduct and remain aware of public safety guidelines.

Further details about the route or affiliated events may be available from the organizers as the date approaches.
